Judges4:6 A roma a bitša Baraka morwa wa Abinoama go tšwa Kedeshe-naftali, a re go yena: “Na Jehofa Modimo wa Isiraele ga se a go laela a re: ‘Rotogela thabeng ya Tabora, o tšee banna ba dikete tše lesome, le ba bana ba Nafutali, o na le wena? ba bangwe ba barwa ba Sebulone?" 
Judges4:7 Ke tla gogela Sisera molaodi wa madira a Jabini le dikoloi tša gagwe tša ntwa le lešaba la gagwe Nokeng ya Kishone; ke tla mo gafela diatleng tša gago. 
Judges4:8 Barake a re go yena: “Ge o ka sepela le nna, gona ke tla ya; eupša ge le sa sepele le nna, gona nka se ye.”" 
Judges4:9 A re: “Ruri ke tla sepela le wena; gobane Jehofa o tla rekišetša Sisera seatleng sa mosadi. Debora a rotogela Kedeshe le Barake. 
Judges4:10 Barake a bitša Sebulone le Nafutali Kedeshe. Banna ba sekete ba rotoga le yena maotong a gagwe, gomme Debora a rotoga le yena." 
Judges4:11 Bjale Hebere wa Mokanana, yo e bego e le wa bana ba Hobabe tatago Moshe, o be a kgaogile le Bakanana, a hloma tente ya gagwe go fihla lebaleng la Tsanaime, yeo e lego kgauswi le Kedeshe." 
Judges4:12 Ba botša Sisera gore Baraka morwa wa Abinoama o rotogetše thabeng ya Tabora. 
Judges4:13 Sisera a kgoboketša dikoloi tša gagwe ka moka tša ntwa, e lego dikoloi tša tšhipi tše makgolo a senyane le batho ka moka bao ba bego ba na le yena, go tloga Harosethe ya ditšhaba go fihla nokeng ya Kishone." 
Judges4:14 Ke moka Debora a re go Baraka: “Ema! gobane le ke letšatši leo ka lona Jehofa a gafetšego Sisera diatleng tša gago. Na Jehofa ga se a go hlahla? Barake a theoga thabeng ya Tabora, a latelwa ke banna ba dikete tše lesome." 
Judges4:15 Jehofa a thoma go lahlela Sisera le dikoloi tša gagwe ka moka le madira a gagwe ka moka kgakanego ka bogale bja tšhoša pele ga Baraka; mo e lego gore Sisera a fologa koloing ya gagwe a tšhaba ka maoto. 
Judges4:16 Eupša Barake a rakediša dikoloi tša ntwa le madira go fihla Harosethe ya ditšhaba. Gomme go be go se na motho yo a šetšego. 
Judges4:17 Eupša Sisera a tšhabela ka maoto a ya tenteng ya Jaele mosadi wa Hebere wa Mokeni, ka gobane go be go na le khutšo magareng ga Jabini kgoši ya Hatsoro le ntlo ya Hebere wa Mokeni." 
Judges4:18 Ke moka Jaele a tšwa a yo gahlanetša Sisera gomme a re go yena: “Tsena, mong wa ka, retologela go nna; O se ke wa boifa. Ge a mo tliša ka tenteng, a mo khupetša ka kobo." 
Judges4:19 A re go yena: “Mphe ke nwe, gobane ke nyorilwe.” Ka gona a bula lepotlelo la maswi, a mo tlogela a nwa gomme a le tswalela.”" 
Judges4:20 A re go yena: “Ema mojakong wa tente, gomme go tla direga ge motho a feta a re: “Na go na le monna moo?” Gore o tle o re: Ee." 
Judges4:21 Ka morago ga moo mosadi wa Jaele Hebere a swere pego ya tente le hamore ka seatleng sa gagwe, a ya go yena ka boleta, a kgomaretša sepekere fase, ka gobane o be a robetše e bile a lapile. Ke moka a hwa." 
Judges4:22 Ge Baraka a rakediša Sisera, Jaele a tšwa a mo gahlanetša, a re go yena: “Tloo, ke tla go bontšha monna yo o mo nyakago.” Ge a tsena ka tenteng ya gagwe, a bona Sisera a robetše a hwile, a swere sepekere ka tempeleng ya gagwe." 
Judges4:23 Ka letšatši leo Modimo a fenya Jabini kgoši ya Kanana pele ga bana ba Isiraele. 
Judges4:24 Letsogo la bana ba Isiraele la fenya Jabini kgoši ya Kanana go fihlela ba fediša Jabini kgoši ya Kanana. 
Judges5:1 Ke moka Debora le Baraka morwa wa Abinoama ka letšatši leo ba opela ba re: 
Judges5:2 Boka Jehofa ka baka la tefetšo ya Isiraele, ge setšhaba se be se ithapela ka go rata." 
Judges5:3 Theeletšang, lena dikgoši! theeletšang, lena dikgošana! Ke tla opelela Morena; Ke rata go opelela Morena Modimo wa Isiraele dipsalme." 
Judges5:4 Morena, ge o be o etšwa Seire, ge o be o etšwa nageng ya Edomo, lefase le ile la thothomela, magodimo a rotha, maru le ona a rothiša meetse." 
Judges5:5 Dithaba tša tologa pele ga Jehofa, Sinai ya tologa pele ga Jehofa Modimo wa Isiraele." 
Judges5:6 Mehleng ya Shamgare morwa wa Anathe, mehleng ya Jaele, ditsela tše dikgolo di be di se na motho gomme basepedi ba sepela ditseleng tša ka thoko." 
Judges5:7 Badudi ba motse ba ema, Isiraele ya ema, go fihlela nna Debora ke tsoga, ke tsoga bjalo ka mma kua Isiraele." 
Judges5:8 Ba ikgethile medimo e mefsa; ntwa ya phulega dikgorong; Na go be go e-na le kotse goba tšhoša yeo e bego e tla bonwa gare ga ba 40 000 kua Isiraele? 
Judges5:9 Pelo ya ka e lebane le babuši ba Isiraele bao ba itsebišitšego gare ga setšhaba. Bokang Morena. 
Judges5:10 Bolela se, lena bao ba nametšego disele tše tšhweu, lena bao ba dulago mabaleng, lena bao ba sepelago tseleng." 
Judges5:11 Bao ba phonyokgilego lešata la babetši ba mesebe didibeng tša meetse moo ba tla kwa ditiro tša go loka tša Jehofa, ditiro tša go loka tšeo a di direlago badudi ba metse ya gagwe kua Isiraele; setšhaba sa Jehofa se tla theogela dikgorong." 
Judges5:12 Phafoga, phafoga, Debora, phafoga, opela; Tsoga, Barake, o tšee morwa wa Abinoama bothopša." 
Judges5:13 Ba bangwe ka moka a ba dira dikgošana gare ga ditšhaba; Jehofa o ntirile mmuši wa bagale. 
Judges5:14 Ba hloma medu Efuraime, ba lwa le Baamaleke; gomme ka morago ga gago, wena Benjamini, gare ga setšhaba sa gago; go tšwa go Magire go be go na le dikgošana, gomme go tšwa go Sebulone ke bao ba swarago lešela la mongwadi." 
Judges5:15 Dikgošana tša Isakara di be di na le Debora; ee, Isakara le Baraka; o ile a romelwa ka maoto moeding. Dihlopheng tša Rubeni go be go na le kgopolo ye kgolo ya pelo." 
Judges5:16 Ke ka baka la’ng o ile wa dula mašakeng a mohlape gore o kwe sello sa mohlape? Go ile gwa tsongwa kudu dipelo tša meloko ya Rubeni. 
Judges5:17 Gileade e be e le ka mošola wa Noka ya Jorodane, gomme ke ka baka la’ng Dani a ile a dula ka dikepeng? Ashere a dula a sa šišinyege sekhutlong sa lewatle, a dula ditenteng tša gagwe." 
Judges5:18 Sebulone le Nafutali e be e le banna bao ba beilego maphelo a bona kotsing lefelong le le phagamego. 
Judges5:19 Ke moka dikgoši tša lwa le bona, ka morago ga moo dikgoši tša Kanana tša lwa, kua Taanake kgauswi le meetse a Megido; ga se ba thopa tšhelete le ge e le efe." 
Judges5:20 Ba lwa ba le legodimong; dinaledi tšeo di bego di dikologa dikoloi tša tšona di ile tša lwa le Sisera. 
Judges5:21 Noka ya Kishone ya ba gogola, noka ya bogologolo ya Kishone. O moya wa ka, o fentšwe." 
Judges5:22 Ditlhako tša dipere tša robega ka lebelo, gomme tše matla tša lahlelwa fase." 
Judges5:23 Rogang Merotse, o re’alo morongwa wa Jehofa, rogang badudi ba yona ka matla; gobane ga se ba thuša Morena, Morena o ile a thuša bagale." 
Judges5:24 Jaele o tla tumišwa gare ga basadi, mosadi wa Hebere wa Mokeni o tla šegofatšwa gare ga basadi ka tenteng." 
Judges5:25 A kgopela meetse, a mo fa maswi; a tliša botoro ka sekotlelong se se bose." 
Judges5:26 A bea seatla sa gagwe sepekere gomme a bea seatla sa gagwe sa le letona godimo ga molomo wa mošomi; a otla Sisera ka lepara, a mo kgaola hlogo ka go betha, a mo phunya direthe." 
Judges5:27 Mosadi a khunama maotong a gagwe, a robala; a khunama maotong a gagwe a wa; moo a ilego a inama, o ile a wa a hwile." 
Judges5:28 Mmago Sisera a lebelela ka lefasetere gomme a goeletša a re: “Ke ka baka la’ng koloi ya gagwe e e-tla nako e telele gakaakaa? ke ka lebaka la eng dikoloi tša gagwe di diegile? 
Judges5:29 Basadi ba gagwe ba bohlale ba mo araba. 
Judges5:30 Na ga se ba akgofela? ga se ba arola dithebola; go monna yo mongwe le yo mongwe ngwanenyana goba ba babedi; ka gobane Sisera ke seaparo sa mebala e fapa-fapanego, seaparo se se logeletšwego sa mebala ka moka, se se logilwego ka mahlakoreng ka bobedi le melaleng ya bagolegwa?" 
Judges5:31 Anke manaba a gago ka moka a fedišwe, Jehofa, eupša bao ba go ratago a ba tshwane le letšatši ge le tšwela ka ntle ka matla a lona. Gomme lefase la khutša mengwaga ye masomenne." 
Judges6:1 Bana ba Isiraele ba dira tše mpe mahlong a Jehofa, Jehofa a ba gafela diatleng tša Midiane ka nywaga e šupago." 
Judges6:2 Seatla sa Midiane sa fenya Isiraele, ka baka la Midiane bana ba Isiraele ba ba dira mešaša yeo e lego dithabeng le magaga le dibo." 
Judges6:3 Ya re ge Isiraele e bjetše, Bamidiane le Baamaleke le bana ba bohlabela ba rotoga;" 
Judges6:4 Ba hloma mešaša kgahlanong le bona, ba fediša dimela tša lefase go fihlela o fihla Gasa, ba sa tlogele Isiraele dijo, le ge e le dinku goba kgomo goba pokolo." 
Judges6:5 Gobane ba be ba rotoga ka mehlape ya bona le ditente tša bona, ba tla bjalo ka ditšie ka bontši; gobane bona le dikamela tša bona ba be ba sa balege, gomme ba tsena go yo senya naga." 
Judges6:6 Isiraele ya diila kudu ka baka la Midiane; bana ba Isiraele ba bitša Jehofa. 
Judges6:7 Ge bana ba Isiraele ba goeletša Jehofa ka baka la Midiane. 
Judges6:8 Jehofa a roma moporofeta go Baisiraele, a re go bona: “Se ke seo Jehofa Modimo wa Isiraele a se bolelago: Ke le ntšhitše Egipita, ntlong ya bokgoba;" 
Judges6:9 Ka le hlakodiša diatleng tša Baegipita le diatleng tša bohle bao ba le gatelelago, ka ba raka pele ga lena, ka le nea naga ya bona;" 
Judges6:10 Ka re go lena: Ke nna Jehofa Modimo wa lena; le se boife medimo ya Baamore bao le dulago nageng ya bona, eupša ga se la kwa lentšu la ka." 
Judges6:11 Morongwa wa Jehofa a tla a dula ka tlase ga moeike wo o bego o le kua Ofura, e lego wa Joase wa Momoaba; morwa wa gagwe Gideone o be a photha korong segatelong sa morara gore a e utele Bamidiane." 
Judges6:12 Morongwa wa Jehofa a iponagatša go yena, a re go yena: “Jehofa o na le wena, wena mogale wa sebete.”" 
Judges6:13 Gideone a re go yena: “Morena wa ka, ge e ba Jehofa a na le rena, gona ke ka baka la’ng tše ka moka di re wetše? mehlolo ya gagwe ka moka yeo borakgolokhukhu ba rena ba re boditšego ka yona e kae, ba re: “Na Jehofa ga se a re rotoša Egipita?” eupša bjale Jehofa o re lahlile, a re gafela diatleng tša Bamidiane." 
Judges6:14 Jehofa a mo lebelela a re: “Sepela ka matla a gago, o phološe Isiraele diatleng tša Bamidiane.” Na ga se ka go roma?" 
Judges6:15 A re go yena: “Morena, ke tla phološa Isiraele ka eng? bona, lapa la ka le diila kua Manase, le nna ke yo monyenyane lapeng la tate." 
Judges6:16 Jehofa a re go yena: “Ruri ke tla ba le wena, gomme o tla bolaya Bamidiane bjalo ka motho o tee.”" 
Judges6:17 A re go yena: “Ge bjale ke hweditše kgaugelo mahlong a gago, mphe pontšho ya gore o tla bolela le nna.”" 
Judges6:18 O se ke wa tloga mo go fihlela ke etla go wena ke tliša mpho ya ka ka e bea pele ga gago. A re: Ke tla leta go fihlela o boa. 
Judges6:19 Gideone a tsena, a lokišetša potsanyane le efa ya dinkgwa tše di sa omelwago. A tsenya nama ka mokotleng, a tsenya moro ka pitšeng, a e tliša ka fase ga sehlare sa turpentine, a e tliša." 
Judges6:20 Morongwa wa Modimo a re go yena: “Tšea nama le dinkgwa tše di sa omelwago, o di bee godimo ga leswika le, o tšholle moro.” Gomme o dirile sona seo." 
Judges6:21 Ke moka morongwa wa Jehofa a ntšha ntlha ya lepara ka seatleng sa gagwe, a kgwatha nama le dinkgwa tše di sa omelwago. Mollo wa tšwa leswikeng, wa fiša nama le senkgwa se se sa omelwago. Ke moka Morongwa wa Morena a tloga pele ga gagwe." 
Judges6:22 Ge Gideone a lemoga gore ke morongwa wa Jehofa, Gideone o ile a re: “Go madi, Mmuši Morena Jehofa! gobane ke bone morongwa wa Jehofa a lebane ka difahlego." 
Judges6:23 Jehofa a re go yena: “Khutšo a e be go wena; o se ke wa boifa: o ka se hwe. 
Judges6:24 Ke moka Gideone a agela Jehofa aletare moo, a e bitša Jehofashalomo, go fihla le lehono e sa dutše e le Ofura wa Baabiesre. Gaešita le go fihla le lehono e sa le Ofura wa Babiesre." 
Judges6:25 Bošegong bjoo Jehofa a re go yena: “Tšea poo ya tatago, poo ya bobedi ya nywaga e šupago, o phušole aletare ya Baali yeo tatago a nago le yona.”" 
Judges6:26 O agele Jehofa Modimo wa gago aletare godimo ga leswika le lefelong leo o tlago go le hloma godimo ga lona, gomme o tšee poo ya bobedi gomme o dire sehlabelo sa go fišwa godimo ga dikota tša sethokgwa seo o se remago." 
Judges6:27 Ka gona Gideone a tšea banna ba lesome ba bahlanka ba gagwe gomme a dira kamoo Jehofa a mmoditšego ka gona; gomme ka ge a be a boifa ntlo ya tatagwe le banna ba motse, moo a bego a sa kgone go dira bjalo mosegare, o ile a dira bjalo ke bošego." 
Judges6:28 Ge banna ba motse ba tsoga e sa le ka pela mesong, ke ka baka la’ng, moo aletare ya Baali e be e fedišitšwe, gomme sehlare seo se bego se le kgauswi le yona se remilwe, gomme poo ya bobedi e be e neetšwe aletareng yeo e be e agilwe." 
Judges6:29 Ba thoma go botšana: “Ke mang yo a dirilego selo se?” Ge ba botšiša, ba botšiša, ba re: “Gideone morwa wa Joashe o dirile taba ye.”" 
Judges6:30 Ke moka banna ba motse ba re go Joase: “Ntšha morwa wa gago a hwe. E be e abetše sethokgwa seo se bego se le gona. 
Judges6:31 Joase a re go bohle bao ba bego ba eme pele ga gagwe: “Na le tla lopa Baali?” o tla mo phološa? mang le mang yo a ratago go mo rapelela, a a bolawe gosasa; ge e ba e le modimo, a a ikgopele, ka gobane o lahlile aletare ya gagwe." 
Judges6:32 Ke ka baka leo letšatšing leo a ilego a bitša Jeruba-Baali a re: “Anke Baali a mo lopele, gobane o lahlile aletare ya gagwe.”" 
Judges6:33 Ke moka Bamidiane ka moka le Baamaleke le bana ba bohlabela ba kgobokana, ba tshela, ba hloma mešaša moeding wa Jeseriele." 
Judges6:34 Eupša moya wa Jehofa wa tla Gideone, a letša phalafala; Abiesere a kgobokana ka morago ga gagwe." 
Judges6:35 A roma baromiwa gohle Manase; a roma baromiwa go Ashere, le Sebulone, le Nafutali; ba rotogela go ba gahlanetša." 
Judges6:36 Gideone a re go Modimo: “Ge o ka phološa Isiraele ka seatla sa ka, bjalo ka ge o boletše." 
Judges6:37 Bonang, ke tla bea boya mo lefaseng; ge lešoba le le meriring fela gomme le omile mobung ka moka ka ntle, gona ke tla tseba gore o tla lopolla Isiraele ka seatla sa ka, go etša ge o holofeditše." 
Judges6:38 Seo ga se sa ba bjalo, ka gobane letšatšing le le latelago o ile a tsoga pele go hlaba, a kgoboketša boya bjoo gomme a ina boya bjoo ka moleteng wo o bego o tletše meetse." 
Judges6:39 Gideone a re go Modimo: “A bogale bja gago bo se ke bo nkgahla, gomme ke tla bolela gatee. E re ke e leke, eupša mo nakong ye ka boya; bjale, e be e omile go fihla boya, gomme phoka ka moka e be e le fase." 
Judges6:40 Modimo a dira bjalo bošegong bjoo, ka gobane leratadima le be le omile lefaseng ka moka le phoka." 
Judges7:1 Ke moka Jerubaale, yo e lego Gideone, a tsoga e sa le ka pela le batho ka moka bao ba bego ba na le yena, ba ema kgauswi le sediba sa Harode. Mešaša ya Bamidiane e be e le ka leboa la bona mmotong wa More moeding." 
Judges7:2 Jehofa a re go Gideone: “Batho bao ba nago le wena ke ba bantši kudu gore nka gafela Bamidiane diatleng tša bona, e le gore Isiraele e se ke ya ikgantšha ka nna, ya re: ‘Seatla sa ka se mphološitše." 
Judges7:3 Bjale eya, o goeletše ditsebeng tša setšhaba, o re: Mang le mang yo a boifago le go tšhoga, a a boele a tloge e sa le ka pela thabeng ya Gileada. Ke moka ba boa gare ga batho ba 22 000; go šetše ba dikete tše lesome." 
Judges7:4 Jehofa a re go Gideone: “Setšhaba se sa dutše se le gona kudu; Theogela meetseng, gomme ke tla go leka fao. Ke le botša mang le mang, a se ke a tloga go lena." 
Judges7:5 Ka gona a theošetša setšhaba meetseng, Jehofa a re go Gideone: “Motho yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a tšhošago meetse ka leleme la gagwe go etša mpša, o mo beye a nnoši; go bjalo le ka yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo a khunamago gore a nwe." 
Judges7:6 Palo ya bao ba ilego ba latswa goba ba bea diatla melomong ya bona e be e le banna ba makgolo a mararo; eupša batho ba bangwe ba khunama ba nwa. 
Judges7:7 Jehofa a re go Gideone: “Ke tla go phološa le basadi ba makgolo a mararo ka wena, ka gafela Bamidiane diatleng tša gago; gomme ditšhaba tše dingwe ka moka a yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ye lefelong la gagwe." 
Judges7:8 Ka gona setšhaba sa tšea dijo tša sona le diphalafala ka diatleng tša sona, gomme a re go Isiraele ka moka: “Yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ye tenteng ya gagwe, o yo diša banna bao ba makgolo a mararo; madira a Midiane a be a le ka tlase ga gagwe moeding." 
Judges7:9 Bošegong bjoo Jehofa a re go yena: “Ema, theogela ntweng; gobane ke e gafetše seatleng sa gago." 
Judges7:10 Eupša ge e ba o tšhaba go theoga, theogela le mohlanka wa gago Fura madireng." 
Judges7:11 O theeletša seo ba se bolelago; ka morago diatla tša gago di tla matlafatšwa gore di theogele sebo. Ka gona a theoga le Fura mohlanka wa gagwe kgauswi le banna bao ba itlhamilego. 
Judges7:12 Bamidiane le Baamaleke le bana ka moka ba bohlabela ba rapaletše moeding bjalo ka ditšie; dikamela tša bona e be e le tše dintši go etša santa lebopong la lewatle. 
Judges7:13 Ge Gideone a fihla, a bona monna a botša modirišani wa gagwe toro, gomme a re: “Bona! moo e ilego ya wa, ya e phekgola, moo tente e ilego ya robala ka lehlakoreng la yona." 
Judges7:14 Motho wa gabo a araba a re: “Se ga se selo se sengwe ge e se tšhoša ya Gideone morwa wa Joashe, monna wa Isiraele;" 
Judges7:15 Ge Gideone a ekwa toro yeo le tlhathollo ya yona, a khunama gomme a boela madireng a Isiraele a re: “Ema! gobane Jehofa o gafetše madira a Midiane seatleng sa gago." 
Judges7:16 A arola banna bao ba makgolo a mararo ka dihlopha tše tharo, a bea phalafala ka seatleng sa yo mongwe le yo mongwe, le dipitšana tše di se nago selo, le mabone ka gare ga dipitšana." 
Judges7:17 A re go bona: “Ntebeleleng, le dire se se swanago. Mme, bona, ge ke etšwa mešašeng, ke dirile go ya ka tšohle tše ke di dirago." 
Judges7:18 Ge ke letša phalafala, nna le bohle bao ba nago le nna, gona le letša diphalafala ka mahlakoreng ka moka a mešaša ka moka, le re: ‘Koša ya Jehofa le koša ya Gideone;" 
Judges7:19 Gideone le banna ba lekgolo bao ba bego ba na le yena, ba tla ka ntle ga mešaša mathomong a mohlapetši wa gare; ba be ba sa tšwa go bea mohlapetši, gomme ba letša dinaka tša kgapa, ba roba dikota tše di bego di le ka diatleng tša bona." 
Judges7:20 Ba bararo ba letša diphalafala, ba roba dipitšana, ba swere mabone ka diatleng tša bona tša le letshadi, le diphalafala ka diatleng tša bona tša le letona gore ba tle di letša. Ba goeletša ba re: “Tšhoša ya Jehofa le ya Gideone.”" 
Judges7:21 Yo mongwe le yo mongwe a ema lefelong la gagwe go dikologa mešaša; 
Judges7:22 Makgolo a mararo a otla dinaka tša dikgapa, Jehofa a bea tšhoša ya yo mongwe le yo mongwe kgahlanong le magagabo le madira ka moka;" 
Judges7:23 Banna ba Isiraele ba kgobokane go tšwa go Nafutali le motse wa Ashere le wa Manase ka moka, ba rakediša Bamidiane." 
Judges7:24 Gideone a roma baromiwa dithabeng ka moka tša Efuraime, ba re: “Theogelang go lwa le Midiane, le tšee meetse pele ga bona go fihla Bethebara le Jorodane.” Banna ka moka ba Efuraime ba kgobokana, ba gogela meetse go fihla Bethebara le Jorodane." 
Judges7:25 Ba tšea dikgošana tše pedi tša Bamidiane, e lego Orebe le Tsebe; ba bolaya Orebe godimo ga leswika la Orebe, Sebe a ba bolaya segatelong sa morara sa Sebe, a rakediša Midiane, a tliša dihlogo tša Orebe le Shebe Gideone ka mošola wa Noka ya Jorodane." 
Judges8:1 Banna ba Efuraime ba re go yena: “Ke ka baka la’ng o re hlankele, wa se re bitša, mola o be o eya go lwa le Bamidiane?” Gomme ba ile ba lwa le yena kudu." 
Judges8:2 A re go bona: “Ke eng seo bjale ke se dirilego ge ke bapetšwa le lena? Na dithakangwaga tša Efuraime di be di le kaone go feta morara wa Abisere? 
Judges8:3 Modimo o gafetše dikgošana tša Midiane, Orebe le Tsebe diatleng tša lena; gomme nka dira eng ge ke bapetšwa le wena? Ke moka pefelo ya bona ya kokobela ge a bolela seo." 
Judges8:4 Gideone a fihla noka ya Jorodane, a tshela, yena le banna ba makgolo a mararo bao ba bego ba na le yena, ba lapa, eupša ba ba rakediša." 
Judges8:5 A re go banna ba Sukothe: “Ke kgopela gore le fe batho bao ba ntatelago dinkgwa; gobane ba lapile, gomme ke rakediša Sheba le Tsalmuna, dikgoši tša Midiane." 
Judges8:6 Dikgošana tša Sukothe tša re: “Na diatla tša Seba le Tsalmuna bjale di ka seatleng sa gago, gore re nee madira a gago senkgwa?”" 
Judges8:7 Gideone a re: “Ka gona ge Jehofa a gafetše Sheba le Tsalmuna diatleng tša ka, ke tla gagola nama ya lena ka meetlwa ya lešoka le ka meetlwa.”" 
Judges8:8 A rotogela Penuwele go tloga moo, a bolela le bona ka mo go swanago, banna ba Penuel ba mo araba go etša ge banna ba Sukothe ba mo arabile." 
Judges8:9 A bolela le banna ba Penele a re: “Ge ke boa ka khutšo, ke tla phušola tora ye.”" 
Judges8:10 Tseba le Tsalamuna ba be ba le Karkore, le madira a bona, banna ba ka bago dikete tše lesomehlano, ka moka ba šetšego go madira ka moka a bana ba Bohlabela. Gobane go ile gwa wa banna ba 120 000 bao ba ilego ba ntšha tšhoša." 
Judges8:11 Gideone a rotoga ka tsela ya bao ba dulago ditente ka bohlabela bja Noba le Jogbeha, a bolaya madira, ka gobane madira a be a šireletšegile." 
Judges8:12 Ge Sheba le Tsalmuna ba tšhaba, a ba rakediša, a tšea dikgoši tše pedi tša Midiane, e lego Sheba le Tsalmuna, a šitiša naga ka moka." 
Judges8:13 Gideone morwa wa Joase a boa ntweng pele letšatši le hlaba. 
Judges8:14 A swara lesogana la banna ba Sukothe, a rerišana le lona; A mo hlalosetša bakgomana ba Sukothe le bagolo ba yona, banna ba masome a šupago." 
Judges8:15 A tla go banna ba Sukothe, a re: “Bonang Seba le Tsalmuna, bao le nkgobošitšego ka bona, la re: ‘Na diatla tša Seba le Tsalmuna bjale di ka seatleng sa lena gore re le nee tšona?’ banna ba.” O lapišitšwe ke bogobe?" 
Judges8:16 A tšea bagolo ba motse, le meetlwa ya lešokeng le dimela, a ruta banna ba Sukothe le bona." 
Judges8:17 A betha tora ya Penele, a bolaya banna ba motse." 
Judges8:18 Ke moka a re go Tseba le Tsalamuna: “Ke banna bafe bao le ba bolailego kua Tabora? Ba araba ka gore: Go swana le wena, ba be ba le bjalo; yo mongwe le yo mongwe o be a swana le barwa ba kgoši." 
Judges8:19 A re: “E be e le bana bešo, barwa ba mma; bjalo ka ge Jehofa a phela, ge nkabe o ba hlakodišitše, nkabe ke sa go bolaya." 
Judges8:20 A re go Jethere leitšibulo la gagwe: “Tsoga o ba bolaye.” Eupša lesogana leo ga se la ntšha tšhoša ya lona, gobane le be le boifa ka gobane e be e sa le mofsa." 
Judges8:21 Ke moka Seba le Tsalmuna ba re: “Ema o re wele, gobane go etša ge motho a le bjalo, matla a gagwe a bjalo.” Gideone a tsoga, a bolaya Sheba le Tsalmuna, a tšea mekgabišo yeo e bego e le melaleng ya dikamela tša bona." 
Judges8:22 Ke moka banna ba Isiraele ba re go Gideone: “Re buše, wena le morwa wa gago le morwa wa gago, ka gobane o re hlakodišitše diatleng tša Midiane.”" 
Judges8:23 Gideone a re go bona: “Nna nka se le buše, le morwa wa ka a ka se le buše. Jehofa o tla go buša." 
Judges8:24 Gideone a re go bona: “Ke rata kgopelo go lena, gore yo mongwe le yo mongwe a mphe masale a diphoofolo tša gagwe.” (Gobane ba be ba na le masale a gauta, ka gobane e be e le Baismaele)." 
Judges8:25 Ba araba ba re: “Re tla di fa ka go rata.” Ke moka ba phurolla lešela gomme yo mongwe le yo mongwe a lahlela dipalamonwana tša dithebola ka gare ga lona. 
Judges8:26 Boima bja masale a gauta ao a a kgopetšego e be e le dišekele tše 1 700 tša gauta; ntle le mekgabišo le diaparo le diaparo tše khubedu tše di bego di le godimo ga dikgoši tša Midiane le diketane tšeo di bego di le melaleng ya dikamela tša tšona. 
Judges8:27 Gideone a dira lešela ka lona, a le bea motseng wa gabo, kua Ofura, Isiraele ka moka ya ya moo e le mogweba-ka-mmele." 
Judges8:28 Ka gona Midiane a fenywa pele ga bana ba Isiraele, ba se sa emiša dihlogo tša bona. Ke moka naga ya khutša ka nywaga e 40 mehleng ya Gideone." 
Judges8:29 Jerubaale morwa wa Joase a ya a dula ntlong ya gagwe. 
Judges8:30 Gideone a ba le barwa ba masome a masome a masome a mmele ba belegwe, ka gobane o be a na le basadi ba bantši." 
Judges8:31 Le mosadi wa gagwe wa serethe yo a bego a le Sikeme, o ile a mo belega morwa yo a mo reetšego leina la Abimeleke." 
Judges8:32 Gideone morwa wa Joashe a hwa a tšofetše, a bolokwa lebitleng la Joashe tatagwe, kua Ofura ya Baabiesere." 
Judges8:33 Gateetee ge Gideone a hwile, bana ba Isiraele ba boela morago, ba dira bootswa ba šala Baali, ba dira Baaleberithe modimo wa bona." 
Judges8:34 Bana ba Isiraele ga se ba gopola Jehofa Modimo wa bona yo a ba hlakodišitšego diatleng tša manaba a bona ka moka ka mahlakoreng ka moka. 
Judges8:35 Le gona ga se ba ka ba bontšha botho go ba ntlo ya Jerubaali, e lego Gideone, go ya ka botho ka moka bjo a bo bontšhitšego Isiraele." 
Judges9:1 Abimeleke morwa wa Jerubaale a ya Shekeme go bana babo mmagwe, a bolela le bona le ba ntlo ka moka ya tatagwe a re:" 
Judges9:2 “Ka gona, bolela ka go theeletša banna ka moka ba Sikeme, o re: ‘Ke efe e kaone go lena, gore barwa ka moka ba masometshela ba Jerubaali ba le buše, goba o tee a le buše? gomme o gopole gore ke marapo a gago le nama ya gago." 
Judges9:3 Bana ba mmagwe ba bolela mantšu a ka moka ka yena ditsebeng tša banna ka moka ba Sikeme. Gobane ba be ba re: “Ke ngwanešo.” 
Judges9:4 Ba mo nea ditsekana tša silifera tše masomeseswai ka ntlong ya Baali-berithe, moo Abimeleke a ilego a thwala batho ba lefeela le ba bofefo, bao ba ilego ba mo latela." 
Judges9:5 A ya ntlong ya tatagwe kua Ofura, a bolaya bana babo barwa ba Jerubaali, e lego batho ba masometshela-tee godimo ga leswika le tee. Eupša Jothame morwa yo monyenyane wa Jerubaali a šala; gobane o be a iphihla." 
Judges9:6 Banna ka moka ba Sikeme ba kgobokana le ba ntlo ka moka ya Milo, ba ya, ba bea Abimeleke kgoši, lebaleng la kokwane yeo e bego e le Sikeme." 
Judges9:7 Ge ba botša Jothame seo, a ya a ema godimo ga Thaba ya Gerisima, a hlaboša lentšu a goeletša a re go bona: ‘Theetšang, lena banna ba Sikeme, gore Modimo a le theetše." 
Judges9:8 Kgalekgale dihlare di be di etšwa go tlo tlotša kgoši ya tšona; ba re go sehlare sa mohlware: “Re a buša.” 
Judges9:9 Eupša sehlare sa mohlware sa re go bona: “Na ke tlogele makhura a ka ao ba tumišago Modimo le motho ka ona, ke be molemi wa merara?”" 
Judges9:10 Ke moka dihlare tša re go mogo: “Etla o re buše.” 
Judges9:11 Eupša sehlare sa mogo sa re go bona: “Na ke swanetše go lahla bose bja ka le dienywa tša ka tše dibotse, ke ye go phagamišwa godimo ga dihlare?" 
Judges9:12 Ke moka dihlare tša re go morara: “Etla o re buše.” 
Judges9:13 Morara wa re go bona: “Na ke swanetše go tlogela beine ya ka yeo e thabišago Modimo le motho, ke ye go phagamišwa godimo ga dihlare?" 
Judges9:14 Ke moka dihlare ka moka tša re go mootlwa: “Etla o re buše.” 
Judges9:15 Sehlare sa re go dihlare: “Ge e ba ruri le ka nkgethela gore ke be kgoši ya lena, gona le tla bota moriti wa ka;" 
Judges9:16 Ge e ba o dirile Abimeleke kgoši ka therešo le ka therešo, wa dira gabotse le Jerubaale le ba ntlo ya gagwe, wa mo dira ka mo go dirilwego ka diatla tša gagwe;" 
Judges9:17 (Gobane tate o le lwetše, a oketša ka bophelo bja gagwe, a go hlakodiša diatleng tša Midiane)." 
Judges9:18 Gomme ntlo ya tate, le barwa ba gagwe, banna ba masomeseswai, bao ba bolailwego godimo ga leswika le tee, ba dirile Abimeleke, morwa wa serethe sa gagwe, kgoši ya banna ba Sikeme; ngwana wa gago;" 
Judges9:19 Ge e ba o dirile ka nnete le ka potego le Jerubaali le lapa la gagwe lehono, gona thabeleng Abimeleke, le yena a thabe ka wena." 
Judges9:20 Eupša ge e ba go se bjalo, anke mollo o tšwe Abimeleke, o fiše banna ba Sikeme le ba ntlo ya Milo. Mollo wa tšwa go banna ba Sikeme le ba ntlong ya Milo, wa fiša Abimeleke." 
Judges9:21 Jothame a tšhaba, a tšhaba, a ya Bere, a dula moo, ka baka la go boifa Abimeleke ngwanabo." 
Judges9:22 Ge Abimeleke a bušitše Isiraele ka nywaga e meraro. 
Judges9:23 Modimo a roma moya o mobe magareng ga Abimeleke le banna ba Sikeme; banna ba Sikeme ba dira Abimeleke ka boradia. 
Judges9:24 Gore sehlogo seo se dirilwego go barwa ba Jerubi-baali ba masomešupa, madi a bona a wele Abimeleke ngwanabo bona yo a ba bolailego. Le mabapi le banna ba Sikeme bao ba mo thušitšego go bolaya bana babo." 
Judges9:25 Banna ba Sikeme ba mo lalela ditlhoreng tša dithaba, ba hula bohle bao ba bego ba sepela ka tsela yeo." 
Judges9:26 Gaale morwa wa Ebede a tla le bana babo, a tshelela Sikeme." 
Judges9:27 Ba ya tšhemong, ba kgoboketša dirapa tša bona tša merara, ba gatakela morara, ba thaba, ba tsena ntlong ya modimo wa bona, ba ja, ba nwa, ba roga Abimeleke." 
Judges9:28 Ge a re’alo Gaale morwa wa Ebede a re: “Abimeleke ke mang, gomme Sikeme ke mang yo re swanetšego go mo hlankela? Na ga se morwa wa Jerubaali? le Sebule mohlanka wa gagwe? hlankela banna ba Hamoro tatago Sikeme, gobane re swanetše go mo direla eng?" 
Judges9:29 Ge nkabe Modimo a ka gafela naga ye seatleng sa ka! ka tloša Abimeleke. Ke moka a re go Abimeleke: “Oketša madira a gago o tšwe. 
Judges9:30 Ge Sebule mmuši wa motse a ekwa mantšu a Gaele morwa wa Ebede, a tuka bogale." 
Judges9:31 A roma baromiwa go Abimeleke ka sephiring, a re: “Bona, Gaale morwa wa Ebede le bana babo ba tlile Sikeme; ba tiiša motse go wona." 
Judges9:32 Bjale wena le setšhaba seo se nago le wena, tsoga bošego, le robale, le diše naga." 
Judges9:33 Mesong, ge letšatši le hlaba, tsoga e sa le ka pela o phatša motse; gomme, bona, ge yena le banna bao ba nago le yena ba etšwa go lwa le wena, gona o ka swaragana le bona ka mehla ka mo o ka hwetšago sebaka." 
Judges9:34 Abimeleke a tsoga le batho ka moka bao ba bego ba na le yena bošego, ba lalela Sikeme ka dihlopha tše nne." 
Judges9:35 Gaale morwa wa Ebede a tšwa a ema mojakong wa kgoro. 
Judges9:36 Ge Gaale a bona setšhaba, a re go Sebule: “Bona, batho ba etšwa ditlhoreng tša dithaba.” Sebule a re go yena: “O bona moriti wa dithaba bjalo ka ge eka ke batho.”" 
Judges9:37 Gaele a bolela gape a re: “Bonang batho ba theoga gare ga naga, gomme sehlopha se sengwe se tla seleteng sa Meoneme." 
Judges9:38 Ke moka Sebule a re go yena: “Bjale o kae molomo wa gago wo o boletšego ka wona gore: ‘Abimeleke ke mang, gore re mo hlankele? Na e be e se batho bao o bego o ba nyatša? Hle, tšwela ka ntle bjale gomme o ba lwe." 
Judges9:39 Gaale a tšwa pele ga banna ba Sikeme, a lwa le Abimeleke." 
Judges9:40 Abimeleke a mo kitimiša, a tšhaba pele ga gagwe;" 
Judges9:41 Abimeleke a dula Arume, gomme Sebule a raka Gaale le bana babo, moo ba se ke ba dula Shekeme." 
Judges9:42 Ka letšatši le le latelago, setšhaba sa tšwa nageng. Ba botša Abimeleke." 
Judges9:43 A tšea banna bao a ba arola ka dihlopha tše tharo, a mo robatša tšhemong, a lebelela, a bona banna bao ba etšwa motseng. A ba tsogela, a ba fenya." 
Judges9:44 Abimeleke le sehlopha seo se bego se na le yena, ba kitimela, ba ema mojakong wa kgoro ya motse. Dihlopha tše dingwe tše pedi tša kitimela batho ka moka bao ba bego ba le motseng, tša ba bolaya." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleke a lwa le motse letšatši ka moka. A tšea motse, a bolaya batho bao ba bego ba le go wona, a senya motse, a o bjala letswai." 
Judges9:46 Ge banna ka moka ba tora ya Sikeme ba ekwa ka seo, ba tsena ka lefelong la go swara ntlo ya modimo Berith." 
Judges9:47 Abimeleke a botšwa gore banna ka moka ba tora ya Sikeme ba kgobokane. 
Judges9:48 Abimeleke a mo rotogela thabeng ya Tsalamone, yena le batho ka moka bao ba bego ba na le yena; Abimeleke a tšea selepe ka seatleng sa gagwe, a rema lekala la mohlare, a le bea legetleng la gagwe; dira kamoo ke dirilego ka gona." 
Judges9:49 Ka mo go swanago setšhaba ka moka sa rema makala ka moka, sa latela Abimeleke, sa a bea ka gare ga mašoba a dithabeng, sa fiša mašoba a dithabeng. Mo e lego gore banna ka moka ba tora ya Sikeme le bona ba hwa, banna le basadi ba ka bago 1 000." 
Judges9:50 Abimeleke a ya Thebe, a hloma mešaša kgahlanong le Thebe, a e thopa." 
Judges9:51 Eupša go be go na le tora e tiilego ka gare ga motse, gomme banna le basadi ka moka le batho ka moka ba motse ba tšhabela moo, ba e tswalela, ba ba rotogela lebotong la tora." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleke a fihla toreng, a e lwantšha, a ya mojakong wa tora ka thata gore a e fiše ka mollo." 
Judges9:53 Mosadi yo mongwe a lahlela seripa sa leswika la tšhilo hlogong ya Abimeleke, gomme ka moka ba mo pšhatla legata." 
Judges9:54 Ke moka a bitša lesogana leo ka lebelo la morwadi wa dibetša tša lona, a re go lona: “Nga tšhoša ya gago o mpolaye, gore banna ba se bolele ka nna: Mosadi o mmolaile.” Gomme lesogana la gagwe la mo kgorometša, gomme a hwa." 
Judges9:55 Ge banna ba Isiraele ba bona gore Abimeleke o hwile, yo mongwe le yo mongwe a tloga lefelong la gagwe." 
Judges9:56 Modimo a bušetša bokgopo bja Abimeleke bjo a bo dirilego tatagwe ka go bolaya bana babo ba masomešupa. 
Judges9:57 Modimo o ile a bušetša bokgopo ka moka bja banna ba Sikeme dihlogo tša bona, gomme gwa tla thogako ya Jothame morwa wa Jerubaali." 
Judges10:1 Ka morago ga Abimeleke, Tola morwa wa Pua, morwa wa Dodo, monna wa Isakara, a tsoga go šireletša Isiraele. A dula Samaria thabeng ya Efuraime." 
Judges10:2 A ahlola Isiraele mengwaga ye masomepedi-tharo, ka morago a hwa gomme a bolokwa Samaria." 
Judges10:3 Ka morago ga gagwe a tla Jaire wa Mogileada, a buša Isiraele ka nywaga e masomepedi-pedi." 
Judges10:4 O be a na le barwa ba masometharo bao ba namego dipokolo tše masometharo, ba na le metse ye masometharo, yeo e bitšwago Havothe-jaire go fihla le lehono, yeo e lego nageng ya Gileade." 
Judges10:5 Jaire a hwa, a bolokwa kua Kamone." 
Judges10:6 Bana ba Isiraele ba boela ba dira tše mpe mahlong a Jehofa, ba hlankela Baali, Ashtarothe le medimo ya Siria le ya Basidone le ya Moaba le ya Baamoni le ya Baamoni le ya Baamoni bana ba Amoni. Medimo ya Bafilisita e lahlile Morena, ya se mo hlankele." 
Judges10:7 Kgalefo ya Jehofa ya tuka Isiraele, a ba rekišetša diatleng tša Bafilisita le diatleng tša bana ba Amoni." 
Judges10:8 Ngwageng woo ba tshwenya le go gatelela bana ba Isiraele, ka nywaga e lesomeseswai, bana ba Isiraele ka moka bao ba bego ba le ka mošola wa Jorodane nageng ya Baamore yeo e lego Gileade." 
Judges10:9 Go feta moo, bana ba Amoni ba tshela noka ya Jorodane go yo lwa le Juda le Benjamini le ntlo ya Efuraime; moo Isiraele a ilego a tlalelwa kudu." 
Judges10:10 Bana ba Isiraele ba goeletša Jehofa ba re: “Re go senyetše, ka gobane re tlogetše Modimo wa rena gomme ra hlankela le Baali.”" 
Judges10:11 Jehofa a re go bana ba Isiraele: “Na ga se ka le hlakodiša diatleng tša Baegipita le diatleng tša Baamore le diatleng tša Baamoni le tša Bafilistines? 
Judges10:12 Basidone le Baamaleke le bana ba Amoni ba le gateletše; o tla Nkgoeletša, gomme ke tla go hlakodiša diatleng tša bona." 
Judges10:13 Eupša lena le ntlogetše, la hlankela medimo e mengwe; ka fao, nka se sa go phološa." 
Judges10:14 Sepela o bitše medimo yeo o e kgethilego; a ba go phološe nakong ya masetlapelo a gago. 
Judges10:15 Bana ba Isiraele ba re go Jehofa: “Re paletšwe; Re lokolle lehono fela, re a rapela." 
Judges10:16 Ba tloša medimo e šele gare ga bona, ba hlankela Jehofa; moya wa gagwe wa nyamišwa ke go fedišwa ga Isiraele." 
Judges10:17 Bana ba Amoni ba kgobokana, ba hloma mešaša Gileade. Bana ba Isiraele ba kgobokana kua Mitsipa;" 
Judges10:18 Batho le dikgošana tša Gileade ba boledišana: “Ke motho ofe yo a tlago go lwa le bana ba Amoni?” e tla ba hlogo ya badudi ka moka ba Gileade. 
Judges11:1 Jafete wa Mogileada e be e le mogale wa sebete, e be e le morwa wa seotswa. Gileade a tswala Jafete." 
Judges11:2 Mosadi yo mongwe wa Gileade a mo belegelwa barwa; Barwa ba mosadi wa gagwe ba gola, ba raka Jafete, ba re go yena: “O se ke wa tšea bohwa lapeng la tatago rena; gobane ke morwa wa mosadi o šele." 
Judges11:3 Ke moka Jafete a tšhaba bana babo, a dula nageng ya Tobe. Banna ba lefeela ba kgobokana kua Jafete, ba tšwa le yena." 
Judges11:4 Mafelelong bana ba Amoni ba thoma go lwa le Isiraele. 
Judges11:5 Ya re ge bana ba Amoni ba lwa le Isiraele, bagolo ba Gileada ba ya go tšea Jafete nageng ya Tobo." 
Judges11:6 Ba re go Jafethe: “Etla o be molaodi wa rena, re lwe le bana ba Amoni.”" 
Judges11:7 Jafete a re go bagolo ba Gileade: “Na le ntlhoile, la nrakelela lapeng la tate? gomme o tle go Nna bjale, ge o le mathateng?" 
Judges11:8 Bagolo ba Gileade ba re go Jafete: “Ka gona bjale re boela go wena, gore o sepele le rena, o lwe le bana ba Amoni, o be hlogo ya rena godimo ga badudi ka moka ba Gileade.”" 
Judges11:9 Jafete a re go bagolo ba Gileada: “Ge le ka bušetša gae go yo lwa le bana ba Amoni gomme Jehofa a ba lokolla pele ga ka, na ke tla ba hlogo ya lena?" 
Judges11:10 Bagolo ba Gileada ba re go Jafete: “Morena e be hlatse magareng ga rena, ge re sa dire bjalo ka mantšu a gago.”" 
Judges11:11 Ke moka Jafete a sepela le bagolo ba Gileade, gomme setšhaba sa mo bea hlogo le molaodi wa bona; Jafete a bolela mantšu a gagwe ka moka pele ga Jehofa kua Mitsipa." 
Judges11:12 Jefeta a roma baromiwa go kgoši ya bana ba Amoni, a re: “O na le taba efe le nna, ge o tlile go lwa le nna nageng ya gešo?" 
Judges11:13 Kgoši ya bana ba Amoni ya fetola baromiwa ba Jafete: “Ka gobane Isiraele e tšere naga ya ka ge ba be ba rotoga Egipita, go tloga Arnone go fihla Jaboko le Jorodane. Bjale bušetša ditšhaba tšeo khutšong." 
Judges11:14 Jafete a roma baromiwa gape go kgoši ya bana ba Amoni; 
Judges11:15 A re go yena: “Se ke seo Jafethe a se boletšego: “Isiraele ga se ya tšea naga ya Moaba le naga ya bana ba Amoni. 
Judges11:16 Eupša ge Isiraele ba rotoga Egipita, ba phatša lešokeng ba fihla lewatleng la Shefe, ba fihla Kadeshe;" 
Judges11:17 Ke moka Isiraele ya roma baromiwa go kgoši ya Edomo, ba re: “Ke kgopela gore ke fete nageng ya gago; Ka mokgwa wo o swanago ba romela kgoši ya Moaba; Bana ba Isiraele ba dula Kadeshe." 
Judges11:18 Ke moka ba phatša lešoka, ba dikanetša naga ya Edomo le naga ya Moaba, ba fihla ka bohlabela bja naga ya Moaba, ba hloma mešaša ka mošola wa Arnone, eupša ba se tsene mollwaneng wa Moaba. Gobane Arnone e be e le mollwane wa Moaba." 
Judges11:19 Isiraele ya roma baromiwa go Sihone kgoši ya Baamore, kgoši ya Heshibone. Isiraele a re go yena: “A re fete nageng ya gago, re tla boela lefelong la rena.”" 
Judges11:20 Eupša Sihone ga se a ka a bota Isiraele gore e fete mollwaneng wa gagwe, eupša Sihone a kgoboketša setšhaba sa gagwe ka moka, a hloma mešaša kua Jahase, a lwa le Isiraele." 
Judges11:21 Jehofa Modimo wa Isiraele a gafela Sihone le setšhaba sa gagwe ka moka diatleng tša Isiraele, gomme ba ba fenya; Isiraele ya fenya naga ka moka ya Baamore, badudi ba naga yeo." 
Judges11:22 Ba hlasela naga ka moka ya Baamore, go tloga Arnone go fihla Jaboko, le go tloga lešokeng go fihla Jorodane." 
Judges11:23 Bjale Jehofa Modimo wa Isiraele o rakile Baamore pele ga setšhaba sa gagwe sa Isiraele, gomme na o swanetše go ba rua?" 
Judges11:24 Na o ka se hwetše bohwa seo Camus modimo wa gago a go fago sona gore o se abe bohwa? Mang le mang yo Jehofa Modimo wa rena a tlago go ba raka pele ga rena, re tla ba rua." 
Judges11:25 Bjale na o phala Balaka morwa wa Tsipora kgoši ya Moaba? Na o kile wa lwa le Baisraele, goba na o kile wa lwa le bona?" 
Judges11:26 Ge Isiraele e be e dutše Heshibone le metse ya yona, le Aroere le metse ya yona le metseng ka moka yeo e lego kgauswi le mabopong a Arnone, e be e le nywaga e makgolo a mararo? bjale ke ka lebaka la eng o se wa di bušetša morago ka nako yeo?" 
Judges11:27 Ka gona ga se ka go senyetša, eupša o ntira bobe ka go lwa le nna; Jehofa, Moahlodi, o tla ahlola lehono magareng ga bana ba Isiraele le bana ba Amoni." 
Judges11:28 Eupša kgoši ya bana ba Amoni ga se ya theetša mantšu a Jafete kgoši ya Baamoni. 
Judges11:29 Moya wa Jehofa wa wela Jafete, a phatša Gileade le Manase, a phatša Mitsipe ya Gileada gomme go tloga Mitsipe ya Gileada a tshelela go bana ba Amoni." 
Judges11:30 Jafete a ena ka keno go Jehofa, a re: “Ge e ba o ka gafela bana ba Amoni diatleng tša ka;" 
Judges11:31 Se sengwe le se sengwe seo se tšwago ka mejako ya ntlo ya ka se tla ntlhasela, go fihlela ke boa ka khutšo go bana ba Amoni;" 
Judges11:32 Jafete a tshelela go bana ba Amoni go yo lwa le bona; Jehofa a di gafela diatleng tša gagwe. 
Judges11:33 A ba bolaya go tloga Aroere go fihla Minite, metse e masomepedi le lešokeng la dirapa tša merara, ka polao e kgolo. Ka tsela yeo Baamone ba ile ba fenywa pele ga Baisiraele." 
Judges11:34 Ge Jafete a fihla Mitsipe, a bona morwedi wa gagwe a etšwa go mo gahlanetša a rwele dikoša le ka metantsho. Mme e be e le ngwana wa gagwe a nnoši; gomme o be a se na morwa goba morwedi." 
Judges11:35 Ge a mmona, a gagola diaparo tša gagwe, a re: “Go madimabe, morwedi wa ka! O nkokobeditše kudu, gomme o yo mongwe wa bao ba ntšhošago, ka gobane ke buletše Morena molomo wa ka, gomme nka se boele morago." 
Judges11:36 Mosadi a re go yena: “Tate, ge e ba o buletše Jehofa molomo wa gago, o ntire ka mo o tšwago molomong wa gago; gobane Jehofa o le lefeletša ka ditiro tša lena, lena bana ba Amoni." 
Judges11:37 A re go tatagwe: “A nke go dirwe taba ye, ke tlogele dikgwedi tše pedi, gore ke rotoge le go theoga dithabeng, ke llele bokgarebe bja ka, nna le magagešo.”" 
Judges11:38 A re go bona: “Sepela.” A mo fa dikgwedi tše pedi tša maikhutšo, gomme a sepela le bagwera ba gagwe, ba lla bokgarebe bja gagwe dithabeng." 
Judges11:39 Ya re ge dikgwedi tše pedi di fedile, a boela go tatagwe, a phethagatša keno ya gagwe yeo a e ennego. Gomme o be a sa tsebe motho. Ya ba mokgwa wa Israele," 
Judges11:40 Barwedi ba Isiraele ba be ba e-ya ngwaga le ngwaga go yo llela morwedi wa Jafete wa Mogileada matšatši a mane ka ngwaga. 
Judges12:1 Banna ba Efuraime ba kgobokana, ba ya ka leboa, ba re go Jafethe: “Ke ka baka la’ng o ile wa phatša go lwa le bana ba Amoni gore o rotogele bana ba Amoni, moo o ilego wa re bitša gore re sepele le wena?” re tla fiša ntlo ya gago ka mollo." 
Judges12:2 Jafete a re go bona: “Nna le setšhaba sa ka re be re ngangišana kudu le bana ba Amoni; mme ge ke bitša, wa ntakolla diatleng tša bona." 
Judges12:3 Ge ke bona gore o ka se mphološe, ka bea bophelo bja ka ka seatleng sa ka, ka tshelela bana ba Amoni, Jehofa a ba gafela diatleng tša ka; ke ka baka leo o tlilego go nna lehono go tlo lwa. NNA?" 
Judges12:4 Ke moka Jefeta a kgobokanya banna ka moka ba Gileada, a lwa le Efuraime; banna ba Gileade ba otla Efuraime, ka gobane ba be ba re: “Le batšhabi ba Efuraime gare ga Baefuraime le gare ga Bamanase, lena banna ba Gileada.”" 
Judges12:5 Ba-Gileada ba thopa Noka ya Jorodane pele ga bana ba Efuraime, gomme bafaladi ba Efuraime ba re: “E re ke tshele; Banna ba Gileada ba re ho yena: “Na o Moefraimi?” Ge a ka re: Ee!" 
Judges12:6 Ke moka ba re go yena: “Bolela Shibolethe, gobane ga a kgone go go bolela gabotse.” Ke moka ba mo tšea ba mmolaya nokeng ya Jorodane, ka nako yeo e be e le ba-Efuraime ba 42 000." 
Judges12:7 Jefeta a ahlola Isiraele ka nywaga e tshela. Ke moka Jafete wa Mogileada a hwa, a bolokwa go o mongwe wa metse ya Gileada." 
Judges12:8 Ka morago ga gagwe Ibsana wa Betlelehema a ahlola Isiraele. 
Judges12:9 A ba le barwa ba masometharo le barwedi ba masometharo, bao a ilego a ba romela ka ntle gomme a amogela barwa ba gagwe barwedi ba masometharo go tšwa dinageng dišele. Ke moka a etelela pele Isiraele ka nywaga e šupago." 
Judges12:10 Ke moka Ibsane a hwa gomme a bolokwa kua Betlelehema. 
Judges12:11 Ka morago ga gagwe Elone Mosebulone a etelela pele Isiraele; a buša Isiraele ka nywaga e lesome. 
Judges12:12 Elone wa Mosebulone a hwa, a bolokwa kua Ajalone nageng ya Sebulone." 
Judges12:13 Ka morago ga gagwe Abdone morwa wa Hilele wa Pirathoni a ahlola Isiraele. 
Judges12:14 O be a na le barwa ba masomenne le ditlogolo tše masometharo bao ba bego ba nametše dipokolo tša dipokolo tše masomeseswai; a ahlola Isiraele ka nywaga e seswai. 
Judges12:15 Abedone morwa wa Hilele wa Mopirathone a hwa, a bolokwa kua Pirathone nageng ya Efuraime, thabeng ya Baamaleke." 
Judges13:1 Bana ba Isiraele ba boela ba dira bobe mahlong a Jehofa; Jehofa a ba gafela diatleng tša Bafilisita ka nywaga e masome a mane. 
Judges13:2 Bjale gwa ba le monna yo mongwe wa Tsora, wa lapa la Badani, yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Manoa; mosadi wa gagwe e be e le moopa, a se na peu." 
Judges13:3 Morongwa wa Jehofa a iponagatša go mosadi, a re go yena: “Bona bjale, o moopa, ga o belege;" 
Judges13:4 Bjale, ke a le hlokomele, le se ke la nwa beine goba seno se se tagago gomme le se ke la ja selo le ge e le sefe se se sa hlwekago." 
Judges13:5 Gobane bona, o tla ima, a belega morwa; gobane ngwana e tla ba Monatsare go Modimo go tloga popelong; o tla thoma go phološa Isiraele diatleng tša Bafilisita." 
Judges13:6 Mosadi a tla a botša monna wa gagwe, a re: Monna wa Modimo o tlile go nna, sefahlego sa gagwe se be se swana le sefahlego sa morongwa wa Modimo, se se šiišago kudu; eupša ga se ka mmotšiša gore o tšwa kae, e bile ga se a ka a mpotša leina la gagwe." 
Judges13:7 Eupša yena a re go nna: “Bona, o tla ima, wa belega morwa; bjale, le se ke la nwa beine goba seno se se tagago, le se ke la ja selo se se sa hlwekago; gobane ngwana e tla ba Monatsare wa Modimo go tloga ka popelong go fihla letšatšing la lehu la gagwe." 
Judges13:8 Manoa a lopa Jehofa a re: “Morena wa ka, monna wa Modimo yo o mo romilego a boele go rena, a re rute seo re tlago go se dira ngwana yo a tlago go belegwa.”" 
Judges13:9 Modimo a theetša lentšu la Manoa; morongwa wa Modimo a boela go mosadi yoo a dutše tšhemong, eupša Manoa monna wa gagwe a se na yena." 
Judges13:10 Mosadi a akgofela, a kitimela, a botša monna wa gagwe, a re go yena: “Bona, monna yo a iponagaditšego go nna yo a tlilego go nna letšatšing le lengwe.”" 
Judges13:11 Manoa a tsoga, a latela mosadi wa gagwe, a tla go monna yoo a re go yena: “Na ke wena monna yo a boletšego le mosadi?” A re: Ke nna." 
Judges13:12 Manoa a re: “Bjale anke mantšu a gago a phethagale.” Re tlo ruta ngwana bjang, gona re tlo dira eng ka yena?" 
Judges13:13 Morongwa wa Jehofa a re go Manoa: “Mo go tšohle tšeo ke di boditšego mosadi yoo a a hlokomele.” 
Judges13:14 A se ke a ja morara le ge e le ofe, a se ke a nwa beine goba seno se se tagago goba a ja selo le ge e le sefe se se sa hlwekago; tšohle tše ke mo laetšego tšona, a di boloke." 
Judges13:15 Manoa a re go morongwa wa Jehofa: “A re go golege go fihlela re go lokišetša potsanyane.” 
Judges13:16 Morongwa wa Jehofa a re go Manoa: “Le ge o ka ntshwara, nka se je bogobe bja gago; ge e ba o rata go neela sebego sa go fišwa, se dirišetše Jehofa. Gobane Manoa o be a sa tsebe gore ke morongwa wa Jehofa." 
Judges13:17 Manoa a re go morongwa wa Jehofa: “Leina la gago ke mang, gore ge mantšu a gago a phethagala re go hlomphe?" 
Judges13:18 Morongwa wa Jehofa a re go yena: “Ke ka baka la’ng o kgopela leina la ka ka tsela ye, o bona e le sephiri?" 
Judges13:19 Ka gona Manoa a tšea potsanyane yeo le sehlabelo sa go fišwa, a e direla Jehofa leswikeng. Gomme Manoa le mosadi wa gagwe ba lebelela." 
Judges13:20 Ya re ge kgabo e rotogela legodimong e le aletareng, morongwa wa Jehofa a rotoga ka kgabo ya aletare. Manoa le mosadi wa gagwe ba e lebelela gomme ba wela fase ka difahlego." 
Judges13:21 Eupša morongwa wa Jehofa ga se a hlwa a iponagatša go Manoa le mosadi wa gagwe. Manoa a tseba gore ke morongwa wa Morena. 
Judges13:22 Manoa a re go mosadi wa gagwe: “Ruri re tla hwa ka gobane re bone Modimo.” 
Judges13:23 Eupša mosadi wa gagwe a re go yena: Ge nkabe Jehofa a be a nyaka go re bolaya, nkabe a se a amogela sehlabelo sa go fišwa le sehlabelo sa go fišwa diatleng tša rena, e bile a ka se re dumelele go bona tše ka moka, go etša ge go le bjalo lehono. Ga se ra bolela dilo tša go swana le tše." 
Judges13:24 Mosadi a belega morwa, a mo rea leina la Simisone, ngwana a gola, Jehofa a mo šegofatša. Ngwana a gola, Morena a mo šegofatša." 
Judges13:25 Moya wa Jehofa wa thoma go šoma godimo ga gagwe mešašeng ya Dani magareng ga Tsora le Eshitaolo. 
Judges14:1 Simisone a theogela Timnathe, a bona mosadi wa barwedi ba Bafilisita kua Timnathe." 
Judges14:2 A rotoga a botša tatagwe le mmagwe a re: “Ke bone mosadi yo mongwe kua Timnathe wa barwedi ba Bafilisita. Gomme bjale mo tšee gore e be mosadi wa ka. 
Judges14:3 Ke moka tatagwe le mmagwe ba re go yena: “Na ga go na mosadi gare ga barwedi ba bana beno goba gare ga setšhaba sa ka ka moka, yo o ka yago go tšea mosadi go Bafilisita? Simisone a re go tatagwe: “Mo tšee; gobane ke yena yo a nthabišago." 
Judges14:4 Eupša tatagwe le mmagwe ba be ba sa tsebe gore e be e le go Jehofa moo a bego a nyaka nako ya go lwantšha Bafilisita, ka gobane ka nako yeo Bafilisita ba be ba buša Isiraele." 
Judges14:5 Ke moka Simisone le tatagwe le mmagwe ba theogela Timnathe, ba fihla dirapeng tša merara tša Timina." 
Judges14:6 Moya wa Jehofa wa mo wela ka matla, a mo ja bjalo ka ge a be a tla ja potsanyane, a se na selo ka seatleng sa gagwe; eupša ga se a ka a botša tatagwe goba mmagwe seo a se dirilego." 
Judges14:7 A theoga a boledišana le mosadi; a kgahliša Simisone kudu. 
Judges14:8 Ka morago ga lebakanyana a boa a mo swara, a retologa a bona setopo sa tau; gomme, bona, go be go na le sehlopha sa dinose le todi ya dinose mmeleng wa tau." 
Judges14:9 A tšea tše dingwe tša diatla tša gagwe, a tšwela pele a eja, a tla go tatagwe le mmagwe, a di fa, ba ja; eupša o se ke wa ba botša gore o tšere todi ya dinose moleteng wa ditau." 
Judges14:10 Ka gona tatagwe a theogela go mosadi yoo, Simisone a dira monyanya moo; ka gobane masogana a be a dira seo." 
Judges14:11 Ya re ge ba mmona, ba tliša bagwera ba masometharo gore ba dule le yena." 
Judges14:12 Simisone a re go bona: “Bjale e re ke le hlalošetše thae. Ge e ba ruri o ka mpotša se matšatšing a šupago a monyanya, gomme wa se hwetša, ke tla go nea diaparo tše masometharo tša linene le diaparo tše masometharo." 
Judges14:13 Eupša ge e ba o sa kgone go ntlhalosetša seo, gona o tla mpha diaparo tše masometharo le diaparo tše masometharo." 
Judges14:14 A re go bona: “Dijo di tšwa go moja, bose bo tšwa go yo a nago le matla. Gomme ba be ba sa kgone go rarolla sephiri ka matšatši a mararo." 
Judges14:15 Ka letšatši la bošupa ba re go mosadi wa Simisone: “Leka monna wa gago gore a re botše thae, gore re se ke ra go fiša le ntlo ya tatago ka mollo; o re biditše gore re tšee seo re nago le sona? Na ga go bjalo?" 
Judges14:16 Mosadi wa Simisone a lla pele ga gagwe, a re: “O ntlhoile, ga o nthate; O beetše bana ba setšhaba sa gešo seema, eupša ga se wa mpotša. A re go yena: “Bona, ga se nke ka botša tate goba mma ditaba tše;" 
Judges14:17 A lla pele ga gagwe matšatši a šupago, ge monyanya wa bona o be o tšwela pele; ka letšatši la bošupa a mmotše, ka gobane o mo senyetše; a botša barwa ba setšhaba sa gabo sephiri seo." 
Judges14:18 Ka letšatši la bošupa pele letšatši le sobela banna ba motse ba re go yena: “Ke eng se se bose go feta todi ya dinose?” Gomme ke eng seo se fetago tau ka maatla? A re go bona: “Ge nkabe le sa lema ka kgomo ya ka, le ka be le sa hwetše sephiri sa ka." 
Judges14:19 Ke moka moya wa Jehofa wa mo wela, a theogela Ashkelone a bolaya banna ba masometharo ba bona gomme a tšea dithebola gomme a nea diaparo tšeo go bao ba hlalositšego sephiri. Bogale bja gagwe bja tuka, a rotogela ntlong ya tatagwe." 
Judges14:20 Eupša mosadi wa Simisone a newa mogwera wa gagwe yo a bego a mo dirišitše e le mogwera wa gagwe. 
Judges15:1 Eupša ka morago ga lebakanyana, nakong ya puno ya korong, Simisone a etela mosadi wa gagwe a swere potsanyane; A re: Ke tla tsena ka phapošing le mosadi wa ka. Eupša tatagwe o ile a gana go mo dumelela go tsena." 
Judges15:2 Tatagwe a re go yena: “Ke go boditše gore o mo hloile. Ka fao, ke mo file molekane wa gago; Na kgaetšedi ya gagwe ga se ye botse go mo feta? mo tšee legatong la gagwe." 
Judges15:3 Simisone a re mabapi le bona: “Bjale ke tla ba bjalo ka Bafilisita, le ge ke sa ba dire bobe.”" 
Judges15:4 Simisone a ya a swara digwagwa tše makgolo a mararo, a tšea mašoba a mollo, a retološa mosela go ya go mosela, a bea lešoba la mollo gare magareng ga mesela ye mebedi." 
Judges15:5 Ge a tšhumišitše dihlašana ka mollo, a di tlogela di wela godimo ga mabele ao a emego a Bafilisita, a fiša mabele le serapa sa merara le dirapa tša mehlware." 
Judges15:6 Bafilisita ba re: “Ke mang yo a dirilego se? Bona ba fetola ba re: “Simisone morwa wa Timinathe, ka gobane o tšere mosadi wa gagwe a mo neela modirišani wa gagwe.” Bafilisita ba rotoga, ba mo fiša le tatagwe ka mollo." 
Judges15:7 Simisone a re go bona: “Le ge le ka dira se, ke tla le itefeletša, gomme ka morago ga moo ke tla kgaotša.”" 
Judges15:8 A ba bolaya ka polao e kgolo, a theoga a dula leswikeng la Ethame." 
Judges15:9 Ke moka Bafilisita ba rotoga, ba hloma mešaša kua Juda, ba phuhlama kua Lehi." 
Judges15:10 Banna ba Juda ba re: “Ke ka baka la’ng le rotogela go re lwa le rena? Bona ba re: “Re rotogile go tlama Simisone, go mo dira bjalo ka ge a re dirile.”" 
Judges15:11 Ke moka banna ba 3 000 ba Juda ba ya leswikeng la Etame gomme ba re go Simisone: “Na ga o tsebe gore ke ka baka la’ng Bafilisita e le babuši ba rena? o re dirile eng? A re go bona: “Bjalo ka ge ba ntirile, le nna ke ba dirile bjalo.”" 
Judges15:12 Ba re go yena: “Re theogile go tlo go tlema gore re go gafele diatleng tša Bafilisita; Simisone a re go bona: “Nnyatša, le ka se nwe.”" 
Judges15:13 Ba re go yena: “Ee; eupša re tla go tlema, ra go gafela diatleng tša bona; eupša ruri re ka se go bolaye. Ba mo tlema ka dithapo tše pedi tše mpsha, ba mo emišetša godimo go tšwa leswikeng." 
Judges15:14 Ge a fihla Lehi, Bafilisita ba mo goeletša, gomme Moya wa Jehofa wa tla godimo ga gagwe, gomme dithapo tšeo di bego di le matsogong a gagwe tša ba bjalo ka folaxe yeo e fišitšwego ka mollo, le marapo a gagwe ao a robegilego ka mollo wa gagwe diatla." 
Judges15:15 A hwetša lerapo la mohlagare le lefsa la pokolo, a otlolla seatla sa gagwe, a le swara, a bolaya banna ba sekete ka lona." 
Judges15:16 Simisone a re: “Ke bolaile banna ba sekete ka mohlagare wa pokolo, mekgobo godimo ga mekgobo, ka mohlagare wa pokolo ke bolaile banna ba sekete.”" 
Judges15:17 Ya re ge a feditše go bolela, a tloša lerapo la mohlagare seatleng sa gagwe, a bitša lefelo leo Ramatle." 
Judges15:18 A nyorilwe kudu, a bitša Jehofa a re: “O gafetše phološo ye e kgolo seatleng sa mohlanka wa gago." 
Judges15:19 Eupša Modimo a kgaola lešoba kgopong, gomme meetse a tšwa go lona; ge a nwele, moya wa gagwe wa boa, a tsošološa; ka fao re mo reetše leina la En-Hakore, e lego Lehi go fihla le lehono." 
Judges15:20 A tšwela pele a ahlola Isiraele mehleng ya Bafilisita ka nywaga e 20. 
Judges16:1 Simisone a ya Gasa, a bona mogweba-ka-mmele moo." 
Judges16:2 Baeng ba tsebišwa gomme gwa thwe: “Simisone o tlile mo.” Ba mo dikanetša, ba mo letela bošego ka moka kgorong ya motse, ba mo letela bošego ka moka, ba re: Gosasa, mosegare wa sekgalela, re tla mmolaya.”" 
Judges16:3 Simisone a robala moo go fihla bošegogare, a tsoga bošegogare, a tšea mejako ya kgoro ya motse, le dikota tše pedi tša mejako, le dikota tše pedi tša mojako le ka moka ga tšona, a di bea magetleng a gagwe e iše mohlareng. Mmotong wo o lego pele ga Heburone." 
Judges16:4 Ka morago ga moo a ratana le mosadi yo mongwe moeding wa Soreke, yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Delila." 
Judges16:5 Marena a Bafilisita a tla go yena a re go yena: “Mo hlahlobe o bone gore matla a gagwe a magolo a le kae le gore re ka mo fenya ka tsela efe, e le gore re mo fenye re gapeletše go mo gatelela.” Gomme yo mongwe le yo mongwe wa rena re tla go fa diripa tše lesometee tša silifera." 
Judges16:6 Ke moka Delila a re go Simisone: “Mpotše moo matla a gago a magolo a lego gona, le seo o ka tlamago go go tlaiša ka sona." 
Judges16:7 Simisone a re go yena: “Ge ba ka tlama ka dikota tše šupago tše tala tšeo di sa kago tša oma, gona ke tla fokola, ka ba bjalo ka monna yo mongwe.”" 
Judges16:8 Ke moka marena a Bafilisita a mo tlišetša dikota tše šupago tše tala tšeo di bego di se tša omišwa gomme a mo tlema ka tšona. 
Judges16:9 Go be go na le banna bao ba bego ba iphihla gomme ba dula le yena ka phapošing. Yena a re go yena: “Bafilisita a go go hlasele, Simisone.” Ke moka a mo kgaola moriri, bjalo ka ge ditšhila di kgaolwa ge di kgoma mollo. Ka gona matla a gagwe a be a sa tsebje." 
Judges16:10 Ke moka Delila a re go Simisone: “Bona, o nkwera, wa mpotša maaka; mpotše seo o ka tlemilwego go sona." 
Judges16:11 A re go yena: “Ge ba ka tlema ka marapo a mafsa ao a sa kago a aparwa, gona ke tla fokola, ka ba bjalo ka motho yo mongwe.”" 
Judges16:12 Ka gona Delila a tšea dithapo tše difsa a mo tlema ka tšona, a re go yena: “Samsone, Bafilisita ba go hlasela! Gomme go be go na le ba maaka bao ba bego ba dula ka phapošing yeo. Ke moka a di gagola diatleng tša gagwe bjalo ka thapo." 
Judges16:13 Delila a re go Simisone: “Go fihla ga bjale o nkwera, wa mpotša maaka. Mpotše seo o ka tlemilwego go sona. A re go yena: “Ge o ka loga dinotlelo tše šupago tša hlogo ya ka ka lešoba.”" 
Judges16:14 Mosadi a e kgomaretša ka yona, a re go yena: “Simisone, Bafilisita a be go wena.” Ke moka a tsoga borokong bja gagwe, a iphahla ka sepekere sa kota le lešela." 
Judges16:15 Mosadi a re go yena: “O ka re bjang: ‘Ke a go rata, mola pelo ya gago e se na le nna?” O nkgokile gararo, gomme ga se wa mpotša moo maatla a gago a magolo a lego gona." 
Judges16:16 Ya re ge a mo gatelela letšatši le letšatši ka mantšu a gagwe, a mo tlaiša, moo moya wa gagwe o ilego wa tshwenyega go fihla lehung." 
Judges16:17 A mmotša tšohle tšeo di bego di le ka pelong ya gagwe, a re go yena: “Ga se ka go beola hlogo; gobane ke bile Monasara wa Modimo go tloga ka popelong ya mma." 
Judges16:18 Ge Delila a bona gore o mmoditše dipelo tša gagwe ka moka, a roma a bitša marena a Bafilisita a re: “Rotoga gatee, gobane o mpontšhitše dipelo tša gagwe ka moka.” Barena ba Bafilisita ba rotogela go yena, ba tliša tšhelete ka diatleng tša bona." 
Judges16:19 A mo robatša ka matolo; a bitša monna yoo, a beola dinotlelo tše šupago tša hlogo ya gagwe; a thoma go mo gatelela, gomme maatla a gagwe a tloga go yena." 
Judges16:20 Mosadi a re go yena: “Bafilisita ba go hlasele Simisone.” A tsoga borokong bja gagwe gomme a re: Ke tla tšwa bjalo ka pele, ke thothomela. Le gona o be a sa tsebe gore Jehofa o mo tlogetše." 
Judges16:21 Eupša Bafilisita ba mo swara, ba mo ntšha mahlo, ba mo theošetša Gasa, ba mo tlema ka ditlemo tša koporo; gomme a hwa kgolegong." 
Judges16:22 Eupša moriri wa hlogo ya gagwe wa thoma go gola gape ka morago ga ge a beotše. 
Judges16:23 Marena a Bafilisita a ba kgoboketša gore ba direle modimo wa bona Dagone sehlabelo se segolo le go thaba. Ba re: “Modimo wa rena o gafetše lenaba la rena Simisone diatleng tša rena.” 
Judges16:24 Ge setšhaba se mmona, sa reta modimo wa sona, ka gobane se be se re: “Modimo wa rena o gafetše diatleng tša rena lenaba la rena, le mofediši wa naga ya rena, yo a bolailego ba bantši ba rena.”" 
Judges16:25 Ya re ge dipelo tša bona di thabile, ba re: “Bitšeng Simisone gore a re diragatše.” Ka gona ba bitša Simisone ka ntlong ya kgolego; ba mo bea fase magareng ga dikokwane." 
Judges16:26 Simisone a re go mošemane yo a mo swerego ka seatla: “Ntumelele gore ke kwe dikokwane tšeo ntlo e emego godimo ga tšona, gore ke ithekge ka tšona.”" 
Judges16:27 Ntlo e be e tletše ka banna le basadi; marena ka moka a Bafilisita ba be ba le moo; marulelong go be go na le banna le basadi ba dikete tše tharo bao ba bego ba lebelela ge Simisone a dira dipapadi. 
Judges16:28 Simisone a goeletša Jehofa a re: “Ke a go kgopela, Jehofa Modimo, o nkgopole gatee gatee, gore ke tle ke lefeletše Bafilisita ka baka la mahlo a ka a mabedi.”" 
Judges16:29 Simisone a swara dikokwane tše pedi tšeo ntlo e bego e eme godimo ga tšona le tšeo e bego e eme godimo ga tšona, e nngwe ka seatla sa gagwe sa le letona gomme e nngwe ka letsogo la gagwe la nngele." 
Judges16:30 Simisone a re: “E re ke hwe le Bafilisita.” A khunama ka matla a gagwe ka moka; ntlo ya wela marena le batho ka moka bao ba bego ba le go yona. Ka gona bahu bao a ba bolailego lehung la gagwe ba be ba feta bao a ba bolailego bophelong bja gagwe. 
Judges16:31 Ke moka bana babo le ba ntlo ka moka ya tatagwe ba theoga, ba mo tšea ba mo godiša, ba mmoloka magareng ga Tsora le Eshitaole lefelong la poloko la Manoa tatagwe. Ke moka a buša Isiraele ka nywaga e 20." 
Judges17:1 Go be go na le monna wa thabeng ya Efuraime, yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Mika." 
Judges17:2 A re go mmagwe: ‘Dikarolwana tša silifera tše lekgolo le tee tšeo o di tšerwego, tšeo o boletšego thogako ka tšona gomme wa bolela ka tšona ke di kwele, šele silifera e na le nna; Ke ile ka e tšea. Mmagwe o ile a re: Anke Jehofa a go šegofatše morwa wa ka!" 
Judges17:3 Ge a bušetša dišekele tše 1 100 tša silifera go mmagwe, mmagwe o ile a re: “Ke kgethetše silifera yeo e tšwago seatleng sa ka go Jehofa bakeng sa morwa wa ka, gore ke dire seswantšho se se betlilwego le seswantšho se se betlilwego; se go wena." 
Judges17:4 Eupša a bušetša tšhelete yeo go mmagwe; mme mmagwe a tšea dishekele tša silifera tše makgolo a mabedi a di nea modiri yo a di dirilego seswantšho se se betlilwego le seswantšho se se tološitšwego. E be e le ka ntlong ya Mika. 
Judges17:5 Monna yoo Mika o be a na le ntlo ya medimo, a dira efode le diterafime, a kgethagatša yo mongwe wa barwa ba gagwe, e lego moperisita wa gagwe." 
Judges17:6 Mehleng yeo go be go se na kgoši mo Isiraele, yo mongwe le yo mongwe o be a dira se se lokilego mahlong a gagwe." 
Judges17:7 Go be go e-na le lesogana le le tšwago Betlelehema Juda la lapeng la Juda, e bego e le Molefi, gomme a dula moo." 
Judges17:8 Monna yoo a tloga motseng a etšwa Betlelehema Juda go yo dula moo a ka hwetšago lefelo; 
Judges17:9 Mika a re go yena: “O tšwa kae?” A re go yena: “Ke Molefi wa Betlelehema ya Juda, ke ya go dula moo nka hwetšago lefelo.”" 
Judges17:10 Mika a re go yena: “Dula le nna, tatago le moperisita, ke tla go nea dišekele tše lesome tša silifera ka ngwaga, le seaparo sa go apara le dijo tša gago.” Ke moka Molefi a tsena." 
Judges17:11 Molefi a dumela go dula le monna yoo; lesogana leo la ba yo mongwe wa bana ba gagwe go yena. 
Judges17:12 Mika a kgethagatša Molefi; lesogana leo la ba moperisita wa lona, la dula lapeng la Mika." 
Judges17:13 Ke moka Mika a re: “Bjale ke tseba gore Jehofa o tla ntira botse, ka ge ke na le Molefi go moperisita wa ka.”" 
Judges18:1 Mehleng yeo go be go se na kgoši mo Isiraele; gobane go fihla letšatšing leo bohwa bja bona bo be bo se bja wela go bona gare ga meloko ya Isiraele. 
Judges18:2 Barwa ba Dani ba roma go tšwa lapeng la bona banna ba bahlano go tšwa palong ya bona ka moka, banna ba bagale ba go tšwa Tsora le go tšwa Eshitaole, gore ba yo hlola naga le go e hlahloba; ba re go bona: “Sepela le sepele mo lefaseng.”" 
Judges18:3 Ge ba le kgauswi le ntlo ya Mika, ba tseba lentšu la lesogana la Molefi. Ba tsena ba re go yena: “Ke mang yo a go tlišitšego mo?” Gomme o dira eng mo lefelong le? gomme o na le eng moo?" 
Judges18:4 A re go bona: “Mika o ntira ka tsela ye le ka tsela ye, o ntšere gomme ke moperisita wa gagwe.”" 
Judges18:5 Ba re go yena: “Re kgopela Modimo keletšo gore re tsebe ge e ba tsela ya rena yeo re sepelago ka yona e tla atlega.” 
Judges18:6 Moprista a re go bona: “Eyang ka khutšo pele ga Jehofa mo le yago gona.” 
Judges18:7 Banna ba bahlano ba tloga, ba fihla Laishe, ba bona batho bao ba bego ba le go yona, ba dula ba sa šetše ka mokgwa wa Basidone, ba homotše e bile ba šireletšegile. Gomme go be go se na peu ya mosetareta nageng ya ka yeo e ilego ya ba nyamiša tabeng efe goba efe; ba be ba le kgole le Basidone, ba se ba kopana le motho le ge e le ofe." 
Judges18:8 Ba tla go bana babo bona Tsora le Eshitaolo, bana babo bona ba re go bona: “Le reng?" 
Judges18:9 Bona ba re: “Ema re rotogele go ba lwantšha; ka gobane re bone naga, gomme, bona, e botse kudu. Gomme na o sa le gona? le se ke la diega go tsena gomme la ja bohwa bja naga." 
Judges18:10 Ge le sepela, le tla fihla nageng e šireletšegilego le nageng e kgolo, gobane Modimo o e gafetše diatleng tša lena. Lefelo leo go se nago selo lefaseng." 
Judges18:11 Go tšwa lapeng la Badani, banna ba makgolo a tshelelago ba itlhamile ka dibetša tša ntwa, ba tšwa Tsora le go tšwa Eshitaole." 
Judges18:12 Ba rotoga ba hloma mešaša kua Kiriathe-jearime kua Juda; ka baka leo ba bitša lefelo leo gore ke Mahanehadan go fihla le lehono; gomme bona, e ka morago ga Kiriathe-Jearime." 
Judges18:13 Ba tloga moo ba ya thabeng ya Efuraime, ba fihla ntlong ya Mika." 
Judges18:14 Ke moka banna ba bahlano bao ba ilego go hlola naga ya Laishe ba araba, ba re go bana babo bona: “Na le a tseba gore go na le seswantšho se se betlilwego le seswantšho se se tološitšwego ka dintlong tše?” bjale, ela hloko seo o swanetšego go se dira." 
Judges18:15 Ba retologa moo, ba tla ntlong ya Molefi yo monyenyane, ntlong ya Mika, ba mo dumediša." 
Judges18:16 Banna ba makgolo a tshelelago bao ba kgethilwego ka dibetša tša ntwa, bao e bego e le ba bana ba Dani, ba ema kgauswi le mojako wa kgoro." 
Judges18:17 Banna ba bahlano bao ba bego ba ile go hlola naga ba rotoga, ba tsena, ba tšea seswantšho se se betlilwego, le efode, le diterafima, le seswantšho se se tološitšwego. Moperisita a ema mojakong wa kgoro le banna ba makgolo a tshelelago bao ba itlhamilego ka dibetša tša ntwa." 
Judges18:18 Ba tsena ka ntlong ya Mika, ba tšea seswantšho se se betlilwego, le efode, le diterafi, le seswantšho se se tološitšwego. Moperisita a re go bona: “Le dira eng?”" 
Judges18:19 Ba re go yena: “Homola, bea seatla sa gago molomong wa gago, o sepele le rena, o be tate le moperisita go rena; Na go kaone gore o be moperisita wa ntlo ya monna o tee, goba o be moprista wa moloko le lapa la Isiraele?" 
Judges18:20 Pelo ya moperisita ya thaba, a tšea efode, le diterafi, le seswantšho se se betlilwego, a ya gare ga setšhaba." 
Judges18:21 Ka gona ba retologa ba tloga gomme ba bea bana ba banyenyane le dikgomo le dikoloi tša ntwa pele ga bona. 
Judges18:22 Ge ba be ba le kgole le ntlo ya Mika, banna bao ba bego ba le ka dintlong tša kgauswi le ntlo ya Mika ba kgobokana gomme ba hwetša bana ba Dani." 
Judges18:23 Ba bitša bana ba Dani. Ba retološa difahlego tša bona, ba re go Mika: “Ke eng seo o tlago go tla le sehlopha se se bjalo?" 
Judges18:24 A re: “O tšere medimo ya ka yeo ke e dirilego le moperisita, a sepetše. Gomme ke eng se sengwe seo ke nago le sona? gomme a re go nna: Bothata bja gago ke bofe?" 
Judges18:25 Bana ba Dani ba re go yena: “Lentšu la gago le se ke la kwewa gare ga rena, gore batho ba ba galefilego ba se ke ba kitima go wena, wa lahlegelwa ke bophelo bja gago le maphelo a ba lapa la gago.”" 
Judges18:26 Ge bana ba Dani ba sepela, Mika a bona gore ba mo kgole kudu, a retologa a boela ntlong ya gagwe." 
Judges18:27 Ba tšea dithoto tšeo Mika a di dirilego le moperisita yo a bego a na le yena, ba tla Laishe, e lego setšhaba se se homotšego le se se šireletšegilego. Ba ba bolaya ka bogale bja tšhoša, ba tšhuma motse ka mollo." 
Judges18:28 Go be go se na mophološi, ka gobane e be e le kgole le Tsidone, gomme go be go se na kopano le motho; e be e le moeding wa kgauswi le Bethe-rehobe. Ke moka ba aga motse ba dula go wona." 
Judges18:29 Motse woo ba rewa leina la Dani, ka leina la Dani tatago bona, yo a belegetšwego Isiraele; eupša leina la motse pele e be e le Laishe." 
Judges18:30 Bana ba Dani ba hloma seswantšho se se betlilwego, gomme Jonathane morwa wa Geresomo morwa wa Manase e be e le moperisita wa moloko wa Badan go fihla letšatšing la go thopša ga naga." 
Judges18:31 Ba ba hloma seswantšho se se betlilwego sa Mika seo a se dirilego matšatši ka moka a ntlo ya Modimo kua Shilo. 
Judges19:1 Mehleng yeo ge go be go se na kgoši Isiraeleng, Molefi yo mongwe yo a bego a dula thabeng ya Efuraime, yo a ilego a mo tšea serethe sa Betlelehema sa Juda." 
Judges19:2 Mosadi wa gagwe wa serethe a mo dira seotswa, a tloga go yena a ya ntlong ya tatagwe kua Betlelehema Juda, a dula moo dikgwedi tše nne tše di feletšego." 
Judges19:3 Monna wa gagwe a tsoga, a mo šala morago, a bolela le yena ka botho, a mo bušetše le mohlanka wa gagwe le dipokolo tša gagwe; a mo tliša ntlong ya tatagwe, gomme tatago kgarebe a mmona, a thabela go mo gahlanetša." 
Judges19:4 Motswala wa gagwe, tatago kgarebe, a mo diša; a dula le yena matšatši a mararo; ba ja, ba nwa, ba robala moo bošego ka moka." 
Judges19:5 Ka letšatši la bone ge ba tsoga e sa le mesong, a tsoga gore a tloge;" 
Judges19:6 Ka gona ba dula fase, ba ja le go nwa mmogo, ka gobane tatago kgarebe o be a boletše go monna yoo: “Ke a kgotsofala, o dule bošego ka moka, pelo ya gago e thabe.”" 
Judges19:7 Ge monna yoo a tsoga gore a tloge, mmatswale wa gagwe a mo kgothatša; ka fao, o ile a robala moo gape." 
Judges19:8 A tsoga e sa le ka pela mesong ka letšatši la bohlano gore a tloge; Tatago ngwanenyana a re: Khomotša pelo ya gago. Ke moka ba dula go fihla mosegare wa sekgalela, gomme bobedi bja bona ba ja." 
Judges19:9 Ge monna yoo a tsoga gore a tloge, yena le mohlanka wa gagwe le mohlanka wa gagwe, serethe sa gagwe, tatago morwa wa gagwe, ba re go yena: “Bona! dula mo go fihlela letšatši le sobela, pelo ya gago e thabe; gomme o tloga gosasa a ya gae." 
Judges19:10 Eupša monna yoo ga se a ka a dula bošegong bjoo, eupša a tsoga a tloga, a tshela Jebuse, e lego Jerusalema. E ile ya tlatša makhura didisele tše pedi; serethe sa gagwe se be se na le yena." 
Judges19:11 Ge ba fihla Jebuse, letšatši le be le sobela; mohlanka a re go mong wa gagwe: “Tla, a re retologeleng motseng wo wa Bajebuse, re robale go wona.”" 
Judges19:12 Mong wa gagwe a re go yena: “Re ka se ke ra fapogela motseng wa mošele yo e sego wa bana ba Isiraele; re tla rotogela Gibea. 
Judges19:13 A re go mohlanka wa gagwe: “Tloo, re batamele go le lengwe la mafelo a gore re robale bošego ka moka, Gibea goba Rama.”" 
Judges19:14 Ba sepela ka tsela ya bona; letšatši la ba sobela kua Gibea kua Benjamini. 
Judges19:15 Ka gona ba retologa moo gore ba tsene Gibea gomme ba robale moo; ge a tsena, a mo dudiša setarateng sa motse; gobane go be go se na motho aa yo a ba išago ntlong ya gagwe go yo robala." 
Judges19:16 Mokgalabje yo mongwe yo a bego a etšwa tšhemong mantšiboa a etšwa modirong wa gagwe. O be a tlile Gibea e le mofaladi, eupša banna ba lefelong leo e be e le ba moloko wa Benjamini." 
Judges19:17 Ge a emišitše mahlo, a bona monna yo a sepelago setarateng sa motse; gomme mokgalabje a re: O ya kae? gomme o tšwa kae?" 
Judges19:18 A re go yena: “Re tloga Betlelehema Juda re lebile thokong ya thaba ya Efuraime; Ke tloga moo ka ya Betlelehema kua Juda, eupša bjale ke ya ntlong ya Morena; gomme ga go yo a tlago go nkamogela ka ntlong." 
Judges19:19 Le ge go le bjalo go na le bjang le mafulo a ditonki tša rena; go na le senkgwa le beine bakeng sa ka, le mosadi wa gago, lesogana la gago, le bahlanka ba gago; ga e nyake selo." 
Judges19:20 Mokgalabje a re: “Khutšo a e be le wena.” Thato ya gago ka moka e be godimo ga ka; just don’t live mo setarateng. 
Judges19:21 A ba tliša ka ntlong ya gagwe, a ba bea dijo, ba hlapa maoto, ba ja le go nwa." 
Judges19:22 Ge ba thabile dipelong tša bona, bona banna ba motse, barwa ba Beliale, ba tsena ka ntlong, ba kokota mojakong, ba re go mokgalabje mong wa ntlo: “Re tlišetše phološo.” Monna yo a tlilego ka ntlong ya gago, gore re mo tsebe." 
Judges19:23 Monna yoo, mong wa ntlo, a tšwa go bona, a re go bona: “Aowa, bana bešo, aowa, aowa, ke a le rapela, le se ke la dira bokgopo bjo bjalo; bona gore monna yo o tlile ka ntlong ya ka, gomme o se ke wa dira selo se sa bošilo." 
Judges19:24 Bonang, mona ke morwedi wa ka, kgarebe, le serethe sa gagwe; bjale ke tla ba ntšha, ka go homotša, ka ba dira tše dibotse mahlong a gago;" 
Judges19:25 Eupša banna bao ba gana go mo theetša, ka gona a tšea serethe sa gagwe a ba tlišetša sona; ba mo tseba, ba mo roga bošego ka moka go fihla mesong; ge e fihla, ba mo lokolla." 
Judges19:26 Ke moka mosadi a tla mesong, a robala mojakong wa ntlo ya monna go fihla mesong." 
Judges19:27 Mong wa gagwe a tsoga mesong, a bula mejako ya ntlo, a tšwa a tloga. Mme, bona, mosadi yoo a wela fase mojakong wa ntlo a beile diatla tša gagwe mojakong." 
Judges19:28 A re go yena: “Tsoga re sepele.” Eupša ga go yo a ilego a araba. Ke moka monna yoo a mo nametša pokolo, monna yoo a tsoga a boela gae." 
Judges19:29 Ge a fihla ka ntlong ya gagwe, a tšea tšhoša a e arola ka diripana tše lesomepedi, a e romela dinaga ka moka tša Isiraele." 
Judges19:30 Bohle bao ba e bonego ba re: “Selo se se swanago le se ga se sa ka sa dirwa goba sa bonwa go tloga letšatšing leo bana ba Isiraele ba rotogilego ka lona nageng ya Egipita go fihla le lehono; ela hloko, tšea keletšo gomme o bolele monagano wa gago." 
Judges20:1 Bana ka moka ba Isiraele ba tšwa, phuthego ya kgobokana e le motho o tee, go tloga Dani go fihla Beresheba, le naga ya Gileada, go Jehofa kua Mitsipa." 
Judges20:2 Dikgošana tša setšhaba, tša meloko ka moka ya Isiraele, di ile tša iponagatša phuthegong ya setšhaba sa Modimo, e lego bahlabani ba maoto ba dikete tše makgolo a mane (400 000)." 
Judges20:3 Barwa ba Benjamini ba kwa gore bana ba Isiraele ba rotogetše Mitsipa. Bana ba Isiraele ba re: “Re botše, bokgopo bjo bo bile bjang?”" 
Judges20:4 Molefi, monna wa mosadi yo a bolailwego, a araba a re: “Ke tlile Gibea yeo e lego ya Benjamini, nna le serethe sa ka re yo robala.”" 
Judges20:5 Banna ba Gibea ba nthomela, ba nkgokološa ntlo bošego, ba nagana gore ba mpolaile. Gomme serethe sa ka se ba gapeleditše go hwa." 
Judges20:6 Ka tšea serethe sa ka ka se sega ka diripa ka se romela nageng ka moka ya bohwa bja Isiraele, ka gobane ba dirile ditiro tše di gobogilego le bošilo Isiraeleng." 
Judges20:7 Bonang, bana ka moka ba Isiraele; fa malebela le keletšo ya gago mo." 
Judges20:8 Setšhaba ka moka sa ema bjalo ka motho o tee, sa re: “Re ka se tsene ka tenteng ya gagwe, le gona re ka se tsene ka ntlong ya gagwe.”" 
Judges20:9 Eupša bjale se ke seo re tlago go se dira Gibea; re tla e hlasela ka bofelo; 
Judges20:10 Re tla tšea banna ba lesome go tšwa go lekgolo le lengwe le le lengwe la meloko ka moka ya Isiraele, le lekgolo go ba sekete, le ba sekete go ba dikete tše lesome, gomme ba tla nea setšhaba dijo tšeo di ka fihlago Gibea. Nageng ya Benjamini, go ya ka bošilo ka moka bjo ba bo dirilego Isiraele." 
Judges20:11 Ka gona banna ka moka ba Isiraele ba kgobokane kgahlanong le motse, ba logagantšwe bjalo ka motho o tee." 
Judges20:12 Meloko ya Isiraele e roma banna go phatša moloko ka moka wa Benjamini, ba re: “Ke bokgopo bofe bjo bo dirilwego gare ga lena?" 
Judges20:13 Bjale re hlakodišeng banna bao e lego barwa ba Beliale ba Gibea gore re ba bolaye gomme re fediše bobe go Isiraele. Eupša bana ba Benjamini ga se ba ka ba theetša lentšu la bana babo bona bana ba Isiraele. 
Judges20:14 Bana ba Benjamini ba kgobokana go tšwa metseng go ya Gibea, go yo lwa le bana ba Isiraele." 
Judges20:15 Ka nako yeo barwa ba Benjamini ba be ba ngwadišitšwe metseng yeo banna ba dikete tše masomepedi-tshela bao ba swerego tšhoša, ka ntle le badudi ba Gibea, bao e bego e le banna ba makgolo a šupago bao ba kgethilwego." 
Judges20:16 Gare ga setšhaba se ka moka go be go na le banna ba makgolo a šupago bao ba kgethilwego ba letsogo le letshadi; yo mongwe le yo mongwe aa kgona go lahlela maswika bophara bja moriri, ntle le go foša kotlo." 
Judges20:17 Banna ba Isiraele, ka ntle le Benjamini, ba ile ba balwa banna ba dikete tše makgolo a mane bao ba swerego tšhoša; ka moka ga bona e be e le bagale." 
Judges20:18 Ke moka bana ba Isiraele ba itokišeletša gomme ba rotogela ntlong ya Modimo wa therešo gomme ba botšiša Modimo gomme ba re: “Ke mang go rena yo a tlago go rotogela pele ntweng le bana ba Benjamini?” Jehofa a re: “Juda o tla rotoga pele.” 
Judges20:19 Bana ba Isiraele ba tsoga mesong ba hloma mešaša kgahlanong le Gibea. 
Judges20:20 Banna ba Isiraele ba tšwa go yo lwa le Benjamini; banna ba Isiraele ba ba tsogela Gibea. 
Judges20:21 Barwa ba Benjamini ba tšwa Gibea, gomme letšatšing leo ba bolaya banna ba 22 000 ba bana ba Isiraele." 
Judges20:22 Setšhaba, e lego banna ba Isiraele, ba ikgothatša, ba hloma ntwa gape lefelong leo ba lokeleditšego lona letšatšing la pele." 
Judges20:23 Bana ba Isiraele ba rotoga ba lla pele ga Jehofa go fihla mantšiboa gomme ba botšiša Jehofa ba re: “Na ke tla rotoga gape go yo lwa le bana ba Benjamini ngwanešo?” 
Judges20:24 Ka letšatši la bobedi bana ba Isiraele ba batamela go gahlanetša barwa ba Benjamini. 
Judges20:25 Ka letšatši la bobedi Benjamini a tšwa Gibea a ba hlasela, a bolaya banna ba dikete tše lesomeseswai. Ka moka ba ntšha ditšhoša tša bona." 
Judges20:26 Ke moka bana ba Isiraele ka moka le setšhaba ka moka ba rotogela ntlong ya Modimo wa therešo gomme ba lla ba dula fase pele ga Jehofa gomme ba ikona dijo letšatšing leo go fihla mantšiboa gomme ba neela dihlabelo tša go fišwa le dihlabelo tša tebogo pele ga Jehofa. MODIMO. 
Judges20:27 Bana ba Isiraele ba thoma go botšiša Jehofa, ka gobane areka ya kgwerano ya Modimo e be e le moo mehleng yeo;" 
Judges20:28 Ke moka Finease morwa wa Eleasara morwa wa Arone a ema kgauswi le yena a re: “Na ke tla boela ka tšwa go yo lwa le bana ba Benjamini ngwanešo, goba na ke tla ba lesa?” Jehofa a re: “Rotoga; gobane gosasa ke tla di gafela diatleng tša gago." 
Judges20:29 Ka gona Isiraele a dula Gibea. 
Judges20:30 Ka letšatši la boraro bana ba Isiraele ba rotogela barwa ba Benjamini gomme ba rotogela Gibea go etša dinakong tše dingwe. 
Judges20:31 Bana ba Benjamini ba tšwa ba ba lwantšha, ba gogelwa motseng. Ba thoma go hlasela le go bolaya ba bangwe ba setšhaba, bjalo ka pele, ditseleng tše dikgolo, yo mongwe a rotogela ntlong ya Modimo, gomme yo mongwe a rotogela Gibea nageng, banna ba ka bago ba masometharo ba Isiraele." 
Judges20:32 Bana ba Benjamini ba re: “Ba otlilwe pele ga rena go etša pele.” Eupša bana ba Isiraele ba re: “A re tšhabeng re ba goge motseng re ba goge ditseleng tše dikgolo; 
Judges20:33 Banna ka moka ba Isiraele ba tsoga lefelong la bona, ba itlhama kua Baali-tamara;" 
Judges20:34 Banna ba ba kgethilwego ba sekete go tšwa go Isiraele ka moka ba tla go lwa le Gibea, gomme ntwa e be e le e šoro." 
Judges20:35 Jehofa a fenya Benjamini pele ga Isiraele, gomme ka letšatši leo bana ba Isiraele ba bolaya banna ba dikete tše masomepedi-hlano kua Benjamini; ka moka ba ntšha ditšhoša tša bona." 
Judges20:36 Bana ba Benjamini ba bona gore ba otlilwe, ka gobane banna ba Isiraele ba ile ba ineela go bana ba Benjamini, ka gobane ba be ba botile bahlaledi bao ba bego ba ba beile ka thoko ga Gibea." 
Judges20:37 Baaketši ba akgofela ba fihla Gibea; marabele a kgobokana, a dikanetša motse ka moka ka bogale bja tšhoša." 
Judges20:38 Go be go na le pontšho magareng ga banna ba Isiraele le ba maaka bao ba bego ba letetše gore ba tla tšweletša kgabo e kgolo ya muši motseng. 
Judges20:39 Ge banna ba Isiraele ba boetše ntweng, Benjamini a thoma go bolaya banna ba Isiraele ba ka bago 30; ka gobane ba rile: Ruri, ba fentšwe pele ga rena bjalo ka ntweng ya mathomo." 
Judges20:40 Eupša ge kgabo e thoma go rotoga motseng ka leru la muši, Babenjami ba lebelela ka morago ga bona, ba bona kgabo ya motse e rotogela legodimong." 
Judges20:41 Ge banna ba Isiraele ba boela morago, banna ba Benjamini ba makala, ka gobane ba bona gore ba wetše masetla-pelo." 
Judges20:42 Ke ka baka leo ba ilego ba furalela banna ba Isiraele ba lebile lešokeng; eupša ntwa ya ba swara; bao ba tšwago metseng yeo ba ile ba ba fediša gare ga yona. 
Judges20:43 Ba dikanetša Babenyamini, ba ba kitimiša gabonolo go fihla Gibea ge letšatši le hlaba." 
Judges20:44 Molokong wa Benjamini ba 18 000; ka moka e be e le banna ba sebete. 
Judges20:45 Ba retologa ba tšhabela lešokeng go ya leswikeng la Rimone; ba ba rakediša go fihla Gidomo, ba bolaya ba 2 000 ba bona." 
Judges20:46 Ka gona bohle bao ba ilego ba bolawa ke Benjamini letšatšing leo e be e le banna ba 25 000 bao ba ilego ba ntšha tšhoša; ka moka e be e le banna ba sebete. 
Judges20:47 Eupša banna ba makgolo a tshelelago ba retologa ba tšhabela lešokeng go ya leswikeng la Rimone gomme ba dula leswikeng la Rimone dikgwedi tše nne. 
Judges20:48 Banna ba Isiraele ba bušetša bana ba Benjamini, ba ba bolaya ka tšhoša, motse ka moka le bohle bao ba hweditšwego go wona. Ba fiša metse ka moka. Seo ba tletšego ka sona." 
Judges21:1 Banna ba Isiraele ba be ba ikanne kua Mitsipa, ba re: “Go ka se be le o tee wa rena yo a ka neelago Benjamini morwedi wa gagwe gore e be mosadi wa gagwe.”" 
Judges21:2 Setšhaba sa tla ntlong ya Modimo, sa dula moo go fihla mantšiboa pele ga Modimo, sa hlaboša mantšu a sona, sa lla o šoro;" 
Judges21:3 A re: “Wena Jehofa Modimo wa Isiraele, ke ka baka la’ng go ka ba le moloko o tee wo o hwilego mo Isiraele lehono?"
