2Kings19:20 Ke moka Jesaya morwa wa Amotse a roma a romela go Hesekia a re: “Se ke seo Jehofa Modimo wa Isiraele a se boletšego: ‘Se o nthapetšego sona kgahlanong le Sanheribe kgoši ya Asiria ke se kwele.” 
2Kings19:21 Le ke lentšu leo Jehofa a le boletšego mabapi le yena; Kgarebe, morwedi wa Tsione, yo a nyatšago le go sega; morwedi wa Jerusalema o go šikinya hlogo." 
2Kings19:22 O rogile mang le go latofatša mang? O phagamišitše lentšu la gago go mang, wa emišetša mahlo a gago godimo? gaešita le kgahlanong le Mokgethwa wa Isiraele." 
2Kings19:23 Ka baromiwa ba gago o ile wa sola Jehofa, wa re: “Ke rotogetše ka bontši bja dikoloi tša ka tša ntwa go fihla bogodimo bja dithaba, go fihla mafelelong a Libanone, gomme ka rema dikedara tša yona tše ditelele le tše kgethwa tša yona dihlare. Ke tla tsena dintlong tša bogoši tša naga ya gabo le sethokgweng sa Karamele ya gagwe." 
2Kings19:24 Ka epa, ka nwa meetse a šele, ka fiša dinoka ka moka tša leganateng ka ditlhako tša maoto." 
2Kings19:25 Na ga se la kwa kamoo ke dirilego ka gona mehleng ya bogologolo le kamoo ke dirilego ka gona? bjale ke dirile gore e direge, gore o dire metse e šireleditšwego e le lešope." 
2Kings19:26 Ka baka leo, badudi ba yona e be e le ba sego kae, gomme ba fenywa le go kokobetšwa; e be e le bjalo ka bjang bja tšhemo, le bjalo ka sehlare se setala, le bjalo ka bjang bjo bo lego godimo ga dintlo, le bjalo ka mabele a go thuthupa pele a gola." 
2Kings19:27 Eupša ke tseba bodulo bja gago, le go tšwa ga gago, go tsena ga gago, le go nkgalefela ga gago." 
2Kings19:28 Ka ge kgalefo ya gago e ntlhasela, gomme mokgoši wa gago o tlile ditsebeng tša ka, ka baka leo ke tla tsenya phaephe ya ka melomo ya gago, le tomo ya ka melomo ya gago, ka go bušetša morago tseleng yeo o tlilego ka yona." 
2Kings19:29 Se e tla ba pontšho go lena: Lenyaga le tla ja tše di melago ka botšona, gomme ngwageng wa bobedi le tla ja tše di melago. Ka ngwaga wa boraro le bjala, le buneng, le bjala dirapa tša merara, le je dienywa tša yona." 
2Kings19:30 Mašaledi ao a phonyokgilego ntlong ya Juda a tla boela a tsema medu fase, a enywa dienywa go ya godimo." 
2Kings19:31 Gobane mašaledi a tla tšwa Jerusalema le bao ba phonyokgago thabeng ya Tsione. Phišego ya Jehofa wa madira e tla dira se. 
2Kings19:32 Ka gona Jehofa o boletše ka kgoši ya Asiria: “A ka se tle motseng wo, a ka se thuntšhe mosebe moo, a ka se tle pele ga wona a swere kotse, goba a lahlela mmoto go wona.”" 
2Kings19:33 Tsela yeo a tlilego ka yona, o tla boela ka yona, a ka se tsene motseng wo,” o re’alo Jehofa." 
2Kings19:34 Gobane ke tla šireletša motse wo gore ke o phološe, ka baka la ka le ka baka la mohlanka wa ka Dafida." 
2Kings19:35 Bošegong bjoo morongwa wa Jehofa a tšwa a bolaya batho ba 185 mešašeng ya Baasiria; ge ba tsoga e sa le mesong, ba bona ka moka e be e le ditopo." 
2Kings19:36 Ka gona Sanheribe kgoši ya Asiria a tloga, a boela morago, a dula Ninife." 
2Kings19:37 Ya re ge a be a khunamela ntlong ya Nisirogo modimo wa gagwe, barwa ba gagwe Adrameleke le Saretsere ba mo bolaya ka tšhoša, ba tšhabela nageng ya Armenia. Esarhadone morwa wa gagwe a buša legatong la gagwe." 
2Kings20:1 Mehleng yeo Hiskia a babja gomme a hwa. Moporofeta Jesaya morwa wa Amotse a tla go yena, a re go yena: “Se ke seo Jehofa a se boletšego: “Beakanya ntlo ya gago; gobane o tla hwa, wa se phele." 
2Kings20:2 Ke moka a retološetša sefahlego sa gagwe lebotong gomme a rapela Jehofa. 
2Kings20:3 Jehofa, ke a go rapela, gopola kamoo ke sepetšego ka gona pele ga gago ka therešo le ka pelo e phethagetšego, gomme ka dira se sebotse mahlong a gago. Hiskia o ile a lla ka bogale." 
2Kings20:4 Ge Jesaya a se a tšwa a ya gare ga lapa, lentšu la Jehofa la tla go yena la re:" 
2Kings20:5 Boela morago gomme o botše Hesekia kgoši ya setšhaba sa gešo: “Se ke seo Jehofa Modimo wa Dafida tatago a se boletšego: ‘Ke kwele thapelo ya gago, ke bone megokgo ya gago; bona, ke nna mofodiši; ka letšatši la boraro le rotogele ntlong ya Morena." 
2Kings20:6 Ke tla oketša matšatši a gago ka nywaga e 15; Ke tla go hlakodiša le motse wo diatleng tša kgoši ya Asiria; Ke tla šireletša motse wo ka baka la ka le ka baka la mohlanka wa ka Dafida. 
2Kings20:7 Jesaya a re: “Tšea mago.” Ba mo tšea, ba mo tsenya madireng, gomme a fola." 
2Kings20:8 Hesekia a re go Jesaya: “Ke seka sefe seo se bontšhago gore Jehofa o tla mphodiša, gomme ka letšatši la boraro ke tla rotogela ntlong ya Jehofa?" 
2Kings20:9 Jesaya a re: “O tla ba le pontšho ye ya Jehofa, ya gore Jehofa o tla dira se a se boletšego." 
2Kings20:10 Hesekia a fetola a re: “Ke selo se se bofefo gore moriti o theogele fase ka dikgato tše lesome. Ee, eupša seriti se ile sa boela morago ka dikgato tše lesome." 
2Kings20:11 Moporofeta Jesaya a llela Jehofa, a bušetša morago moriti wo o theogilego ka wona ka pukung ya Ahasi." 
2Kings20:12 Ka nako yeo Beredake-baladani morwa wa Baladane kgoši ya Babilona o ile a romela mangwalo le mpho go Hiskia, ka gobane o be a kwele gore Hiskia o be a babja." 
2Kings20:13 Hesekia a ba theetša, a ba bontšha ntlo ka moka ya matlotlo a gagwe, silifera, gauta, dinoko, ditlolo tše bohlokwa, le polokelo ya gagwe ka moka ya dibetša le tšohle tšeo di hweditšwego matlotlong a gagwe. Go be go se na selo ka ntlong ya gagwe goba pušong ya gagwe ka moka yeo Hesekia a bego a sa ba dumelele go se bona." 
2Kings20:14 Ke moka moporofeta Jesaya a tla go kgoši Hiskia a re go yena: “Banna ba ba boletše’ng?” le gona di tšwa kae? Hiskia a re: Ba tlile go tšwa nageng ya kgole, Babilona." 
2Kings20:15 A re: “Ba bone eng ka ntlong ya gago?” Hiskia a re: Ba bone tšohle ka ntlong ya ka; gare ga matlotlo a ka ga go selo seo ke sa go bontšhago sona. 
2Kings20:16 Jesaya a re go Hiskia: “Ekwa lentšu la Jehofa.” 
2Kings20:17 Tsebang matšatši ao tšohle tše di lego ka ntlong ya gago le tšeo borakgolokhukhu ba gago ba di bolokilego go fihla le lehono di tla išwa Babilona. Go ka se šale selo,” o re’alo Jehofa." 
2Kings20:18 Go barwa ba gago bao ba tlago go go belega, bao o tlago go ba belega, ba tla go tšea; ba tla bolokwa ka mošate wa kgoši ya Babilona." 
2Kings20:19 Ke moka Hiskia a re go Jesaya: “Lentšu la Jehofa leo o le boletšego ke le lebotse. Ke moka a re: Na ga se mo gobotse gore go na le khutšo le therešo mehleng ya ka? 
2Kings20:20 Bjale ditaba tše dingwe tša Hiskia le matla a gagwe ka moka le kamoo a ilego a dira letamo le kamoo a ilego a tliša meetse motseng, na ga se tša ngwalwa ka pukung ya ditaba tša mehleng ya dikgoši tša Juda?" 
2Kings20:21 Hiskia a robala le borakgolokhukhu ba gagwe, gomme Manase morwa wa gagwe a buša legatong la gagwe." 
2Kings21:1 Manase o be a na le mengwaga ye lesomepedi ge a thoma go buša, a buša mengwaga ye masomehlano-hlano Jerusalema. Leina la mmagwe e be e le Hefutsiba." 
2Kings21:2 A dira tše mpe mahlong a Jehofa, a dira dilo tše di šišimišago tša ditšhaba tšeo Jehofa a di lahlilego pele ga bana ba Isiraele." 
2Kings21:3 Gobane o ile a aga gape mafelo a phagamego ao Hiskia tatagwe a a sentšego; a dikela Baalime dialetare, a direla Ashera, go etša ge Ahaba kgoši ya Isiraele a dirile; madira ka moka a legodimo a khunama a di khunamela." 
2Kings21:4 A aga dialetare ka ntlong ya Jehofa, tšeo Jehofa a boletšego ka tšona: “Ke tla bea leina la ka Jerusalema.”" 
2Kings21:5 A agela madira ka moka a magodimo dialetare ka mabaleng a mabedi a ntlo ya Jehofa. 
2Kings21:6 A fetiša morwa wa gagwe mollong, a boloka dinako, a diriša maleatlana, a dirišana le meoya le baloi, a dira bokgopo bjo bogolo mahlong a Jehofa. A dira tše mpe mahlong a Jehofa, a mo galefiša." 
2Kings21:7 A hloma seswantšho se se betlilwego seo a se dirilego, ntlong yeo Jehofa a boditšego Dafida le Solomone morwa wa gagwe: “Mo ntlong ye le Jerusalema, yeo ke e kgethilego melokong ka moka ya Isiraele tla e kgetha. Bea leina la ka go ya go ile." 
2Kings21:8 Le ka mohla nka se sa hlwa ke šišinya maoto a Isiraele nageng yeo ke e filego borakgolokhukhu ba bona; ge fela ba hlokometše go dira go ya ka tšohle tše ke ba laetšego tšona le go ya ka molao ka moka wo Moshe mohlanka wa ka a ba laetšego wona. 
2Kings21:9 Eupša ga se ba ka ba theetša, gomme Manase a ba goketša gore ba dire se sebe go feta ditšhaba tšeo Jehofa a di fedišitšego pele ga bana ba Isiraele." 
2Kings21:10 Jehofa a bolela ka bahlanka ba gagwe baporofeta a re: 
2Kings21:11 Gobane Manase kgoši ya Juda o ile a dira dilo tše di šišimišago, a dira tše mpe go feta tšohle tšeo Baamore ba di dirilego pele ga gagwe, a dira gore Juda le yena a dire sebe ka medingwana ya gagwe ya diswantšho." 
2Kings21:12 Ka gona Jehofa Modimo wa Isiraele o re: “Bonang, ke tla tlišetša Jerusalema le Juda bošula bjo bo bjalo mo e lego gore mang le mang yo a bo kwago, ditsebe tša gagwe ka bobedi di tla tšhošwa." 
2Kings21:13 Ke tla otlollela Jerusalema mothaladi wa Samaria le thapo ya ntlo ya Ahaba; ke tla phumola Jerusalema bjalo ka ge motho a phumola sebjana, a se phumola, a se pšhatlaganya." 
2Kings21:14 Ke tla lahla mašaledi a bohwa bja ka, ka a gafela diatleng tša manaba a bona; ba tla fetoga dihlapi le dihlapi tša manaba a tšona ka moka;" 
2Kings21:15 Ka ge ba dirile tše mpe mahlong a ka, ba nkwera, go tloga letšatšing leo botatago bona ba tšwago Egipita go fihla le lehono." 
2Kings21:16 Go feta moo, Manase o ile a tšholla madi a se nago molato kudu moo a ilego a tlatša Jerusalema go tloga ntlheng e nngwe go ya go e nngwe; ntle le sebe sa gagwe seo a se tlišeditšego Juda ka go dira bobe mahlong a Jehofa." 
2Kings21:17 Ditiro tše dingwe tša Manase le tšohle tšeo a di dirilego le sebe sa gagwe seo a se dirilego, na ga se tša ngwalwa ka pukung ya ditaba tša ditiragalo tša dikgoši tša Juda?" 
2Kings21:18 Mafelelong Manase a robala le borakgolokhukhu ba gagwe gomme a bolokwa serapeng sa ntlo ya gagwe, serapeng sa Utsa; Amone morwa wa gagwe a buša legatong la gagwe." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni o be a e-na le nywaga e 22 ge a thoma go buša, gomme a buša Jerusalema ka nywaga e mebedi. Leina la mmagwe e be e le Meshulemethe morwedi wa Haruse wa Jotoba." 
2Kings21:20 A dira tše mpe mahlong a Jehofa, go etša ge Manase tatagwe a dirile." 
2Kings21:21 A sepela tseleng ka moka yeo tatagwe a bego a sepela ka yona, a hlankela medimo ya diswantšho yeo tatagwe a bego a e hlankela, a e khunamela." 
2Kings21:22 A lahla Jehofa Modimo wa borakgolokhukhu ba gagwe, a se sepele tseleng ya Jehofa." 
2Kings21:23 Bahlanka ba Amone ba mo loga maanomabe, ba bolaya kgoši ka ntlong ya gagwe." 
2Kings21:24 Batho ba naga ba bolaya bohle bao ba bego ba loga maanomabe malebana le Kgoši Amone; batho ba naga ba bea Josia morwa wa gagwe kgoši legatong la gagwe. 
2Kings21:25 Bjale ditaba tše dingwe tša Amone tšeo a di dirilego, na ga se tša ngwalwa ka pukung ya Dikoronika tša dikgoši tša Juda?" 
2Kings21:26 A bolokwa lebitleng la gagwe kua tšhemong ya Usa, gomme Josia morwa wa gagwe a buša legatong la gagwe." 
2Kings22:1 Josia o be a na le mengwaga ye senyane ge a thoma go buša, gomme a buša mengwaga ye masometharo-tee kua Jerusalema. Leina la mmagwe e be e le Jedidah, morwedi wa Adaiah the Musketeer." 
2Kings22:2 A dira tše di lokilego mahlong a Jehofa, a sepela tseleng ka moka ya Dafida tatagwe, a se fapoge ka letsogong le letona goba la nngele." 
2Kings22:3 Ka ngwaga wa lesometee le wa bobedi wa pušo ya kgoši Josia, kgoši ya roma Safane morwa wa Asalia, morwa wa Meshulama, mongwaledi ntlong ya Jehofa, e re:" 
2Kings22:4 a rotogela go Hilikia moperisita yo mogolo, gore a kgoboketše tšhelete yeo e tlišitšwego ka ntlong ya Jehofa yeo baleti ba mejako ba e kgobokeditšego." 
2Kings22:5 Ba e gafela diatleng tša bašomi bao ba hlokometšego ntlo ya Jehofa; e nee bao ba dirago modiro wa ntlo ya Jehofa gore ba lokiše mašoba a ntlo; 
2Kings22:6 le babetli, baagi le bašomi ba mafsika, le go reka dikota le maswika ao a betlilwego bakeng sa go lokiša ntlo." 
2Kings22:7 Lega go le bjalo, ga se gwa ka gwa balwa tšhelete yeo e bego e le ka seatleng sa bona, ka gobane ba be ba dirišana ka potego." 
2Kings22:8 Ke moka Hilkia moperisita yo mogolo a re go Shafane mongwaledi: “Ke hweditše puku ya Molao ka ntlong ya Jehofa. Hilikia a nea Safane puku yeo, gomme a e bala." 
2Kings22:9 Safane mongwaledi a tla go kgoši a mmotša a re: “Bahlanka ba gago ba kgobokeditše tšhelete yeo e hweditšwego ka ntlong, ba e gafela diatleng tša balebeledi.” Ya ntlo ya Morena." 
2Kings22:10 Safane mongwaledi a botša kgoši a re: Moprista Hilikia o nneile puku. Safane a e bala pele ga kgoši. 
2Kings22:11 Ya re ge kgoši e kwele mantšu a puku ya Molao, ya gagola diaparo tša yona." 
2Kings22:12 Kgoši ya laela moprista Hilikia le Ahikama morwa wa Safane le Akebore morwa wa Mikaya le Safane mongwaledi le Asaya mohlanka wa kgoši. 
2Kings22:13 Sepela o botšiše Jehofa, nna le setšhaba le Juda ka moka mabapi le mantšu a puku ye ao a hweditšwego; gobane bogale bja Jehofa bjo bo re tukago ke bjo bogolo, ka gobane borakgolokhukhu ba rena ga se ba theetša. Go ya ka mantšu a puku ye, go dira tšohle tše di ngwadilwego ka rena." 
2Kings22:14 Ka gona moperisita Hilikia, Ahikama, Akibore, Safane le Asaya, ba ya go Hulda moporofeta wa mosadi, mosadi wa Shalume morwa wa Tikwa, morwa wa Harhase, mohlokomedi wa diaparo; (o be a dula Jerusalema kholetšheng;) gomme ba bolela le yena." 
2Kings22:15 A re go bona: “Se ke seo Jehofa Modimo wa Isiraele a se boletšego: “Botšang monna yo le nthomilego go nna. 
2Kings22:16 Morena o re: “Bona, ke tla tlišetša bošula lefelong le le go badudi ba lona, e lego mantšu ka moka a puku yeo kgoši ya Juda e e badilego." 
2Kings22:17 Gobane ba nthibela gomme ba bea medimo e mengwe gore ba nkwere ka mediro ka moka ya diatla tša bona; ka fao kgalefo ya ka e tla tuka mo lefelong le, gomme ya ka se timilwe." 
2Kings22:18 Eupša go kgoši ya Juda yeo o e romilego gore e yo botšiša Jehofa, o botše gore: “Se ke seo Jehofa Modimo wa Isiraele a se boletšego: ‘Mabapi le mantšu ao o a kwelego;" 
2Kings22:19 Gobane pelo ya gago e be e le boleta gomme wa ikokobetša pele ga Jehofa ge o ekwa seo ke se boletšego kgahlanong le lefelo le le go badudi ba lona, gore e be lešope, gomme diaparo tša gago tša gagoga gomme di goeletša pele ga gago tša gago. Ke nna; Ke go kwele, go bolela Morena." 
2Kings22:20 Ka gona, bona, ke tla go kgoboketša go borakgolokhukhu ba gago, gomme o tla kgoboketšwa lebitleng la gago ka khutšo; mahlo a gago a ka se bone bobe ka moka bjo ke tlago go bo tlišetša lefelong le. Ke moka ba tsebiša kgoši gape." 
2Kings23:1 Ke moka kgoši ya roma, ba kgoboketša bagolo ka moka ba Juda le Jerusalema go yena." 
2Kings23:2 Kgoši ya rotogela ntlong ya Jehofa le banna ka moka ba Juda le badudi ka moka ba Jerusalema le baperisita le baporofeta le setšhaba ka moka go tloga go yo monyenyane go fihla go yo mogolo. 
2Kings23:3 Jehofa a ema kgauswi le kokwane yeo gomme a dira kgwerano pele ga Jehofa ya gore a latele Jehofa le go boloka ditaelo tša gagwe le dikgopotšo tša gagwe le melao ya gagwe e hlomilwego ka dipelo tša bona ka moka le ka moya wa bona ka moka le ka moya wa bona ka moka gore ba ba dire dipeelano tša tumelelano ye. Di ngwadilwe ka pukung ye. Ke moka naga ka moka ya ema ka kwano. 
2Kings23:4 Kgoši ya laela Hilikia moperisita yo mogolo, le baperisita ba bobedi le baleti ba kgoro gore ba ntšhe tempeleng ya Jehofa dibjana ka moka tša Baali, le dithokgwa ka moka tša dithokgwa le madira ka moka a legodimo, ba fiše bona mollong. Ka ntle ga Jerusalema nageng ya Kidrone gomme ba tliša melora ya bona Bethele." 
2Kings23:5 A tšea baperisita ba medingwana bao dikgoši tša Juda di bego di ba kgethile gore ba tšhume diorelo mafelong a phagamego metseng ya Juda le mafelong ao a dikologilego Jerusalema. Ba tšhuma Baali, le letšatši, le ngwedi, le dinaledi, le madira ka moka a legodimo diorelo." 
2Kings23:6 A tšea dikgong tšeo ntlong ya Jehofa ka ntle ga Jerusalema a di iša moeding wa Kidrone, a di fiša ka moeding wa Kidrone, a di betha lerole gomme a lahlela lerole la tšona mabitleng a batho ba tlwaelegilego." 
2Kings23:7 A phušola dintlo tša basodoma tšeo di bego di le kgaufsi le ntlo ya Jehofa, moo basadi ba bego ba loga dikota." 
2Kings23:8 A ntšha baperisita ka moka metseng ya Juda, a šilafatša mafelo a phagamego ao baperisita ba bego ba tšhuma diorelo go ona, go tloga Geba go fihla Bereseba, a thuba mafelo a phagamego a dikgoro tšeo di bego di le ka pele ga kgoro ya Joshua. Mmušiši wa motse, yo a bego a le ka go le letshadi la monna kgorong ya motse." 
2Kings23:8 A ntšha baperisita ka moka metseng ya Juda, a šilafatša mafelo a phagamego ao baperisita ba bego ba tšhuma diorelo go ona, go tloga Geba go fihla Bereseba, a thuba mafelo a phagamego a dikgoro tšeo di bego di le ka pele ga kgoro ya Joshua. Mmušiši wa motse, yo a bego a le ka go le letshadi la monna kgorong ya motse." 
2Kings23:9 Lega go le bjalo baperisita ba mafelong a phagamego ga se ba ka ba rotogela aletareng ya Jehofa kua Jerusalema, eupša ba ja bogobe bjo bo sa omelwago gare ga bana babo bona." 
2Kings23:10 A šilafatša Tofethe, yeo e lego moeding wa bana ba Hinomo, gore go se be le motho yo a ka fetišago morwa wa gagwe goba morwedi wa gagwe mollong go ya Moleke." 
2Kings23:11 A tšea dipere tšeo dikgoši tša Juda di bego di di neile letšatši mojakong wa ntlo ya Jehofa le ka phapošing ya kgoši Nathanaele le moeding, le dikoloi tša ntwa tša letšatši a di fiša." 
2Kings23:12 Dialetare tšeo di bego di le ka phapošing ya ka godimo ya Ahasi, tšeo dikgoši tša Juda di di dirilego, le dialetare tšeo Manase a di dirilego malapeng a mabedi a ntlo ya Jehofa, kgoši ya di thuba. Ba lahlela lerole la bona moeding wa Kidirone." 
2Kings23:13 Le ditora tše di phagamego tšeo Solomone kgoši ya Isiraele a di agilego ka pele ga Jerusalema, ka lehlakoreng le letona la thaba ya tshenyego, bakeng sa Ashorethe e lego makgapha a Basidone le bakeng sa Kemoše e lego makgapha a Moaba le bakeng sa Milikomo, e lego makgapha a kgošana ya Baamoni." 
2Kings23:14 A pšhatlaganya diswantšho tšeo, a rema dihlare, a tlatša mafelo a tšona ka marapo a batho." 
2Kings23:15 Go oketša moo, a aga aletare kua Bethele le lefelong le le phagamego leo Jeroboama morwa wa Nebate a dirilego gore Isiraele a dire sebe, a phušola aletare le lefelo le le phagamego gomme a fiša lefelo le le phagamego gomme a e tšhela lerole gomme a fiša sethokgwa." 
2Kings23:16 Ge Josia a retologa a lebelela mabitla ao a lego mmotong, a romela batho gore ba ntšha marapo ao mabitleng a a fiša aletareng gomme a e šilafatša, go ya ka lentšu la Jehofa leo monna wa Modimo a le boletšego. Rera, yo a boletšego mantšu a." 
2Kings23:17 A re: “Leina le ke le bonago ke mang?” Banna ba motse ba mmotša: “Ke lebitla la monna wa Modimo leo Juda a le dirilego, le go tsebatša tše o di dirilego kgahlanong le aletare ya Bethele.”" 
2Kings23:18 A re: “A a eme; go se be le yo a šišinyago marapo a gagwe. Ka gona ba tlogela marapo a gagwe, le marapo a moporofeta yo a tšwago Samaria." 
2Kings23:19 Go feta moo, dintlo ka moka tša mafelo a phagamego ao a bego a le metseng ya Samaria, tšeo dikgoši tša Isiraele di di dirilego gore di befetše Jehofa, Josia a di tloša gomme a di dira ka mo a di dirilego ka gona kua Bethele." 
2Kings23:20 A bolaya baperisita ka moka ba mafelo a phagamego bao ba bego ba le moo godimo ga dialetare, a fiša marapo a batho godimo ga bona, a boela Jerusalema." 
2Kings23:21 Kgoši ya laela setšhaba ka moka ya re: “Le direng Paseka ya Jehofa Modimo wa lena go etša ge go ngwadilwe ka pukung ya kgwerano ye.” 
2Kings23:22 Gobane go be go se gwa swarwa Paseka e bjalo mehleng ya baahlodi bao ba ahlolago Isiraele goba mehleng ya dikgoši tša Isiraele goba mehleng ya dikgoši tša Juda; 
2Kings23:23 Eupša ngwageng wa lesometee le wa bobedi wa pušo ya Kgoši Josia, moo Paseka ye e bego e swaretšwe Jehofa kua Jerusalema." 
2Kings23:24 Go feta moo, Josia o ile a tloša diopedi tša meoya, dinoge, medingwana, medingwana le dilo ka moka tše di šišimišago tšeo di lekilwego nageng ya Juda le Jerusalema, e le gore a phethe mantšu a molao wo o ngwadilwego ka pukung. Wo moperisita Hilikia a o hweditšego ka ntlong ya Jehofa." 
2Kings23:25 Go be go se na kgoši yeo e swanago le yena pele ga gagwe, yeo e ilego ya retologela go Jehofa ka dipelo tša yona ka moka le ka moya wa yona ka moka le ka matla a yona ka moka, go ya ka molao ka moka wa Moshe. Ka morago ga gagwe go be go se na yo a swanago le yena." 
2Kings23:26 Lega go le bjalo Jehofa ga se a ka a furalela bogale bja gagwe bjo bogolo, bjoo bogale bja gagwe bo ilego bja tuka go Juda ka baka la dikgopišo tšohle tšeo Manase a mo kgopišitšego ka tšona." 
2Kings23:27 Jehofa a re: “Ke tla tloša le Juda mahlong a ka, bjalo ka ge ke tlošitše Isiraele, ka lahla motse wo wa Jerusalema wo ke o kgethilego le ntlo yeo ke boletšego ka yona gore: ‘Leina la ka le tla ba gona." 
2Kings23:28 Bjale ditaba tše dingwe tša Josia le tšohle tšeo a di dirilego, na ga se tša ngwalwa ka pukung ya ditaba tša mehleng ya dikgoši tša Juda?" 
2Kings23:29 Mehleng ya gagwe Farao Nego kgoši ya Egipita a rotogela kgoši ya Asiria nokeng ya Eforate. A mmolaya kua Megido, ge a mmona." 
2Kings23:30 Bahlanka ba gagwe ba mo rwala a hwile ka koloi a hwile go tšwa Megido, ba mo iša Jerusalema, ba mmoloka lebitleng la gagwe. Ke moka batho ba naga ba tšea Joahase morwa wa Josia, ba mo tlotša, ba mo bea kgoši legatong la tatagwe." 
2Kings23:31 Jehoahase o be a e-na le nywaga e masomepedi-tharo ge a thoma go buša; a buša dikgwedi tše tharo kua Jerusalema. Mmagwe e be e le Hamutale morwedi wa Jeremia wa Libina. 
2Kings23:32 A dira tše mpe mahlong a Jehofa, go ya ka tšohle tšeo borakgolokhukhu ba gagwe ba di dirilego." 
2Kings23:33 Farao-nego a mo gapeletša go ya Ribla nageng ya Hamate, gore a se ke a buša Jerusalema; a lefiša naga ditalente tše lekgolo tša silifera le talente ya gauta." 
2Kings23:34 Farao-nego a bea Eliakime morwa wa Josia kgoši ka phapošing ya Josia tatagwe, a fetola leina la gagwe gore e be Joyakime. A tla Egepeta a hwela moo." 
2Kings23:35 Joyakime a nea Farao silifera le gauta; o be a lefiša naga fela motšhelo, go lefa tšhelete yeo ka taelo ya Farao; a kgopela silifera le gauta go batho ba naga, go yo mongwe le yo mongwe go ya ka motšhelo wa gagwe, gore a di nee Farao Nego." 
2Kings23:36 Jehoyakime o be a e-na le nywaga e masomepedi-hlano ge a thoma go buša; a buša mengwaga ye lesometee Jerusalema. Leina la mmagwe e be e le Sebuda morwedi wa Pedaya wa Ruma. 
2Kings23:37 A dira tše mpe mahlong a Jehofa, go ya ka tšohle tšeo borakgolokhukhu ba gagwe ba di dirilego." 
2Kings24:1 Mehleng ya gagwe Nebukadinetsara kgoši ya Babilona a rotoga gomme Joyakime a ba mohlanka wa gagwe ka nywaga e meraro. Ka morago ga moo a mo retologela. 
2Kings24:2 Jehofa a roma madira a Bakaladea le madira a Siria le madira a Moaba le madira a bana ba Amoni gore a yo lwa le yena, gomme a ba roma go yo lwa le Juda gore ba e fediše, go ya ka lentšu la Jehofa leo o e buile has O e buile ka bahlanka ba Hae, baporofeta ba buile." 
2Kings24:3 Ge e le gabotse, go ile gwa direga ka taelo ya Jehofa go Juda gore a ba tloše mahlong a gagwe ka baka la dibe tša Manase go ya ka tšohle tšeo a di dirilego;" 
2Kings24:4 Le ka baka la madi a se nago molato, ka gobane o ile a tlatša Jerusalema ka madi a se nago molato; yeo Jehofa a sa e lebalelago." 
2Kings24:5 Bjale ditaba tše dingwe tša Jehoyakime le tšohle tšeo a di dirilego, na ga se tša ngwalwa ka pukung ya ditaba tša mehleng ya dikgoši tša Juda?" 
2Kings24:6 Ka gona Jehoyakime a robala le borakgolokhukhu ba gagwe gomme Jehoyakini morwa wa gagwe a thoma go buša legatong la gagwe. 
2Kings24:7 Kgoši ya Egipita ga se ya hlwa e boela nageng ya yona, ka gobane kgoši ya Babilona e be e tšere dilo ka moka tšeo di bego di le mabapi le kgoši ya Egipita go tloga nokeng ya Egipita go fihla nokeng ya Eforate." 
2Kings24:8 Jehoyakine o be a e-na le nywaga e lesomeseswai ge a thoma go buša, gomme a buša ka dikgwedi tše tharo kua Jerusalema; Mmagwe e be e le Nehushita morwedi wa Elnathane wa Jerusalema." 
2Kings24:9 A dira tše mpe mahlong a Jehofa, go ya ka tšohle tšeo tatagwe a di dirilego." 
2Kings24:10 Ka nako yeo bahlanka ba Nebukadinetsara kgoši ya Babilona ba rotogela Jerusalema gomme motse wa rakelela. 
2Kings24:11 Nebukadinetsara kgoši ya Babilona a tla go lwa le motse, bahlanka ba gagwe ba o dikanetša." 
2Kings24:12 Jehoyakine kgoši ya Juda a ya go kgoši ya Babilona, yena le mmagwe, bahlanka ba gagwe, dikgošana tša gagwe le balaodi ba gagwe. Kgoši ya Babilona ya mo tšea ngwageng wa senyane le wa bobedi wa pušo ya gagwe." 
2Kings24:13 A ntšha matlotlo ka moka a ntlo ya Jehofa le matlotlo a ntlo ya kgoši le dibjana ka moka tša gauta tšeo Solomone kgoši ya Isiraele a di dirilego ka ntlong ya Jehofa. Morena a realo. 
2Kings24:14 A thopa Jerusalema ka moka, le dikgošana ka moka, le banna ka moka ba bagale, mathopša a dikete tše lesome, le bagwebi ka moka le bašomi ba ditšhipi. Ga go le o tee yo a ilego a šala, ge e se batho ba diilago kudu ba naga." 
2Kings24:15 A iša Jehoyakine Babilona, le mmago kgoši, basadi ba kgoši, bahlankedi ba gagwe, le banna ba bagale ba naga yeo a ba thopilego Jerusalema." 
2Kings24:16 Bahlabani ka moka ba bagale, le ditsebi tša mošomo wa diatla le bašomi ba ditšhipi, ba dikete tše šupago, ka moka ba matla le bao ba swanelegago ntwa, ba rwala kgoši ya Babilona bothopša Babilona." 
2Kings24:17 Kgoši ya Babilona ya bea Matania ngwanabo tatagwe kgoši legatong la gagwe, ya mo fetola leina la gagwe gore e be Tsedekia." 
2Kings24:18 Tsedekia o be a na le mengwaga ye 21 ge a thoma go ba kgoši, gomme a buša mengwaga ye 11 kua Jerusalema. Mmagwe e be e le Hamutale morwedi wa Jeremia wa Libina." 
2Kings24:19 A dira tše mpe mahlong a Jehofa, go ya ka tšohle tšeo Joyakime a di dirilego." 
2Kings24:20 Tsedekia a rabela kgoši ya Babilona ka bogale bja Jehofa kua Jerusalema le Juda go fihlela a ba raka pele ga gagwe. 
2Kings25:1 Ka ngwaga wa senyane wa pušo ya gagwe, kgweding ya lesome, ka letšatši la lesome la kgwedi, Nebukadinetsara kgoši ya Babilona a tla, yena le madira a gagwe ka moka, ba lwa le Jerusalema, a hloma mešaša kgahlanong le yona. Ba e aga ka merako ka mahlakoreng ka moka." 
2Kings25:2 Ka gona motse wa rakelela go fihla ngwageng wa lesometee wa pušo ya Kgoši Tsedekia. 
2Kings25:3 Ka letšatši la senyane la kgwedi ya bone tlala ya fenya motseng, gomme gwa se be le senkgwa sa batho ba naga." 
2Kings25:4 Motse wa fedišwa, banna ka moka ba ntwa ba tšhaba bošego ka kgoro ya magareng ga maboto a mabedi, kgauswi le serapa sa kgoši; Bakaladea ba dikanetša motse ka mahlakoreng ka moka, gomme kgoši ya ya lešokeng." 
2Kings25:5 Madira a Bakaladea a rakediša kgoši, a e hwetša dithoteng tša Jeriko, madira a yona ka moka a phatlalala go yena." 
2Kings25:6 Ke moka ba swara kgoši gomme ba e rotošetša go kgoši ya Babilona kua Ribla; ba mo ahlola. 
2Kings25:7 Ba bolaya barwa ba Tsedekia pele ga mahlo a gagwe, ba ntšha mahlo a Tsedekia, ba mo tlema ka ditlemo, ba mo iša Babilona." 
2Kings25:8 Ka kgwedi ya bohlano, ka letšatši la bošupa la kgwedi, e lego ngwaga wa lesomeseswai wa pušo ya Kgoši Nebukadinetsara kgoši ya Babilona, Nebusaradani molaodi wa baleti, mohlanka wa kgoši ya Babilona, a tla Jerusalema." 
2Kings25:9 A fiša ntlo ya Jehofa le ntlo ya kgoši le dintlo ka moka tša Jerusalema, le ntlo ya motho yo mongwe le yo mongwe yo mogolo a fiša ka mollo." 
2Kings25:10 Madira ka moka a Bakaladea ao a bego a na le molaodi a phušola merako ya Jerusalema gohle. 
2Kings25:11 Nebusaradane molaodi wa bahlapetši o ile a ba tšea batho ba bangwe ka moka bao ba bego ba šetše motseng le bafaladi bao ba ilego ba wela kgoši ya Babilona gotee le mašaledi a lešaba. 
2Kings25:12 Eupša molaodi wa bahlapetši a tlogela badiidi kudu mo nageng gore e be balemi ba merara le balemi. 
2Kings25:13 Bakaladea ba thuba dikokwane tša tempele tšeo di bego di le ka ntlong ya Jehofa le dibjana le letamo tšeo di bego di le ka ntlong ya Jehofa, ba thuba tempele gomme ba iša tempele go tloga go bona go ya Babilona." 
2Kings25:14 Dipitša, digarafo, disnufer le dikhaba le dibjana ka moka tša koporo tšeo ba bego ba hlankela ka tšona, ba tšea." 
2Kings25:15 Molaodi wa bahlapetši o ile a tšea ditšhitswana tša mollo le dibjana le gauta ka moka, gauta le silifera le silifera." 
2Kings25:16 Dikokwane tše pedi, lewatle le tee le metheo yeo Solomone a e diretšego ntlo ya Jehofa; Koporo ya dilo tše ka moka e be e se na boima." 
2Kings25:17 Bophagamo bja kokwane e tee e be e le dikubiti tše lesomeseswai, motse-mošate wa yona e be e le koporo, bophagamo bja yona e be e le dikubiti tše tharo; le diphaphathi tša sehuba, le diphaphathi tše di bego di le godimo ga hlogo, ka moka e le tša koporo;" 
2Kings25:18 Molaodi wa bahlapetši a tšea Seraya moperisita yo mogolo le Tsefanya moperisita wa bobedi le baleti ba bararo ba mojako. 
2Kings25:19 Go tšwa motseng a tšea mohlankedi yo a bego a okametše bagale, le banna ba bahlano ba maphodisa a kgoši bao ba hweditšwego motseng, le mongwaledi wa makgotla, bao kgoši e ba kgethilego. Batho ba naga le banna ba masometshela ba batho ba naga yeo ba hweditšwego motseng;" 
2Kings25:20 Ka gona Nebusaradane molaodi wa bahlapetši a ba tšea, a ba tliša go Ribla kgoši ya Babilona." 
2Kings25:21 Kgoši ya Babilona ya ba otla gomme ya ba bolaya kua Ribla nageng ya Hamathe. Ke ka baka leo Juda e ilego ya tlošwa nageng ya bona. 
2Kings25:22 Ge e le batho bao ba šetšego nageng ya Juda, bao Nebukadinetsara kgoši ya Babilona a ba tlogetšego, a bea Gedalia morwa wa Ahikama morwa wa Shafane kgoši ya bona." 
2Kings25:23 Ge balaodi ka moka ba madira, bona le banna ba bona ba ekwa gore kgoši ya Babilona e beile Gedalia go ba mmušiši, ba tla Gedalia kua Mitsipa: Ishimaele morwa wa Nethania, Johanane morwa wa Kera le Seraya; Lesea. Wa Tanhumethe, le Banetofa, le Jaasania morwa wa Mohathe, bona le banna ba bona." 
2Kings25:24 Gedalia a ba ena le banna ba bona a re go bona: “Le se ke la boifa go ba bahlanka ba Bakaladea. Dula nageng yeo, le hlankele kgoši ya Babilona; gomme o tla loka." 
2Kings25:25 Eupša ka kgwedi ya bošupa Ishmaele morwa wa Nethania, morwa wa Elisama, wa lapa la bogoši, a tla a bolaya banna ba lesome le yena le Gedalia, gomme a hwa le Bajuda le Bakaladea bao ba bego ba na le yena kua Mitsipa." 
2Kings25:26 Batho ka moka, ba banyenyane le ba bagolo, le balaodi ba madira, ba tsoga ba tla Egipita, ka gobane ba be ba boifa Bakaladea." 
2Kings25:27 Ka ngwaga wa masometharo-šupa wa go thopša ga Jehoyakine kgoši ya Juda, ka kgwedi ya lesomepedi, ka letšatši la masomepedi-šupa la kgwedi, Evi-Merodake kgoši ya Babilona a ba kgoši. Go buša, go phagamišwa. Hlogo ya Joyakini kgoši ya Juda e ile ya tšwa kgolegong;" 
2Kings25:28 A bolela le yena ka botho, a bea sedulo sa gagwe sa bogoši ka godimo ga sedulo sa bogoši sa dikgoši tšeo di bego di na le yena kua Babilona." 
2Kings25:29 A apara diaparo tša gagwe tša kgolego, a ja senkgwa pele ga gagwe matšatši ka moka a bophelo bja gagwe." 
2Kings25:30 Tefo ya gagwe e be e le tefo ya ka mehla yeo a e newago ke kgoši, e lego tekanyo ya letšatši le lengwe le le lengwe, matšatšing ka moka a bophelo bja gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adama, Sethe, Enose," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenane, Mahalalele, Jarede," 
1Chronicles1:3 Henoke, Methusela, Lameke," 
1Chronicles1:4 Noage, Seme, Hama le Jafete." 
1Chronicles1:5 Barwa ba Jafete e be e le Gomere, Magogo, Madai, Javane, Tubala, Mesheke le Tirase." 
1Chronicles1:6 Le barwa ba Gomere; Ashkenase, le Rifate le Togarema." 
1Chronicles1:7 Barwa ba Jafane e be e le Elisha le Tarashishi, Kitime le Dodanime." 
1Chronicles1:8 Le barwa ba Hama; Kushe le Mizraime, Put le Kanana." 
1Chronicles1:9 Barwa ba Kushe e be e le Seba, le Havila, le Sabata, le Raama le Sabetega. Barwa ba Raama; Bona gape le Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushe a tswala Nimirothe; a thoma go ba le maatla lefaseng. 
1Chronicles1:11 Mizraime a tswala Lude, Anamime, Hababe, le Futuhime;" 
1Chronicles1:12 le Patrusime le Kasluhime, Bafilisita le Bakafitori ba tšwago kae." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanana a tswala Sidone leitšibulo la gagwe le Hethe. 
1Chronicles1:14 Le Bajebuse, le Baamore, le Bagiregashe;" 
1Chronicles1:15 Baheve le Baaraki le Batsini; 
1Chronicles1:16 le ma-Arvadia, le ma-Semare, le Ditsebi tša Dipalo." 
1Chronicles1:17 Barwa ba Seme; Elama, le Asure, le Arfaksade, le Lude, le Siria, le Use, le Hule, le Gethere, le Mesheke." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpakshade a tswala Shela, Shela a tswala Ebere." 
1Chronicles1:19 Ebere a belegelwa barwa ba babedi, leina la yo mongwe e be e le Pelege; gobane mehleng ya gagwe lefase le be le arogane, leina la ngwanabo e be e le Jokitane." 
1Chronicles1:20 Jokotane a tswala Almodade, Shelefe, Hatsamethe, Jerak;" 
1Chronicles1:21 le Hadorama, le Usale, le Dikla;" 
1Chronicles1:22 le Ebale, le Abimaele, le Sheba;" 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofire, Havila le Jobabe. Ba ka moka e be e le barwa ba Jokotane." 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofire, Havila le Jobabe. Ba ka moka e be e le barwa ba Jokotane." 
1Chronicles1:24 Seme, le Arfaksade, le Shela;" 
1Chronicles1:25 Ebere, Pelege, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugo, Nahoro, Tera." 
1Chronicles1:27 Aborama; ke yena Aborahama. 
1Chronicles1:28 Barwa ba Aborahama; Isaka le Ishmaele. 
1Chronicles1:29 Meloko ya bona ke ye: Maitšibulo a Ishmaele, e lego Nebayothe; le Kedare, le Adbeele, le Mibisame;" 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishma le Duma, Massa, Hadada le Tema;" 
1Chronicles1:31 Jeture, Nafishi le Kedema. Ba ke barwa ba Ishmaele." 
1Chronicles1:32 Barwa ba Ketura, mosadi wa serethe wa Aborahama: o belege Tsimerane, Jokshane, Medane, Midiane, Ishibake le Shuaga. Barwa ba Jokshane; Bona gape le Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:33 Le bana ba Midiane; Efa le Efere le Henoge le Abida le Eldaa. Bohle ba ke barwa ba Ketura. 
1Chronicles1:34 Aborahama a tswala Isaka. Barwa ba Isaka; Esau le Isiraele. 
1Chronicles1:35 Barwa ba Esau e be e le Elifase, Reuel le Jeushe, Jaalame le Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Barwa ba Elifase; Temane le Omare, Tsefi le Gathame, Kenase le Timna, le Amaleke." 
1Chronicles1:37 Barwa ba Reuele ke Nahathe, Sera, Shama le Misa." 
1Chronicles1:38 Barwa ba Seire e be e le Lotane, Shobale, Tsibeone, Ana, Dishone, Esere le Dishane." 
1Chronicles1:39 Barwa ba Lotane e be e le Hori le Homame, Timina e be e le ngwanabo Lotane." 
1Chronicles1:40 Barwa ba Shobala; Alan, Manahathe, Ebala, Shefi le Oname. Le bana ba Tsibeone; Aia, le Hannah." 
1Chronicles1:41 Barwa ba Ana; Go hloka tlhompho. Le barwa ba Dishone; Amerama, le Eshbane, le Itherane le Kerane." 
1Chronicles1:42 Barwa ba Esere e be e le Bilhane, Tsafane le Jakane. Barwa ba Dishane; Utse o mo Aran." 
1Chronicles1:43 Bjale tše ke dikgoši tšeo di ilego tša buša nageng ya Edomo pele ga ge kgoši le ge e le efe e buša bana ba Isiraele; Bela morwa wa Beore, leina la motse wa gagwe e be e le Dinhaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela a hwa, gomme Jobabe morwa wa Sera wa Botsera a buša legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela a hwa, gomme Jobabe morwa wa Sera wa Botsera a buša legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobabe a hwa, Hushame wa naga ya Bathane a buša legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobabe a hwa, Hushame wa naga ya Bathane a buša legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:46 Hushame a hwa, gomme Hadada morwa wa Bedada, yo a ilego a fenya Midiane nageng ya Moaba, a buša legatong la gagwe; leina la motse wa gagwe e be e le Avithe." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadada a hwa, Samla wa Masreka a buša legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:48 Samla a hwa, Shaulo wa Rehobothe kgauswi le noka a buša legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:49 Ge Saulo a hwile, Baalhanani morwa wa Akibore a buša legatong la gagwe." 
1Chronicles1:50 Baali-Hanane a hwa, Hadada a buša legatong la gagwe; leina la motse wa gagwe e be e le Pai; leina la mosadi wa gagwe e be e le Mehetabele morwedi wa Matrede morwedi wa Metsahaba." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadada le yena a hwa. Tsena ke dikgošana tša Edomo; Kgošana Timna, Mohumagadi Aliah, Mohumagadi Jethethe."

1Chronicles1:54 Hosana Magdiele, Hosana Irame. Tše ke dikgošana tša Edomo." 
1Chronicles2:1 Ba ke bana ba Isiraele; Rubeni, Simeone, Lefi, le Juda, le Isakara, le Sebulone;" 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Josefa, le Benjamine, Nafutali, Gade, le Ashere." 
1Chronicles2:3 Barwa ba Juda; Onane le Shela; ba bararo ba belegetšwe Shua wa Mokanana. Ere, leitšibulo la Juda, e be e le yo kgopo mahlong a Jehofa; a mmolaya." 
1Chronicles2:4 Thamara morwedi wa gagwe a mo belegelwa Farese le Sara; Barwa ka moka ba Juda e be e le ba bahlano. 
1Chronicles2:5 Barwa ba Perese e be e le Hetserone le Hamule. 
1Chronicles2:6 Barwa ba Serah; Simri, Ethan, Hemane, Calcol le Dara, ba bahlano ka moka." 
1Chronicles2:7 Barwa ba Karami e be e le Akara, moapostola wa Isiraele, yo a dirilego sebe selong seo se rogilwego." 
1Chronicles2:8 Barwa ba Ethane e be e le Asaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Le barwa ba Hetserone bao a ba belegetšwego; Jeremia le Rama le Kelubai. 
1Chronicles2:10 Rama a tswala Aminate. Aminadaba a tswala Nahashone, kgošana ya bana ba Juda;" 
1Chronicles2:11 Nasoni a tswala Salma, Salma a tswala Boase." 
1Chronicles2:12 Boase a tswala Obede, Obede a tswala Jese." 
1Chronicles2:13 Jese a tswala leitšibulo la gagwe Eliaba, wa bobedi Abinadaba, wa boraro Shimea." 
1Chronicles2:14 Nethanele wa bone, Radai wa bohlano;" 
1Chronicles2:15 Oseme wa botshelela, Dafida wa bošupa;" 
1Chronicles2:16 Dikgaetšedi tša gagwe e be e le Tseruya le Abigaile. Barwa ba Tseruya e be e le Abisai, le Joaba, le Asahele, ba bararo." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaile a belega Amasa, tatago Amasa e be e le Jethere wa Moishimaele." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebe morwa wa Hetsirone a tswala bana ba Asuba mosadi wa gagwe le Jeriothe. Ba ke barwa ba gagwe; Jesere, le Shobabe, le Ardone." 
1Chronicles2:19 Ge Azuba a hwile, Kalebe a tšea Efrathe, yo a mo belegetšego Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri a tswala Uri, Uri a tswala Betsalele." 
1Chronicles2:21 Ka morago ga moo Hetserone a ya go morwedi wa Magire tatago Gileade, yoo a mo nyetšego ge a be a na le mengwaga ye masometshela; a belega Segube." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segube a tswala Jaire, yo a bego a na le metse e 23 nageng ya Gileade." 
1Chronicles2:23 A tšea Gesure le Siria gotee le metse ya Jaire go bona, le Kenate le metse ya yona, e lego metse e masome a masome a masome a masome a bona." 
1Chronicles2:24 Ka morago ga ge Heserone a hwile kua Kalebe Efrata, Abia mosadi wa Hetsirone a mo belegelwa Ashuru tatago Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Barwa ba Jerameele leitšibulo la Hetsirone e be e le Rama leitšibulo, Buna, Orene, Oseme, Ahija." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerameele le yena o be a na le mosadi yo mongwe yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Atara; o mosadi wa rena Onam. 
1Chronicles2:27 Barwa ba Rama leitšibulo la Jerameele e be e le Maase, Jamine le Ekere." 
1Chronicles2:28 Barwa ba Oname e be e le Shamai le Jada. Le barwa ba Shamai; Nadaba le Abishure. 
1Chronicles2:29 Leina la mosadi wa Abishure e be e le Abihaile, gomme a mo belegela Agbane le Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Barwa ba Nadaba e be e le Selede le Apaime, eupša Selede a hwa a se na bana." 
1Chronicles2:31 Barwa ba Apaime ke Ishi. Barwa ba Jishi; Sheshane ya. Barwa ba Sheshane; Tla. 
1Chronicles2:32 Barwa ba Jada ngwanabo Shamai; Jethere le Jonathane, le Jethere ba hwa ba se na bana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Barwa ba Jonathane; Peleth le Zaza. Ba e be e le barwa ba Jerameele. 
1Chronicles2:34 Bjale Sheshane o be a se na barwa, a na le barwedi feela. Seshane o be a na le mohlanka wa Moegepeta, yo leina la gagwe e bego e le Jara." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshane a nea Jaha mohlanka wa gagwe morwedi wa gagwe gore e be mosadi wa gagwe; a mo belegelwa Athai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai a tswala Nathane, Nathane a tswala Tsabade." 
1Chronicles2:37 Sabade a tswala Efale, Efale a tswala Obede." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obede a tswala Jehu, Jehu a tswala Asaria." 
1Chronicles2:39 Asaria a tswala Heles, Heles a tswala Eliya." 
1Chronicles2:40 Eliya a tswala Shishamai, Shishamai a tswala Shalume." 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalume a tswala Jekamia, Jekamia a tswala Elisama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Barwa ba Kalebe ngwanabo Jerameele e be e le Mesha leitšibulo la gagwe, yo e bego e le tatago Tsife; le barwa ba Maresha tatago Heburone." 
1Chronicles2:43 Barwa ba Heburone ke Kora, Tapua, Rekeme le Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema a tswala Rahame tatago Johoama le Rekeme tatago Shamai. 
1Chronicles2:45 Morwa wa Shamai e be e le Maone; 
1Chronicles2:46 Efa serethe sa Kalebe, a belega Harane, Moshe le Gase; Harane a tswala Gase." 
1Chronicles2:47 Barwa ba Jagdai e be e le Regeme, Jothame, Geshane, Pelete, Efa, le Shafa." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka, mosadi wa serethe wa Kalebe, a belega Shebere le Tirhana." 
1Chronicles2:49 A belega Shaafe tatago Madmana, Sheva tatago Magbina le tatago Gibea; Morwa wa Kalebe e be e le Ahase." 
1Chronicles2:50 Ba ke barwa ba Kalebe morwa wa Huri, leitšibulo la Efurata; Shobale tatago Kiriate-Jearime;" 
1Chronicles2:51 Salma tatago Betlelehema, Haref tatago Bethe-Gadere." 
1Chronicles2:52 Shoba tatago Kiriathe-Jearime o be a na le barwa; Ba Manase ba bararo le seripa. 
1Chronicles2:53 Le malapa a Kiriathe-jearime; ba Baite, ba Pug, ba Sumathe le Baegepeta; go bona go ile gwa theoga ma-Basare le ma-Stauli." 
1Chronicles2:54 Barwa ba Salma; Betlelehema, le Banetofi, le Atarothe, ntlo ya Joaba, le seripa sa Bamanake le Batsori." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ditlogolo tša bamangwalo bao ba bego ba dula Jabose; le Ba-Hammers, le Bashime, le Basugathe. Ba ke Bakanana bao ba tšwago Hemathe, tatago lapa la Rekabe." 
1Chronicles3:1 Ba e be e le barwa ba Dafida, bao a ba belegetšwego Heburone; leitšibulo, Aminone, wa Ahinoama wa Mojeseriele; Daniele wa bobedi, wa Abigaile wa Mokarmele;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Ba e be e le barwa ba Dafida, bao a ba belegetšwego Heburone; leitšibulo, Aminone, wa Ahinoama wa Mojeseriele; Daniele wa bobedi, wa Abigaile wa Mokarmele;" 
1Chronicles3:2 wa boraro e be e le Abesalomo morwa wa Maaka, morwa wa Talmai, kgoši ya Gesure; wa bone e be e le Adoniya morwa wa Hagithe;" 
1Chronicles3:3 wa bohlano e be e le Shefatia wa Abitale; wa botshelela e be e le Jitreame ka Egla mosadi wa gagwe. 
1Chronicles3:4 Ba ba tshelelago ba ba belegetšwe Heburone; a buša moo ka nywaga e šupago le dikgwedi tše tshela, gomme a buša kua Jerusalema ka nywaga e masometharo-tharo." 
1Chronicles3:5 Ba ba belegetšwe yena Jerusalema; Shimea, le Shobabe, le Nathane, le Solomone, ba bane, le Batse-shua morwa wa Amiele;" 
1Chronicles3:6 le Jibara, le Elisama, le Elifelete;" 
1Chronicles3:7 le Noga, le Nefege, le Jafia;" 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisama, Eliada le Elifelete, ba seswai ba bona." 
1Chronicles3:9 Ba ka moka e be e le barwa ba Dafida, ka ntle le barwa ba direthe le Thamara kgaetšedi ya bona." 
1Chronicles3:10 Barwa ba Solomone e be e le Rehoboama morwa wa gagwe, Abia morwa wa gagwe, Asa morwa wa gagwe, Jehoshafate morwa wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles3:11 Jorama morwa wa gagwe, Ahasia morwa wa gagwe, Joase morwa wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles3:12 Amatsia morwa wa gagwe, Asaria morwa wa gagwe, Jothame morwa wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahasi morwa wa gagwe, Hiskia morwa wa gagwe, Manase morwa wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles3:14 Amoni morwa wa gagwe, Josia morwa wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles3:15 Barwa ba Josia e be e le wa pele Johanani, wa bobedi e le Jehoyakime, wa boraro e le Tsedekia, wa bone e be e le Shalume." 
1Chronicles3:16 Barwa ba Jehoyakime e be e le Jekonia morwa wa gagwe le Tsedekia morwa wa gagwe. 
1Chronicles3:17 Barwa ba Jekonia e be e le Asiri morwa wa gagwe Shealtiele; 
1Chronicles3:18 le Malakirama, le Pedaya, le Shenatsare, le Jekamia, le Hoshama le Nedabia." 
1Chronicles3:19 Barwa ba Pedaya e be e le Serubabele le Shimei; le barwa ba Serubabele; Meshulame, Hanania le Shelomithe bana babo bona;" 
1Chronicles3:20 Hashuba, Ohele, Beria, Hasadia, Jushabetsede, ba bahlano." 
1Chronicles3:21 Barwa ba Hanania; Pelatia le Jeshaya: barwa ba Refaya, barwa ba Arnane, barwa ba Obadia, barwa ba Shegania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Barwa ba Shegania; le barwa ba Shemaya; Hatu, le Jigale, le Baria, le Nearia, le Shafate, ba tshelela." 
1Chronicles3:23 Barwa ba Nearia; Eljonai, Hiskia le Azrikama, ba bararo." 
1Chronicles3:24 Barwa ba Elioenai e be e le Hodaya, Eliashibe, Pelaya, Akube, Johanane, Dalaia le Anani, e le ba šupago." 
1Chronicles4:1 Barwa ba Juda; Peretz, Heserone, Karmi, Huri le Shoba." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaya morwa wa Shobala a tswala Jahathe; Jahathe a tswala Akumai le Lahade. A ke malapa a Batsora. 
1Chronicles4:3 Ba e be e le botatago Etame; le Jeseriele, le Ishma, le Idbashe; mme leina la kgaetšedi ya bona e be e le Hazelponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Le Penuele tatago Gedoro le Esere tatago Husha. Ba ke barwa ba Huri, leitšibulo la Efurata, tatago Betlelehema." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashure tatago Tekoa o be a na le basadi ba babedi, e lego Hela le Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara a mo tswalela Ahusame, Hefere, Temeni, Hahashatari. Ba e be e le barwa ba Naära." 
1Chronicles4:7 Barwa ba Hela e be e le Tserete le Itsoara le Ethanane. 
1Chronicles4:8 Kose a tswala Anube le Tsobeba le malapa a Ahare morwa wa Harume. 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabese o be a hlomphega go feta bana babo; mme mmagwe a mo rea leina la Jabese, a re: Ka gobane ke mo belege ka manyami." 
1Chronicles4:10 Jaebetz o ile a lopa Modimo wa Isiraele a re: “Wena ge e ba ruri o rata go ntšhegofatša le go katološa naga ya ka, e le gore seatla sa gago se be godimo ga ka le gore o nthibele bobe, e le gore bo se ke bja ba bohloko!” Gomme Modimo a mo fa seo a se kgopetšego." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelube ngwanabo Shua a tswala Mehire, tatago Eshitone." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshitone a tswala Betrafa, Pasha, le Tehinna tatago Irinahase. Ba ke banna ba Rega." 
1Chronicles4:13 Barwa ba Kenase e be e le Othiniele le Seraya. Le barwa ba Othiniele; Hathati. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonothai a tswala Ofura, Seraya a tswala Joaba, tatago moeding wa Keratsime. Gobane e be e le ditsebi tša diatla." 
1Chronicles4:15 Le barwa ba Kalebe morwa wa Jefune; Iru, Ela le Naame; barwa ba Ela e be e le Kenase." 
1Chronicles4:16 Barwa ba Jehalelele ke Tsife le Tsifa, Tiria le Asarele." 
1Chronicles4:17 Barwa ba Esera e be e le Jethere, Mered, Efere le Jalone; A belega Miriama, Shammai le Ishiba, tatago Estemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Juda mosadi wa gagwe a belega Jarede tatago Gedoro, Hebere tatago Sogo le Jekuthiele tatago Tsenoa. Ba ke barwa ba Bithia morwedi wa Farao, yoo Merede a mo nyetšego." 
1Chronicles4:19 Barwa ba mosadi wa gagwe Hodia kgaetšedi ya Nahame, tatago Keila wa Mogareme le Estemoa wa Mogatha." 
1Chronicles4:20 Barwa ba Shimone e be e le Aminone le Rina le Bene-Hanane le Tilone. Barwa ba Ishi e be e le Suhethe le Ben-tsohethe. 
1Chronicles4:21 Barwa ba Shela morwa wa Juda: Ere tatago Leka, Laada tatago Maresha, le malapa a ntlo ya ditsebi tša diatla, ntlong ya Akibea;" 
1Chronicles4:22 le Jokime, le banna ba Koseba, le Joase, le Seraf, bao ba bušitšego Moaba le Jashubilehema. Gomme tše ke dilo tša kgale." 
1Chronicles4:23 Ba e be e le babepi ba dipitša, le bao ba bego ba dula gare ga dithokgwa, ba dula moo le kgoši ka baka la modiro wa yona." 
1Chronicles4:24 Barwa ba Simeone e be e le Nemuele, Jamine, Jaribe, Sara le Shaulo." 
1Chronicles4:25 Shalume morwa wa gagwe, Mibisame morwa wa gagwe, Mishma morwa wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles4:26 Barwa ba Mishima e be e le Hamuele morwa wa gagwe, Sagure morwa wa gagwe, Shimei morwa wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei o be a na le barwa ba lesometshela le barwedi ba tshela; eupša bana babo ba be ba se na bana ba bantši, gomme ditlogolo tša bona ka moka e be e le tše dintši go swana le ditlogolo tša Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Ba dula Bereseba, Molada le Hasara." 
1Chronicles4:29 Biliha, le Esem, le Tolade;" 
1Chronicles4:30 le Bethuele, le Horma, le Tsikelage;" 
1Chronicles4:31 le Bethe-marabothe, le Hatsaro, le Bethe-Birei, le Shaaraime; Metse yeo e be e le metse ya bona go fihla pušong ya Dafida." 
1Chronicles4:32 Metse ya bona e be e le Etame, Aine, Rimone, Tokene, le Ashane, e lego metse e mehlano." 
1Chronicles4:33 Metse ya bona ka moka yeo e bego e dikologile metse ye go fihla Baali. Tše e be e le madulo a bona le moloko wa bona. 
1Chronicles4:34 Le Mesobabe, le Jameleke, le Josha morwa wa Amatsia." 
1Chronicles4:35 Le Joele, le Jehu morwa wa Joshibia, morwa wa Seraya, morwa wa Asiele." 
1Chronicles4:35 Le Joele, le Jehu morwa wa Joshibia, morwa wa Seraya, morwa wa Asiele." 
1Chronicles4:36 Le Elionenai, Jakobo, Johane, Asaya, Adiele, Jeshmiele le Benaya;" 
1Chronicles4:37 le Shisha morwa wa Tsifi, morwa wa Arone, morwa wa Jedaya, morwa wa Simiri, morwa wa Shemaya;" 
1Chronicles4:38 Ba ba boletšwego ka maina e be e le dikgošana ka malapeng a bona, gomme ntlo ya borakgolokhukhu ba bona e be e le e kgolo kudu." 
1Chronicles4:39 Ba ya mojakong wa Gedoro, ka thoko ya ka bohlabela ya moedi, ba yo tsoma mafulo a mehlape ya bona." 
1Chronicles4:40 Ba hwetša mafulo a humilego le a bose; gobane batho ba Hama ba be ba dula moo kgale. 
1Chronicles4:41 Tšeo di ngwadilwego ka maina di tlile mehleng ya Hesekia kgoši ya Juda, tša phušola ditente tša tšona le mešaša ya tšona, gomme ke ditente. Mafulo a mehlape ya bona." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ba bangwe ba bona, e lego barwa ba Simeone, banna ba makgolo a mahlano, ba ya thabeng ya Seire, ba na le balaodi ba bona Pelatia, Nearia, Refaya le Usiele, barwa ba Ishi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Ba bolaya Baamaleke ba bangwe bao ba šetšego, ba dula moo go fihla le lehono." 
1Chronicles5:1 Barwa ba Rubeni leitšibulo la Isiraele; eupša ka ge a be a šilafaditše malao a tatagwe, tshwanelo ya gagwe ya matswalo e ile ya newa barwa ba Josefa morwa wa Isiraele; tokelo ya matswalo." 
1Chronicles5:2 Gobane Juda e tiile go feta bana babo, gomme go tšwa go yena go tlile kgošana. Eupša tshwanelo ya matswalo e be e le ya Josefa." 
1Chronicles5:3 Barwa ba Rubeni leitšibulo la Isiraele e be e le Hanok le Palu, Hetsirone le Karami." 
1Chronicles5:4 Barwa ba Joele; Semaya morwa wa gagwe, Gogo morwa wa gagwe, Shimei morwa wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles5:4 Barwa ba Joele; Semaya morwa wa gagwe, Gogo morwa wa gagwe, Shimei morwa wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles5:5 Mika morwa wa gagwe, Reaya morwa wa gagwe, Baali morwa wa gagwe;" 
1Chronicles5:6 Beera morwa wa gagwe, yo a ilego a mo iša bothopša go Tiligathe-pilenesere kgoši ya Asiria; e be e le moetapele wa Barubeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Bana babo bona go ya ka malapa a bona e be e le Jeiele le Sakaria, e lego dihlogo tša malapa a botatago bona." 
1Chronicles5:8 Bela morwa wa Asase, morwa wa Shema, morwa wa Joele, yo a bego a dula Aroere, go fihla Nebo le Baalimeone;" 
1Chronicles5:8 Bela morwa wa Asase, morwa wa Shema, morwa wa Joele, yo a bego a dula Aroere, go fihla Nebo le Baalimeone;" 
1Chronicles5:9 Ka bohlabela a dula lešokeng go fihla Nokeng ya Eforate, ka gobane diruiwa tša bona di be di atile nageng ya Gileada." 
1Chronicles5:10 Mehleng ya Saulo ba lwa le Bahagari bao ba ilego ba wa ka diatla tša bona, ba dula ditenteng tša bona nageng ka moka ya ka bohlabela ya Gileada." 
1Chronicles5:11 Barwa ba Gade ba dula ka mošola wa bona, nageng ya Bashane go fihla Salega." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joele molaodi, Safame wa bobedi, Janai le Shafate kua Bashane." 
1Chronicles5:12 Joele molaodi, Safame wa bobedi, Janai le Shafate kua Bashane." 
1Chronicles5:13 Bana babo bona ba ntlong ya borakgolokhukhu ba bona e be e le Mikaele le Meshulama le Sheba le Jorai le Jagane le Tsia le Hebere, ba šupago." 
1Chronicles5:14 Ba e be e le barwa ba Abihaile, morwa wa Huri, morwa wa Jaroa, morwa wa Gileada, morwa wa Mikaele, morwa wa Jese, morwa wa Jahedo, morwa wa Buse;" 
1Chronicles5:15 Aki morwa wa Abdiele, morwa wa Guni, kgošana ya malapa a borakgolokhukhu ba bona." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ba dula Gileade kua Bashane le mafulong ka moka a yona le mafulong ka moka a Sharone, mellwaneng ya bona." 
1Chronicles5:17 Tše ka moka di ile tša balwa go ya ka mašika a Jothama kgoši ya Juda le mehleng ya Jeroboama kgoši ya Isiraele. 
1Chronicles5:18 Go bana ba Rubeni le bana ba Gada le seripa-gare sa moloko wa Manase e be e le banna ba bagale ba dikete tše masomenne-nne-makgološupa bao ba itlhamilego ka bora le tšhoša; go ya ntweng. 
1Chronicles5:19 Gomme ba lwa le Bahagari, le Jethere, le Nefi, le Nodabe." 
1Chronicles5:20 Ba thušwa go lwa le bona, gomme Bahagari ba gafelwa diatleng tša bona le bohle bao ba bego ba na le bona; ka gobane ba be ba Mo tshepile." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ba tšea mehlape ya bona; dikamela tša bona e be e le dinku tše 50 000 le tše 500, ditonki tše 2 000 le banna ba 100 000." 
1Chronicles5:22 Gobane go ile gwa wa ba bantši bao ba bolailwego, ka gobane ntwa e be e le ya Modimo. Ka gona ba dula lefelong la bona go fihlela ba ya bothopša." 
1Chronicles5:23 Barwa ba seripa sa moloko wa Manase ba be ba dula nageng yeo; ba dula go tloga Bashane go fihla Baalhermone le Senire, go fihla thabeng ya Heremone." 
1Chronicles5:24 Ba e be e le dihlogo tša malapa a botatago bona: Efere, Ishi, Eliele, Asriele, Jeremia, Hodavia le Jahadiele, banna ba bagale, banna ba tumilego, dihlogo tša malapa a botatago bona." 
1Chronicles5:25 Ba thoma go dira sebe malebana le Modimo wa borakgolokhukhu ba bona le go ba le ditswalano tša boitshwaro bjo bo gobogilego le medimo ya ditšhaba tša naga yeo Modimo a e fedišitšego pele ga bona. 
1Chronicles5:26 Ke moka Modimo wa Isiraele a ba tlišetša moya wa Puli kgoši ya Asiria le moya wa Tiligathe-pilenesere kgoši ya Asiria, go bona wa Barubeni le Bagada le seripa-gare sa moloko wa Manase. A dula Hala, le Habore, le Hari, ho fihlela nokeng ya Gosane, ho fihlela kajeno."

1Chronicles6:61 Barwa ba Kohathe bao ba šetšego malapeng a moloko wa Manase ba newa metse e lesome go tšwa go seripa sa moloko. 
1Chronicles6:62 Ba e be e le barwa ba Gersom go ya ka malapa a bona go tšwa molokong wa Isakara, moloko wa Ashere, moloko wa Nafutali le molokong wa Manase kua Bashane."

1Chronicles6:64 Bana ba Isiraele ba nea Balefi metse ye le mafulo a yona. 
1Chronicles6:65 Ba neela ka matengwa molokong wa bana ba Juda le molokong wa bana ba Simeone le molokong wa bana ba Benjamine metse ye e bitšwago ka maina a yona.

1Chronicles7:1 Barwa ba Isakara e be e le Tola, le Pua, Jashube, le Shimrone, ba bane." 
1Chronicles7:2 Barwa ba Tola; Usi, le Refaya, le Jeriele, le Jahmai, le Jibsama, le Shemuele, e lego dihlogo tša malapa a botatago bona, ba kua Tola; e be e le bahlabani ba sebete melokong ya bona; bao palo ya bona mehleng ya Dafida e bego e le 22 006." 
1Chronicles7:3 Barwa ba Usi e be e le barwa ba Izragia; Mikaele, Obadia, Joele, Isiya, mengwaga ye mehlano, ka moka ke dihlogo." 
1Chronicles7:3 Barwa ba Usi e be e le barwa ba Izragia; Mikaele, Obadia, Joele, Isiya, mengwaga ye mehlano, ka moka ke dihlogo." 
1Chronicles7:4 Gotee le bona, go ya ka malapa a bona, go ya ka malapa a borakgolokhukhu ba bona, go be go na le dihlopha tša bagale ba dikete tše masometharo-tshela, ka gobane ba be ba na le basadi ba bantši le barwa." 
1Chronicles7:5 Bana babo bona gare ga malapa ka moka a Isakare e be e le banna ba bagale ba matla, ba balwa ka moka go ya ka mašika a bona e le ba dikete tše masomeseswai-šupa." 
1Chronicles7:6 Barwa ba Benjamini; Bela le Beker le di-Jediael tše tharo. 
1Chronicles7:7 Barwa ba Bela; Ebone, le Usi, le Usiele, le Jerimothe, le Iri, ba bahlano; dihlogo tša malapa a botatago bona, banna ba bagale; go ya ka malapa a bona go be go e-na le ba 22 034." 
1Chronicles7:8 Barwa ba Begere; Shemira, Joase, Eliesere, Elienai, Omiri, Jerimothe, Abia, Anathothe, le Alemethe. Ka moka ga bona ke barwa ba Begere." 
1Chronicles7:9 Palo ya bona go ya ka meloko ya bona, go ya ka malapa a bona, go ya ka dihlogo tša malapa a botatago bona, banna ba bagale, e be e le ba dikete tše masomepedi-makgolopedi." 
1Chronicles7:10 Barwa ba Jediaele; Bilihane le barwa ba Bilhane; Jesu le Benjamine le Ehude le Kanana le Sathane le Tarashishe le Ahishakara. 
1Chronicles7:11 Barwa ka moka ba barwa ba Jediaele, go ya ka dihlogo tša borakgolokhukhu ba bona, banna ba bagale, e be e le banna ba ntwa ba 17 200." 
1Chronicles7:12 Le Shupime le Hupime, barwa ba Ire, le Hushime, barwa ba Ahere." 
1Chronicles7:13 Barwa ba Naftali e be e le Jahigiele, Guni, Jesere le Shalume barwa ba Bilha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Barwa ba Manase e be e le Asriele; mosadi wa gagwe wa serethe, Mosiria, a belega Magire, tatago Gileade." 
1Chronicles7:15 Majire a tšea kgaetšedi ya Hupime le Shupime, yoo leina la kgaetšedi ya gagwe e bego e le Maga. Leina la wa bobedi e be e le Tselofehade; Tselofehade o be a na le barwedi." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maga mosadi wa Magi a belega morwa, a mo rea leina la Peresh. Leina la ngwanabo e be e le Tsereshe; barwa ba gagwe e be e le Ulama le Rakeme." 
1Chronicles7:17 Barwa ba Ulama ke eng? Ba e be e le barwa ba Gileade, morwa wa Magire, morwa wa Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Hamolekethe ngwanabo a belega Jesu le Abiesere le Mahala. 
1Chronicles7:19 Barwa ba Shemida e be e le Ahiane, Shekeme, Liki le Aniame." 
1Chronicles7:20 Barwa ba Efuraime e be e le Shuthela le Berede morwa wa gagwe le Tahathe morwa wa gagwe le Elada morwa wa gagwe le Tahathe morwa wa gagwe. 
1Chronicles7:21 Le Sabade morwa wa gagwe, le Shuthela morwa wa gagwe, le Esere le Eliada, bao ba bolailego banna ba Gathe bao ba belegwego nageng yeo, ka gobane ba theogile go yo tšea dikgomo tša bona." 
1Chronicles7:22 Efuraime tatago bona a lla matšatši a mantši, gomme bana babo ba tla go mo homotša." 
1Chronicles7:23 Ge a tsena go mosadi wa gagwe, a ima, a belega morwa, a mo rea leina la Beria, ka gobane go ile gwa senya ntlo ya gagwe."

1Chronicles9:1 Ka gona Baisiraele ka moka ba balwa ka malapa a bona; di ngwadilwe ka pukung ya dikgoši tša Isiraele le tša Juda, tšeo di ilego tša išwa bothopša Babilona;" 
1Chronicles9:2 Badudi ba pele bao ba ilego ba dula metseng ya bona e be e le Baisiraele, baperisita, Balefi le Banethinime." 
1Chronicles9:3 Bana ba Juda le bana ba Benjamini le ba Efuraime le Manase ba be ba dula Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles9:4 Uthai morwa wa Amihude, morwa wa Omri, morwa wa Imri, morwa wa Bani, wa bana ba Perese morwa wa Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Le ba Shilo; Baboledi e be e le Asaya le barwa ba gagwe. 
1Chronicles9:6 Go barwa ba Tsera; Jehuele le bana babo, ba 600, ba be ba le moo ba nnoši;" 
1Chronicles9:7 go barwa ba Benjamini; Salu, morwa wa Meshulame, morwa wa Hodavia, morwa wa Hasenua;" 
1Chronicles9:8 Ibnea morwa wa Jerohama, le Ela morwa wa Usi, morwa wa Migri, le Meshulame morwa wa Shefatia, morwa wa Ruele, morwa wa Ibnia;" 
1Chronicles9:9 Bana babo bona go ya ka ditlogolo tša bona e be e le makgolo a senyane-masomehlano-tshela. Banna ba ka moka e be e le dihlogo tša malapa a botatago bona. 
1Chronicles9:10 Le baperisita; Jedaya, Joyaribe le Jagine," 
1Chronicles9:11 le Asaria morwa wa Hilikia, morwa wa Meshulame, morwa wa Tsadoko, morwa wa Merayothe, morwa wa Ahitube, mmuši wa ntlo ya Modimo;" 
1Chronicles9:12 le Adaya morwa wa Jerohama, morwa wa Pashure, morwa wa Malakiya, le Masai morwa wa Adiele, morwa wa Jahigisere, morwa wa Meshulame, morwa wa Meshilememi, morwa wa Imere;" 
1Chronicles9:13 le bana babo bona, e lego dihlogo tša malapa a borakgolokhukhu ba bona, ba 1 700; banna ba bantši ba bokgoni bakeng sa modiro wa tirelo ya ntlo ya Modimo." 
1Chronicles9:14 Le ba Balefi; Semaya morwa wa Hashube, morwa wa Aserikamo, morwa wa Hashabia, wa barwa ba Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 Bakara, Hereshe, Galale, le Matania morwa wa Mika, morwa wa Tsigri, morwa wa Asafa;" 
1Chronicles9:16 le Obadia morwa wa Shemaya, morwa wa Galale, morwa wa Jeduthune, le Beria morwa wa Asa, morwa wa Elkana, yo a bego a dula metseng ya Banetofi." 
1Chronicles9:17 Baleti ba kgoro e be e le Shalume, Akube, Talmone, Ahimane le bana babo bona; Shalume e be e le hlogo;" 
1Chronicles9:18 go fihla ga bjale ba be ba letile kgorong ya kgoši ka bohlabela; e be e le baleti ba dikgoro ka dihlopha tša barwa ba Lefi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalume morwa wa Kora, morwa wa Abiasafa, morwa wa Kora, le bana babo ba barwa ba tatagwe, e lego Bakora, ba be ba okametše tirelo ya baleti ba mejako ya taberenakele ya kopano, le borakgolokhukhu ba bona, bao ba be ba okametše modiro wo. Bao ba bego ba okametše dikgoro tša Jehofa e be e le baleti ba dikgoro." 
1Chronicles9:20 Finease morwa wa Eleasara e be e le mmuši wa bona nakong e fetilego, Jehofa o be a na le yena." 
1Chronicles9:21 Sakaria morwa wa Meshelemia e be e le moleti wa mojako wa taberenakele ya kopano. 
1Chronicles9:22 Barwa ka moka bao ba kgethilwego go ba baleti ba dikgoro mejakong e be e le ba makgolo a mabedi le lesomepedi. Ba ba balwa go ya ka mašika metseng ya bona, yeo Dafida le Samuele mmoni ba e hlomilego melokong ya bona." 
1Chronicles9:23 Ka gona bona le bana ba bona ba be ba hlokometše dikgoro tša ntlo ya Jehofa, e lego ntlo ya taberenakele, ka bahlapetši." 
1Chronicles9:24 Baleti ba kgoro e be e le ka dikotara tše nne, ka bohlabela, bodikela, leboa le borwa." 
1Chronicles9:25 Bana babo bona bao ba bego ba le metseng ya bona ba be ba tla tla ka morago ga matšatši a šupago nako le nako le bona. 
1Chronicles9:26 Gobane Balefi ba, baleti ba bane ba bagolo ba dikgoro, ba be ba le mošomong wa bona gomme ba hlokometše diphapoši le matlotlo a ntlo ya Modimo wa therešo." 
1Chronicles9:27 Ba robala go dikologa Ngwako wa Modimo bošego ka moka, ka gobane molato o be o le godimo ga bona, mesong e mengwe le e mengwe ba e bula." 
1Chronicles9:28 Ba bangwe ba bona ba be ba na le boikarabelo bja modiro wa bodiredi, gore ba ba tliše le go ba ntšha pele ga bona." 
1Chronicles9:29 Ba bangwe ba bona ba ile ba kgethwa go hlokomela dibjana, le diletšo ka moka tša Sekgethwa, le senkgwa, le beine, le makhura, le diorelo le dinoko." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ba bangwe ba barwa ba baperisita ba dira setlolo sa dinoko. 
1Chronicles9:31 Matithia, yo mongwe wa Balefi, yo e bego e le leitšibulo la Shalume wa Momahorete, o be a na le mošomo wa go hlokomela dilo tšeo di dirilwego ka dipaneng." 
1Chronicles9:32 Bana babo bona ba bangwe ba barwa ba Bahethe ba be ba okametše dinkgwa tša pontšho, gore ba di lokišetše ka Sabatha e nngwe le e nngwe." 
1Chronicles9:33 Ba ke diopedi tše dikgolo tša borakgolokhukhu ba Balefi, bao ba bego ba dula diphapošing tšeo ba bego ba lokologile, ka gobane ba be ba thwetšwe modirong woo mosegare le bošego." 
1Chronicles9:34 Ba e be e le dihlogo tša malapa a botatago Balefi go ya ka malapa a bona; ba dula Jerusalema. 
1Chronicles9:35 Kua Gibeone, tatago Gibeone e be e le Jehiele, yoo leina la mosadi wa gagwe e bego e le Maaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Morwa wa gagwe wa leitšibulo Abdone, Tsure, Kishi, Baali, Nere le Nadabe;" 
1Chronicles9:37 le Gedoro, Ai, Sakaria le Miklothe." 
1Chronicles9:38 Miklothe a tswala Shimeame. Ba dula le bana babo bona Jerusalema, ba lebane le bana babo bona." 
1Chronicles9:39 Nere e be e le tatago Kishi. Kishi a tswala Saulo; Saulo a tswala Jonathane, Malkishua, Abinadaba, le Eshbaale." 
1Chronicles9:40 Morwa wa Jonathane e be e le Meriba-baali, mme Meribale e be e le tatago Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Barwa ba Mika e be e le Pithone, Meleke, Taria le Agashe." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahasi a tswala Jara; Jara a tswala Alemethe, Azmavethe, le Simiri; Tsimiri a tswala Moshe." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moshe a tswala Binea. Refaya morwa wa gagwe, Eliasa morwa wa gagwe, Asele morwa wa gagwe." 
1Chronicles9:44 Asele o be a na le barwa ba tshelelago, bao maina a bona e lego Asrikama, Bokeru, Ishmaele, Sheria, Obadia le Hanane. Ba e be e le barwa ba Asele." 
1Chronicles10:1 Bjale Bafilisita ba lwa le Isiraele; banna ba Isiraele ba tšhaba pele ga Bafilisita, ba wela fase ba bolailwe thabeng ya Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Bafilisita ba latela Saulo le barwa ba gagwe ka thata. Bafilisita ba bolaya Jonathane, Abinadaba, le Malkishua, barwa ba Saulo." 
1Chronicles10:3 Ntwa ya lwa le Saulo, gomme babetši ba mesebe ba mo otla, gomme a gobala ke babetši ba mesebe." 
1Chronicles10:4 Ke moka Saulo a re go mohlanka wa gagwe: “Goga tšhoša ya gago o ntlhabe ka yona; mohlomong batho bao ba tla tla ba ntshega. Eupša morwadi wa gagwe wa dibetša ga se a ka a rata; gobane o be a tšhogile kudu. Ke moka Saulo a tšea tšhoša a e wela. 
1Chronicles10:5 Ge morwadi wa ditlhamo tša gagwe a bona gore Saulo o hwile, a wela ka tšhoša gomme a hwa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Ka gona Saulo a hwa le barwa ba gagwe ba bararo le lapa la gagwe ka moka ba hwa gotee. 
1Chronicles10:7 Ge banna ka moka ba Isiraele bao ba bego ba le moeding wa moela ba bona gore ba tšhabile le gore Saulo le barwa ba gagwe ba hwile, ba tlogela metse ya bona gomme ba tšhaba; Bafilisita ba tla dula mo go yona." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ka letšatši le le latelago ge Bafilisita ba etla go hlobola bao ba bolailwego, ba hwetša Saulo le barwa ba gagwe ba wele thabeng ya Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Ka morago ga ge ba mo hlobotše, ba tšea hlogo ya gagwe le ditlhamo tša gagwe ba di romela nageng ya Bafilisita gore ba iše ditaba go medingwana ya bona le setšhaba." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ba bea ditlhamo tša gagwe ka ntlong ya modimo wa bona, ba mo kgomaretša hlogo tempeleng ya Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Ge badudi ka moka ba Jabeshe Gileade ba ekwa ka tšohle tšeo Bafilisita ba di dirilego Saulo. 
1Chronicles10:12 Bahlabani ka moka ba tšea ditopo tša Saulo le ditopo tša barwa ba gagwe, ba di tliša Jabose, ba boloka marapo a bona ka tlase ga sehlare sa tamarisk kua Jabose, ba ikona dijo matšatši a šupago." 
1Chronicles10:13 Ka gona Saulo a hwa ka baka la molato wa gagwe wo a o dirilego malebana le Jehofa, e lego lentšu la Jehofa leo a sa kago a le boloka, le ka baka la go kgopela keletšo go yo a nago le moya wa go tlwaelega gore a mmotšiše." 
1Chronicles10:14 Ga se a ka a botšiša Jehofa; ka gona a mmolaya, a mo nea Dafida morwa wa Jese mmušo." 
1Chronicles11:1 Ke moka Isiraele ka moka ba kgobokana go Dafida kua Heburone, ba re: “Bona, re lerapo la gago le nama ya gago.”" 
1Chronicles11:2 Le gona, mehleng e fetilego ge Saulo e be e sa le kgoši, ke wena o ilego wa eta pele le go tliša Isiraele;" 
1Chronicles11:3 Ka gona bagolo ka moka ba Isiraele ba tla go kgoši Heburone; Dafida a dira kgwerano le bona kua Heburone pele ga Jehofa; ba tlotša Dafida kgoši ya Isiraele, go ya ka lentšu la Jehofa ka Samuele." 
1Chronicles11:4 Dafida le Isiraele ka moka ba ya Jerusalema, e lego Jebuse. Moo Bajebuse ba bego ba dula gona nageng yeo ba bego ba le go yona." 
1Chronicles11:5 Badudi ba Jebuse ba re go Dafida: “O ka se tle mo.” Lega go le bjalo, Dafida o ile a thopa sebo sa Tsione, motse wa Dafida." 
1Chronicles11:6 Dafida a re: “Mang le mang yo a tlago go bolaya Bajebuse pele e tla ba molaodi le molaodi.” Joaba morwa wa Tseruya a rotoga pele, a ba kgošana." 
1Chronicles11:7 Dafida a dula seboeng; ka baka leo ba o bitša motse wa Dafida. 
1Chronicles11:8 A aga motse ka moka, go tloga Milo go dikologa, Joaba a lokiša motse ka moka." 
1Chronicles11:9 Dafida a tšwela pele a gola le go feta, ka gobane Jehofa wa madira o be a na le yena." 
1Chronicles11:10 Bjale tše ke dikgošana tša bagale bao Dafida a bego a na le bona, gore ba mo matlafatše mmušong wa gagwe le Isiraele ka moka, ba mo bea kgoši go ya ka lentšu la Jehofa mabapi le Isiraele." 
1Chronicles11:11 Palo ya banna ba bagale bao Dafida a bego a na le bona ke ye. Jasobeama, le Hagmoni, molaodi wa balaodi; a lahlela lerumo la gagwe go banna ba makgolo a mararo bao ba ilego ba ba fenya ka pela." 
1Chronicles11:12 Ka morago ga gagwe e be e le Eleasara morwa wa Dodo, moagi yo e bego e le yo mongwe wa bagale ba bararo." 
1Chronicles11:13 O be a na le Dafida kua Pas-damime, gomme moo Bafilisita ba kgobokane bakeng sa ntwa, moo go bego go e-na le tšhemo yeo e tletšego lenti; setšhaba sa tšhaba pele ga Bafilisita." 
1Chronicles11:14 Ba di tsenya ka mokotleng, ba o neela, ba bolaya Bafilisita; Jehofa a ba hlakodiša ka phološo e kgolo." 
1Chronicles11:15 Ka morago ga moo ba bararo ba bagolo ba masometharo ba theogela leswikeng go Dafida, ka leweng la Adulama; madira a Bafilisita a hloma mešaša moeding wa Refaime." 
1Chronicles11:16 Ka nako yeo Dafida o be a le ka gare ga lešaka, gomme madira a Bafilisita a be a le Betlelehema." 
1Chronicles11:17 Dafida a hlologetšwe, a re: “A nkabe motho a ka nwa meetse a sediba sa Betlelehema, seo se lego kgorong!" 
1Chronicles11:18 Ka gona ba bararo ba thuba mešaša ya Bafilisita, ba goga meetse ka sedibeng sa Betlelehema seo se lego kgorong, ba a tšea ba a tliša go Dafida. Eupša Dafida ga se a ka a e nwa, eupša a e tšhollela pele ga Jehofa." 
1Chronicles11:19 A re: “Modimo wa ka a ka se dire selo se; Na ke tla nwa madi a banna bao ba beilego maphelo a bona kotsing? ka gobane ba e tlišitše maphelo a bona kotsing. Ke ka fao a sa nyakego go e nwa. Dilo tše tše tharo ba di dira ka mafolofolo a magolo. 
1Chronicles11:20 Abisai ngwanabo Joaba e be e le molaodi wa ba bararo; 
1Chronicles11:21 Go ba bararo, o be a hlomphega go feta ba babedi; gobane e be e le mmuši wa bona; eupša ga se a fihlelela tše tharo tša mathomo." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya morwa wa Jehoyada, morwa wa mogale wa Kabetseele, yo a dirilego ditiro tše dintši; a bolaya ditau tše pedi tša Moaba; gape, a theoga a bolaya tau ka moleteng, mola go se na lehlwa." 
1Chronicles11:23 A bolaya Moegipita, monna wa bogolo bjo bogolo, bophagamo bja dikubiti tše hlano; seatleng sa Moegipita go be go na le lerumo le le swanago le kota ya balogi; eupša a theogela go yena a swere lepara, a ntšha lerumo seatleng sa Moegipita, a mmolaya ka lerumo la gagwe." 
1Chronicles11:24 Dilo tšeo Benaya morwa wa Jehoyada a di dirile, gomme a ba le leina gare ga bagale ba bararo." 
1Chronicles11:25 Bonang, o be a hlomphega gare ga ba masometharo, eupša a se fihlelele ba bararo ba pele." 
1Chronicles11:26 Asahele ngwanabo Joaba, le Elhanani morwa wa Dodo wa Betlelehema, banna ba bagale;" 
1Chronicles11:27 Shammathe kua Haroro, Hele kua Pelone;" 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira morwa wa Ike wa Moteko, le Abiesere wa Moantothe." 
1Chronicles11:29 Le Sibegai wa Husha, le Ilai wa Moahohe." 
1Chronicles11:30 Le Maharai wa Monetofa le Helede morwa wa Bana wa Monetofa. 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai morwa wa Ribai wa Gibea wa bana ba Benjamini, le Benaya wa Mopirathoni." 
1Chronicles11:32 Go tšwa nokeng ya Gaashe, Abiele, Arbathe." 
1Chronicles11:33 Le Azmavethe wa Morumane le Eliaba wa Shaalbon; 
1Chronicles11:34 Barwa ba Hashememe wa Mogisone e be e le Jonathane morwa wa Sage wa Harari. 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiame morwa wa Sakara wa Momohare le Elifele morwa wa Ura; 
1Chronicles11:36 Hefere wa Momeger, le Ahija wa Peloni;" 
1Chronicles11:37 Hetsero wa Mokarmele le Naarai morwa wa Eshebai. 
1Chronicles11:38 Joele ngwanabo Nathane le Mibara morwa wa Hagara; 
1Chronicles11:38 Joele ngwanabo Nathane le Mibara morwa wa Hagara; 
1Chronicles11:39 Tseleke wa Moamoni, Naharai wa Beerothe, mohlanka wa Joaba morwa wa Tseruya." 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira wa mo-Itre, Garebe wa mo-Itre," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria wa Mohethe le Sabade morwa wa Alai. 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina morwa wa Tsisa, kgošana ya Rubeni, e be e le ba masometharo;" 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanane morwa wa Maaka le Jehoshafate wa Momitine; 
1Chronicles11:44 Usia wa Moastera, le Shama le Jehiele, barwa ba Hotane wa Moarorote;" 
1Chronicles11:45 Jediaele morwa wa Tsimiri le Joha ngwanabo Motishi; 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliele wa Momoaba, Jeribai le Joshavia, barwa ba Elnaama, le Itma wa Momoaba." 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliele, Obede le Jaasiele, ba Metsoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Ba ke bona bao ba ilego ba tla go Dafida kua Tsikelage, ge a be a sa dutše a le kgauswi ka baka la Saulo morwa wa Kishi. Ba be ba le gare ga banna ba bagale, bathuši ba ntwa." 
1Chronicles12:2 Ba be ba itlhamile ka bora, ba kgona go diriša seatla sa le letona le sa le letshadi go lahlela maswika le go thuntšha mesebe go tšwa bora, e lego bana babo Saulo go tšwa Benjamini." 
1Chronicles12:3 Kgošana e be e le Ahiesere le Joase, barwa ba Shemaa wa Mogibea. Le Jesiele le Pelete, barwa ba Asimavethe; le Beraka le Jehu wa Moantothe;" 
1Chronicles12:4 le Ismaia wa Mogibeoni, monna yo maatla gare ga ba masometharo; le Jeremia, le Jahasiele, le Johanane, le Jotsabade, ba Gedera." 
1Chronicles12:5 Elusai, Jerimothe, Belia, Shemaria, le Shefatia wa Rafi;" 
1Chronicles12:6 le Elkana, le Jesiya, le Asarele, le Josere, le Jasobaama, ba Kora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 le Joele le Sebadia, barwa ba Jerohama wa Gedoro." 
1Chronicles12:7 le Joele le Sebadia, barwa ba Jerohama wa Gedoro." 
1Chronicles12:8 Ge e le Bagada, ba ile ba kgetha Dafida nageng ya dithabeng go fihla lešokeng, e le banna ba bagale ba bagale, banna bao ba kgonago go swara dikotse le dikotse, bao difahlego tša bona di bego di swana le difahlego tša ditau gomme di akgofela go swana le ditšhwene." 
1Chronicles12:9 Esere wa pele, Obadia wa bobedi, Eliaba wa boraro;" 
1Chronicles12:10 Mishmana ke wa bone, Jeremia wa bohlano;" 
1Chronicles12:11 wa botshelela Atai, wa bošupa Eliele;" 
1Chronicles12:12 wa botshelela Johanane, wa botshelela Elzabad;" 
1Chronicles12:13 la lesome la Jeremia, la lesometee la Magbanai;" 
1Chronicles12:14 Tše e be e le dihlogo tša dihlopha tša barwa ba Gade; e nyenyane e be e le lekgolo, gomme e kgolo e le sekete." 
1Chronicles12:15 Ke bona bao ba ilego ba tshela Jorodane ka kgwedi ya pele, ge e be e tlala mabopong a yona ka moka; ba tšhabela dinokeng ka moka, ka bohlabela le ka bodikela." 
1Chronicles12:16 Bana ba Benjamini le ba Juda ba tla go Dafida mošate. 
1Chronicles12:17 Dafida a tšwa go yo ba gahlanetša gomme a ba araba ka gore: “Ge e ba o tlile ka khutšo go nna go tlo nthuša, pelo ya ka e tla go kgomarela; ge e ba o tla go mphološa manabeng a ka, gomme o se na molato diatleng tša ka, wena Modimo wa borakgolokhukhu ba rena, gona nkgalemela." 
1Chronicles12:18 Ke moka moya wa tla go Amasai yo e bego e le molaodi wa balaodi, a re: “Ka lehlakoreng la gago, Dafida, le ka lehlakoreng la gago, wena morwa wa Jese! khutšo, khutšo a e be go lena, khutšo a e be go bathuši ba lena; gobane Modimo wa gago o a go thuša. Dafida a ba amogela, a ba bea baetapele ba sehlopha." 
1Chronicles12:19 Ba bangwe ba Manase ba wela go Dafida, ge a be a etla le Bafilisita ba lwa le Saulo. Eupša ga se ba ka ba ba thuša; gobane dikgošana tša Bafilisita di be di mo eleditše gore a tloge, di re: “O tla tloga go Saulo mong wa gagwe.” Ya dihlogo tša rena." 
1Chronicles12:20 Ge a eya Tsikelage, Adna, Jotsabade, Jediaele, Mikaele, Jotsabade, Elihu, Tsilithai, balaodi ba ba dikete ba Manase ba wela godimo ga gagwe." 
1Chronicles12:21 Ba thuša Dafida go lwa le sehlopha sa bagale, ka gobane ka moka e be e le banna ba bagale, e le balaodi ba madira." 
1Chronicles12:22 Gobane ka nako yeo o ile a tla go Dafida go mo thuša, go fihlela e le madira a magolo ao a swanago le madira a Modimo." 
1Chronicles12:23 Ke dipalo tša madira ao a bego a itokišeditše ntwa, a tla go Dafida Heburone, go ya ka lentšu la Jehofa, gore a fetoše mmušo wa Saulo go yena." 
1Chronicles12:24 Bana ba Juda bao ba rwelego kotse le lerumo e be e le ba dikete tše makgolo a tshela le makgolo a senyane-pedi, ba itokišeleditše ntwa." 
1Chronicles12:25 Go barwa ba Simeone, bahlabani ba matla, ba 7 100," 
1Chronicles12:26 go barwa ba Lefi ba 4 600; 
1Chronicles12:27 Joyada e be e le moetapele wa Baarone, a na le ba dikete tše tharo-makgološupa;" 
1Chronicles12:28 le Tsadoko lesogana, monna wa mogale, le balaodi ba masomepedi-pedi ba ntlo ya tatagwe." 
1Chronicles12:29 Go barwa ba Benjamini, ba ntlo ya Saulo, e be e le ba 3 000; gobane go fihla ga bjale ba bantši ba bona ba be ba diša ntlo ya Saulo." 
1Chronicles12:30 Go bana ba Efuraime banna ba bagale ba dikete tše masomepedi, bao ba tumilego ntlong ka moka ya borakgolokhukhu ba bona." 
1Chronicles12:31 Seripa sa moloko wa Manase go be go na le ba dikete tše lesomeseswai bao ba bego ba kgethilwe ka maina gore ba tle go bea Dafida kgoši. 
1Chronicles12:32 Go barwa ba Isakara, banna bao ba tsebago mehla, ba tseba seo bana ba Isiraele ba swanetšego go se dira; dihlogo tša bona e be e le tše makgolo a mabedi; bana babo ka moka ba be ba le ka tlase ga taolo ya bona." 
1Chronicles12:33 Ba Sebulone, bao ba ilego ba ya ntweng, bao ba tsebago ntwa, bao ba nago le didirišwa ka moka tša ntwa, ba dikete tše masome a mahlano, bao ba bego ba kgona go boloka maemo. Ba be ba sa forana." 
1Chronicles12:34 Go Nafutali balaodi ba dikete tše sekete, ba dikete tše masometharo-šupa ba na le dikotse le marumo." 
1Chronicles12:35 Wa moloko wa Dani dikete tše masomepedi-seswai makgolotshela. 
1Chronicles12:36 Go Asere, ba ba tšwago ntweng, ba dikete tša ntwa, ba dikete tše masomenne." 
1Chronicles12:37 Ka mošola wa Jorodane, Barubeni le Bagada le seripa sa moloko wa Manase, ba swere mehuta ka moka ya diletšo tša ntwa, ba dikete tše lekgolo-masomepedi (120 000)." 
1Chronicles12:38 Banna ba ka moka ba ntwa bao ba bego ba kgona go boloka maemo, ba tla Heburone ka pelo ye e phethagetšego, go tlo dira Dafida kgoši ya Isiraele ka moka; Baisraele ka moka ba dumela go dira Dafida kgoši." 
1Chronicles12:39 Ba dula moo le Dafida matšatši a mararo, ba eja le go nwa, ka gobane bana babo bona ba be ba ba lokišeditše." 
1Chronicles12:40 Go feta moo, bao ba bego ba le kgaufsi le bona, go fihla Isakara, Sebulune le Naftali, ba tliša bogobe godimo ga dipokolo le dikamela le meila le dikgomo le nama, bupi, dikuku tša mago le beine ka bontši le makhura le dikgomo le diruiwa. Lehumo, ka gobane lethabo le be le le Isiraele." 
1Chronicles13:1 Dafida a bolela ditaba tše dibotse go balaodi ba dikete le ba makgolo le go mmuši yo mongwe le yo mongwe. 
1Chronicles13:2 Dafida a re go phuthego ka moka ya Isiraele: “Ge e ba go kgahliša lena le Jehofa Modimo wa rena, a re romeleng bana babo rena bao ba šetšego mabopong ka moka a Isiraele le go baperisita bao ba lego gare ga bona; le Balefi metseng ya bona le mafulong a bona, gore ba re kgoboketše." 
1Chronicles13:3 A re bušetšeng areka ya Modimo wa rena go rena, gobane ga se ra ka ra e tsoma mehleng ya Saulo." 
1Chronicles13:4 Phuthego ka moka ya re ba dire bjalo, ka gobane taba yeo e be e lokile mahlong a setšhaba ka moka." 
1Chronicles13:5 Ka gona Dafida a kgoboketša Isiraele ka moka, go tloga Shihoro ya Egipita go fihla mo Hemate, gore ba tliše areka ya Modimo go tšwa Kiriathe-Jearime." 
1Chronicles13:6 Dafida le Isiraele ka moka ba rotogela Baala, ke gore Kiriathe-Jearime, yeo e bego e le ya Juda, go yo rotoša areka ya Modimo Jehofa yo a dutšego magareng ga bakerubi, yo leina la gagwe le bitšwago go yona." 
1Chronicles13:7 Ba rwala areka ya Modimo wa therešo ka koloyana e mpsha go tšwa ntlong ya Abinadaba, gomme Utsa le Ao ba be ba otlela koloyana." 
1Chronicles13:8 Dafida le Isiraele ka moka ba letša pele ga Modimo wa bona ka matla a bona ka moka, e le ka dikoša, diharepa, le dikoša tša dikoša, le dikoša le diphalafala le diphalafala." 
1Chronicles13:9 Ge ba fihla seboeng sa Kidone, Utsa a otlolla seatla sa gagwe gore a sware Areka; gobane dikgomo di be di kgopišitšwe." 
1Chronicles13:10 Kgalefo ya Jehofa ya tuka Usa, a mo otla, ka gobane a beile seatla sa gagwe seatleng sa gagwe. Gomme moo a hwela pele ga Modimo." 
1Chronicles13:11 Dafida a se thabele, ka gobane Jehofa o be a dirile lešoba kua Usa; ka fao leina la lefelo leo le ile la bitšwa Peresatsa go fihla le lehono." 
1Chronicles13:12 Dafida a boifa Modimo letšatšing leo, a re: “Ke tla tliša bjang Areka ya Modimo gae go nna?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Ka gona Dafida ga se a ka a tliša areka gae motseng wa Dafida, eupša a e iša ka thoko ntlong ya Obede-Edomo wa Mogithe." 
1Chronicles13:14 Areka ya Modimo ya dula le lapa la Obede-Edomo ka ntlong ya gagwe dikgwedi tše tharo. Morena a šegofatša ntlo ya Obede-Edomo le tšohle tšeo a bego a na le tšona. 
1Chronicles14:1 Hirama kgoši ya Tiro a roma baromiwa go Dafida, le dihlare tša mesedere, le babetli ba mafsika le babetli, gore ba mo agele ntlo." 
1Chronicles14:2 Dafida a lemoga gore Jehofa o mo hlomile gore e be kgoši ya Isiraele, ka gobane mmušo wa gagwe o be o bušeditšwe go yena ka baka la setšhaba sa gagwe sa Isiraele." 
1Chronicles14:3 Dafida a tšea basadi ba bangwe kua Jerusalema, Dafida a tswala barwa le barwedi ba bangwe." 
1Chronicles14:4 A ke maina a barwa ba gagwe bao a bilego le bona kua Jerusalema; Shamua le Shobabe, Nathane le Solomone," 
1Chronicles14:5 le Ibhara, le Elishua, le Elpalete;" 
1Chronicles14:6 le Noga, le Nefege, le Jafia;" 
1Chronicles14:7 le Elisama, le Beeliada, le Elifelete." 
1Chronicles14:8 Ge Bafilisita ba ekwa gore Dafida o tloditšwe e le kgoši ya Isiraele ka moka, Bafilisita ka moka ba rotogela go nyaka Dafida. Dafida o ile a kwa ka seo, a tšwa go yo ba gahlanetša." 
1Chronicles14:9 Bafilisita ba tla ba ba phatlalatša moeding wa Refaime.
